title: When to Align, When to Predict: A Phase Diagram for Multimodal Learning
abstract: Cross-modal alignment (CA) and cross-modal prediction (CP) are the dominant paradigms for multimodal representation learning, yet there is no systematic understanding of when each succeeds, when each fails, and when cross-modal training helps at all -- a gap that leaves practitioners, especially in scientific domains like biomedicine or astrophysics, with heterogeneous instruments and multiple levels of organization and measurement, unable to diagnose why standard methods underperform the best single modality. We develop a unified linear framework that addresses both questions. Under a spiked signal-plus-noise model with structured cross-modal nuisance correlation, we derive separation ratios for both objectives that expose complementary failure modes: alignment whitens each modality and fails when nuisance is strongly correlated across views; prediction encodes whatever is cross-predictable through a one-sided whitening, with recovery governed by source-modality quality. The resulting phase diagram partitions multimodal problems into four regimes: Both, CA only, CP only, and Neither. We present a data-driven procedure to locate real-world datasets in this diagram using a small labeled subsample, identifying the preferred objective and prediction direction before any cross-modal training. Experiments on synthetic data, stereo-vision benchmarks, image-caption pairs, and real astrophysical data validate the predictions in the nonlinear regime, including the Neither regime where cross-modal training is actively harmful. Our framework lets practitioners diagnose their multimodal problem and choose the right objective before committing to training. Code to reproduce the results is available at https://github.com/IlayMalinyak/mm_align_vs_pred.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一线性框架，通过相位图指导多模态学习中选择对齐或预测目标，避免有害训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨模态对齐和跨模态预测是多模态表示学习的主流范式，但缺乏对何时有效、何时失效的系统理解。特别是在生物医学、天体物理学等科学领域，异构仪器和多层级测量导致标准方法有时不如单一模态。现有研究无法解释为何某些情况下跨模态训练反而有害，亟需诊断性工具来指导实践者选择合适的目标。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个统一线性框架，基于尖峰信号加噪声模型和结构化跨模态干扰相关。推导跨模态对齐和跨模态预测的分离比，揭示对齐会白化每个模态并在干扰强相关时失效，预测则通过单向白化编码可预测内容。从而构建相位图，将多模态问题分为四个区域：Both、CA only、CP only、Neither。提供数据驱动程序，利用少量标注子样本定位真实数据集在此图中的位置，以确定首选目标。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据、立体视觉基准、图像-字幕对和真实天体物理数据上验证了框架的预测，包括非线性情形。实验确认了相位图中各区域的存在，特别是Neither区域中跨模态训练有害。通过相位图辅助，实践者能在训练前正确选择目标，避免性能退化。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了多模态学习中关于何时对齐、何时预测的系统性理论，为实践者提供了诊断工具和相位图指导。学术上统一了对齐与预测的互补失效模式，实际应用中帮助科学领域多模态学习决策。潜在局限是线性假设，未来可扩展至更复杂的非线性模型和动态任务。

title: A Unifying Lens on Supervised Fine-Tuning Through Target Distribution Design
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) typically maximizes the likelihood of every token in a demonstrated trajectory. However, an observed token can be non-unique, noisy, or misaligned with the model prior. Strictly fitting toward this one-hot target may be suboptimal, especially when the pretrained model encodes a rich knowledge prior. In this work, we reinterpret SFT as target distribution design: instead of studying only the loss objective, we analyze the token-level target that the loss drives the model to match. We introduce the Q-target framework, which decomposes SFT supervision into two explicit choices: (1) how strongly to rely on the observed token, and (2) how to allocate the remaining probability mass over alternatives. This perspective unifies many existing SFT variants as implicit choices of the target distribution Q. Building on this view, we propose Target-SFT which constructs the training objective directly from the desired target distribution. This method consistently outperforms across the ten reasoning dataset-model settings evaluated, showing the effectiveness of this target-based approach. Overall, our formulation reveals a more fundamental design principle for SFT training and opens a broader search space for SFT objectives.

light_analysis.overview: 将监督微调重新解释为目标分布设计，提出Q-target框架并推出Target-SFT方法，统一了现有SFT变体并在推理任务上表现更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统的监督微调（SFT）最大化演示轨迹中每个token的似然，但观测到的token可能非唯一、有噪声或与模型先验不一致。严格拟合one-hot目标可能次优，尤其是在预训练模型编码了丰富先验知识的情况下。现有方法未显式考虑目标分布的设计，导致训练缺乏灵活性。因此，需要一种更统一的视角来重新审视SFT的损失目标。
light_analysis.method: 提出Q-target框架，将SFT监督分解为两个显式选择：（1）对观测token的依赖强度，（2）剩余概率在备选token上的分配。该框架统一了多种现有SFT变体作为目标分布Q的隐式选择。基于此，提出Target-SFT方法，直接从期望的目标分布构建训练目标，无需依赖隐式设计。
light_analysis.result: 在十个推理数据集-模型组合的评估中，Target-SFT方法持续优于现有基线。具体性能提升摘要未给出数值，但明确表示在所有设置下均表现更好，验证了基于目标分布设计方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的贡献在于揭示了SFT训练中更基本的设计原则，即目标分布的设计比损失函数本身更重要。这为SFT目标打开了更广阔的搜索空间，有望推动微调方法的进一步发展。未来可探索更灵活的目标分布形式以适应不同任务需求。

title: ARM: An AutoRegressive Large Multimodal Model with Unified Discrete Representations
abstract: This paper introduces ARM, a discrete representation-based AutoRegressive Model that unifies image understanding, generation, and editing within a next-token prediction framework. ARM is built on three efforts: first, we train a discrete semantic visual tokenizer that maps images into compact token sequences. Our tokenizer is supervised with multiple objectives that jointly promote semantic discriminability, language alignment and faithful reconstruction, thereby supporting diverse tasks in a shared latent space. With this, we train a 7B autoregressive model over large-scale text and image token sequences, seamlessly developing vision-language perception and generation capabilities. Finally, to further improve preference-aligned behavior for text-to-image generation and instruction-guided editing, ARM applies reinforcement learning (RL) to optimize task-level objectives such as visual quality, instruction adherence, and edit consistency. Surprisingly, the results show that RL not only substantially improves performance on the target tasks (e.g., raising WISE overall from 0.50 to 0.56, GEdit-Bench-EN G_O from 5.75 to 6.68), but also induces cross-task synergy between text-to-image generation and editing. Collectively, these findings highlight autoregressive modeling, when paired with strong representations and preference optimization, as a scalable foundation for multimodal intelligence. Code: https://github.com/wdrink/ARM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于离散表示的ARM自回归模型，统一图像理解、生成与编辑任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态模型通常将视觉任务分离处理，缺乏统一框架，且文本到图像生成和编辑的偏好对齐不足。本文旨在通过离散语义视觉分词器和自回归建模，构建统一的多模态模型，并利用强化学习优化任务级目标，实现高质量图像生成与编辑。
light_analysis.method: 首先训练离散语义视觉分词器，通过多目标监督（语义判别、语言对齐、重建）将图像映射为紧凑token序列。然后训练7B自回归模型处理文本和图像token序列，实现视觉-语言感知与生成。最后应用强化学习优化文本到图像生成和指令引导编辑的任务级目标，如视觉质量、指令遵循和编辑一致性。
light_analysis.result: 强化学习显著提升目标性能：WISE综合分数从0.50升至0.56，GEdit-Bench-EN的G_O从5.75升至6.68，并展现出文本到图像生成与编辑间的跨任务协同效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARM证明自回归建模结合强离散表示和偏好优化是多模态智能的可扩展基础。统一框架在图像理解、生成和编辑上性能优异，代码已开源。

title: Next Forcing: Causal World Modeling with Multi-Chunk Prediction
abstract: Autoregressive video generation has emerged as a powerful paradigm for World Action Models (WAMs). However, existing approaches suffer from slow training convergence and limited converged accuracy, particularly at high frame rates, as the training supervision is confined to the current chunk without explicit signals about future dynamics; they also suffer from slow inference due to iterative video denoising. In this paper, we present Next Forcing, a multi-chunk prediction (MCP) framework for causal world modeling that enables faster training, higher accuracy, and accelerated inference. Inspired by multi-token prediction in large language models, Next Forcing introduces an MCP training objective that augments the main model with lightweight auxiliary MCP modules to simultaneously denoise video chunks at multiple future temporal horizons (next$^1$, next$^2$, next$^3$ chunks). These MCP modules form a causal chain across prediction depths, where intermediate features fused from multiple layers of the main model are leveraged to predict future dynamics, allowing near-future predictions to inform farther-future ones and providing dense multi-scale temporal supervision back to the main model. During training, the MCP modules significantly accelerate convergence and improve converged accuracy, especially at high frame rates: at 50 fps, Next Forcing achieves a 93.1% relative improvement over LingBot-VA at 5k training steps and 2.3x faster convergence, and establishes new state-of-the-art results on the RoboTwin benchmark (94.1/93.5% on Clean/Random). At inference, the MCP modules can be retained to predict the next video chunk in parallel with the current one, achieving 2x inference acceleration. Next Forcing also demonstrates significant improvements on PhyWorld, a benchmark evaluating adherence to physical laws in video generation, and over 50% FVD reduction on general video pretraining.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Next Forcing框架，通过多块预测实现加速训练、高精度和推理加速的因果世界建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归视频生成方法在高帧率下训练收敛慢且精度有限，因监督仅限于当前块，缺乏未来动态信号；推理也因迭代去噪而缓慢。这些问题限制了世界动作模型在实时应用中的有效性，亟需一种能提供多尺度时间监督并加速推理的框架。
light_analysis.method: Next Forcing采用多块预测（MCP）框架，受大语言模型多token预测启发，在主模型旁添加轻量辅助MCP模块，同时去噪未来多个时间视界的视频块（next^1, next^2, next^3）。这些模块形成因果链，融合主模型多层中间特征预测未来动态，近未来预测辅助远未来，并向主模型提供密集多尺度时间监督。
light_analysis.result: 在50 fps下，Next Forcing在5k训练步骤时相比LingBot-VA提升93.1%，收敛速度加快2.3倍；在RoboTwin基准上达到新SOTA（Clean 94.1%, Random 93.5%）。推理时保留MCP模块可实现2倍加速，同时PhyWorld物理法则评估显著改进，通用视频预训练FVD降低超50%。
light_analysis.conclusion: Next Forcing通过多块预测有效加速训练和推理，提升高帧率下的精度，并在多个基准上取得最优结果。该方法因果链设计为世界建模提供了新思路，具有实时视频生成和物理仿真等应用潜力。未来可探索更长的预测视界或与其他生成模型结合。

title: AnyMod-LLVE: Low-Light Video Enhancement with Modality-Agnostic Inference
abstract: Low-light video enhancement (LLVE) remains a challenging task due to severe information degradation under low-illumination conditions. Recent multimodal approaches have significantly improved enhancement performance by incorporating auxiliary modalities, such as event streams and infrared images. However, these methods typically assume the availability of these modalities at inference, which is often not feasible in real-world scenarios. To solve this problem, in this work, we propose AMNet, a unified multimodal framework for LLVE, to support flexible modality-agnostic inference, where auxiliary modalities may be unavailable. To address the issue of modality absence, we introduce a Spatial-Spectral Dual-Gated Translator that learns the correspondence between auxiliary modalities and RGB inputs, producing implicit auxiliary representations to support the robust enhancement. Additionally, to fully facilitate the learning of cross-modal correspondence, we conduct large-scale multimodal pretraining based on the RGB-only dataset with synthetic auxiliary modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AMNet could handle arbitrary inference-time modality combinations and exhibits superior performance for LLVE under modality absence conditions. Code and models are available on the project page.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026; Project page and code: https://lhfgghc.github.io/LLVE-AMNet

light_analysis.overview: 提出AMNet，一个统一的模态无关推理框架，用于低光视频增强，支持任意推理时模态组合。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光视频增强（LLVE）在低照度下信息退化严重，多模态方法通过引入事件流、红外等辅助模态提升性能，但现有方法假设推理时辅助模态可用，实际场景中常缺失。本文旨在解决推理时模态缺失问题，实现灵活的多模态融合与鲁棒增强。
light_analysis.method: 提出AMNet统一多模态框架，核心是空间-光谱双门控转换器（SS-DGT），学习辅助模态与RGB输入的对应关系，在模态缺失时产生隐式辅助表示以支持增强。此外，基于RGB数据集合成辅助模态进行大规模多模态预训练，促进跨模态对应学习。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，AMNet能处理任意推理时模态组合，在模态缺失条件下，性能优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了其灵活性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个支持模态无关推理的LLVE框架，解决了实际场景中辅助模态不可用的难题，具有重要实用价值。未来可探索更高效的跨模态学习策略，并拓展到其他视觉增强任务。代码和模型已开源。

title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents
abstract: In this paper, we propose EEVEE, the first multi-dataset test-time prompt learning framework for LLM agents, enabling test-time prompt learning under real-world task streams. Existing methods are largely designed for single-dataset settings, while real-world applications require models to handle heterogeneous input streams drawn from multiple datasets, domains, and task distributions, limiting their practical applicability. To mitigate cross-dataset interference, EEVEE introduces a router that partitions incoming inputs into task clusters and assigns them to suitable prompt configurations. This design is optimized via a router-prompt co-evolution strategy, which employs interleaved router and prompt learning phases to address their mutual dependency. Experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that the framework improves robustness under heterogeneous data streams while maintaining single-benchmark learning capability and efficiency. Specifically, EEVEE improves average multi-benchmark scores by 10.38 and 24.32 points over Qwen3-4B-Instruct and DeepSeek-V3.2, surpassing SOTA methods GEPA and ACE by up to 37.2% and 48.2%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个多数据集测试时提示学习框架EEVEE，实现真实世界任务流下的自适应提示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有测试时提示学习方法多针对单一数据集设计，但真实应用需处理来自多个数据集、领域和任务分布的异构输入流，导致跨数据集干扰和实用性受限。亟需一种能适应多源异构数据流的提示学习框架。
light_analysis.method: EEVEE引入路由器将输入划分为任务簇并分配专属提示配置，通过路由器-提示协同进化策略优化（交错学习阶段），解决两者相互依赖问题。无需预训练，在测试时动态学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，EEVEE使Qwen3-4B-Instruct平均多基准分数提升10.38点，DeepSeek-V3.2提升24.32点；相比GEPA和ACE等SOTA方法，提升幅度达37.2%和48.2%，同时保持单基准学习能力和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: EEVEE首次实现多数据集场景下的测试时提示学习，显著提升LLM智能体在异构数据流中的鲁棒性，兼顾跨任务适应与性能。未来可扩展至更复杂的任务流和模型。

title: Lip Forcing: Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion for Real-time Lip Synchronization
abstract: Diffusion-based lip synchronization models achieve strong visual quality and audio-visual alignment, but full-sequence bidirectional attention and many denoising steps make them impractical for real-time inference. We present Lip Forcing, to our knowledge the first autoregressive diffusion method for video-to-video (V2V) lip synchronization, which distills a 14B audio-conditioned bidirectional video diffusion teacher into causal students. At inference, the students generate each chunk in only two denoising steps without inference-time CFG, enabling real-time lip synchronization. A lip-sync-specific teacher-trajectory analysis reveals a CFG fidelity-sync tradeoff: no-CFG predictions favor reference fidelity, whereas CFG-guided predictions favor synchronization within a mid-trajectory band. Lip Forcing translates this finding into three analysis-derived components: Sync-Window DMD, a two-step inference schedule, and a SyncNet-based reward. We validate Lip Forcing at two student scales, both distilled from the 14B teacher. The 1.3B student crosses into real-time streaming at 31 FPS, $17.6\times$ faster than its same-scale bidirectional model. The 14B student, the largest diffusion model reported for V2V lip synchronization, runs $39.8\times$ faster than its teacher at comparable reference fidelity. Time-to-first-frame is sub-millisecond at both scales, far below every diffusion baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个自回归扩散唇同步方法Lip Forcing，通过蒸馏和两步推理实现实时视频唇同步。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的扩散唇同步模型依赖全序列双向注意力和多步去噪，导致推理延迟高，无法满足实时需求。尽管生成质量高，但实际应用受限。本文旨在通过自回归蒸馏和高效推理策略实现实时性能，同时保持视觉质量和音视频对齐。
light_analysis.method: 将14B参数的双向视频扩散教师模型蒸馏为因果学生模型。提出基于教师轨迹分析的三大组件：Sync-Window DMD、两步推理调度和SyncNet奖励。学生模型仅需两步去噪，无需推理时CFG。使用自回归逐块生成，支持流式处理。
light_analysis.result: 1.3B学生模型以31 FPS实时运行，比同规模双向模型快17.6倍；14B学生模型比教师快39.8倍，且参考保真度相当。时间到首帧在两个尺度下均低于1毫秒，远低于所有扩散基线。未明确说明具体同步精度指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lip Forcing首次实现自回归扩散模型的实时唇同步，速度显著优于现有扩散方法，且保持高质量。该方法可用于实时视频通话、直播等场景。未来可能探索进一步压缩模型或改进蒸馏策略。

title: Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories
abstract: Data tells stories that shape society; the data journalist's job is to turn raw information into stories non-experts can trust. A high-quality news feature takes a newsroom team weeks: hunting for context, running statistics, choosing an angle, and designing visuals. Recent agents handle individual steps well: data-science agents close the analysis loop, while design agents synthesize beautiful websites. But can an agent serve as a data journalist end to end? We introduce Data Journalist Agent (Data2Story), a multi-agent framework that orchestrates specialized roles into a single virtual newsroom. Data2Story contributes two innovations. (i) Claims are evidence-grounded: an Inspector links every number, angle, and asset back to data, code, or an external reference. (ii) Articles are multimodally generative: rather than defaulting to plain text and static charts, Data2Story reasons about what readers will want to see, then deploys multimodal tools, such as interactive maps for geography and audio for music. We evaluate Data2Story on 18 articles, each paired with the originally published expert piece, along four axes: (a) human-agent angle coverage; (b) rubric evaluation with 53 participants across five dimensions; (c) computer-use agents as judges, a cost-saving proxy for how readers navigate interactive articles; and (d) verifiability, where a coding verifier re-executes statements against the data and checks claims against references. Data2Story produces competitive, evidence-traceable multimedia stories, with particular strength in transparency and auditability. Human articles retain an edge in editorial angle, creative design, and presentation. We position Data2Story as a collaborator for journalists, enabling more evidence-based, transparent, and verifiable reporting. Code and demos are available at https://data2story.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Data2Story多智能体框架，实现端到端证据可追溯的多模态数据新闻生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据新闻制作耗时且需要多领域专家协作，现有方法仅能处理单个步骤（如数据分析或设计），缺乏端到端智能体。本文旨在填补这一空白，构建一个能自动完成从数据到可验证多媒体故事全流程的智能体。
light_analysis.method: Data2Story是一个多智能体框架，模拟虚拟新闻编辑室。两大创新：1) Inspector模块确保所有声称有据可查，链接到数据、代码或外部参考；2) 根据读者需求自动选择多媒体工具（如交互地图、音频）生成故事。使用18篇配对文章评估，涉及角度覆盖、用户评分、代理模拟导航和可验证性四方面。
light_analysis.result: Data2Story生成的文章在证据可追溯性和透明度上表现突出，与人类专家文章相比具有竞争力。但在编辑角度、创意设计和呈现上人类仍占优。评估包括53名参与者对五个维度的评分，以及编码验证器对声明的重执行验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: Data2Story作为记者协作工具，提升了报道的证据基础、透明度和可验证性。未来可进一步优化创意设计能力。代码和演示已公开。

title: The Role of Feedback Alignment in Self-Distillation
abstract: Conditioning a language model on additional context, such as feedback on a previous attempt, typically improves its response. Self-distillation trains the model to retain this improvement when the context is not present. The method works by matching the model's output distribution under two settings: a student that sees only the question, and a self-teacher that also sees the context. What the model learns therefore depends on what context the self-teacher receives, yet the design of this context remains largely unexplored.   We study context design for self-distillation by training a solver on feedback from a frozen critic. We compare three conditions: (i) a binary reward (GRPO), (ii) the reference solution, and (iii) a step-by-step critique aligned to the solver's reasoning trace.   Step-aligned critique yields the largest gains, outperforming GRPO by 16.11 points and reference-solution-conditioned self-distillation by 5.27 points (Avg@12). Per-token advantage analysis reveals why: step-aligned feedback targets only the tokens where reasoning fails, leaving correct behavior intact. Conditioning on the reference solution, by contrast, pressures the model to change its behavior at every token (even correct steps) because an alternative derivation inevitably differs in phrasing and approach. This suggests that structural alignment between feedback and the solver's reasoning is a key driver of self-distillation effectiveness.
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on RL from World Feedback (RLxF)

light_analysis.overview: 研究自蒸馏中反馈对齐的作用，发现步骤对齐的批评优于二元奖励和参考解法条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 自蒸馏通过匹配学生和自教师输出分布来训练模型，但自教师接收的上下文设计尚未充分探索。现有方法如GRPO使用二元奖励，或使用参考解法，但未考虑与模型推理过程的对齐。因此需要研究如何设计上下文以提高自蒸馏效果。
light_analysis.method: 使用冻结的批评器对求解器进行反馈训练，比较三种条件：(i) 二元奖励（GRPO），(ii) 参考解法，(iii) 与求解器推理轨迹对齐的步骤级批评。步骤对齐的批评针对失败步骤提供反馈，保留正确行为。
light_analysis.result: 步骤对齐的批评在Avg@12上分别比GRPO提升16.11分，比参考解法条件提升5.27分。每token优势分析显示步骤对齐反馈仅针对推理失败令牌，而参考解法迫使模型改变所有令牌行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构对齐（反馈与求解器推理过程对齐）是自蒸馏有效性的关键驱动因素。该发现为自蒸馏中的上下文设计提供指导，可能提升语言模型在推理任务中的性能。未来可探索更细致的对齐策略。

title: Predicting Future Behaviors in Reasoning Models Enables Better Steering
abstract: Deployed large reasoning models (LRMs) often behave unexpectedly. Test-time steering controls LRM outputs by intervening on their hidden representations, but it can degrade output quality. We argue that prior steering work implicitly relies on internal features that detect behavior in already generated text. We show that these detection features are poor predictors of future behavioral outcomes, and thus not the natural intervention target. Instead, we train activation probes to predict future behavior likelihoods from intermediate reasoning steps. These probes predict the most likely behavior with 64%-91% accuracy, revealing a separate type of internal prediction features. Building on these prediction features, we introduce a text-level steering method, Future Probe Controlled Generation. FPCG samples multiple candidate sentences and chooses the best one according to a probe predicting the future behavior likelihood. This enables steering with almost no output quality degradation. FPCG also enables steering in several evaluations where activation steering fails. These results show that distinguishing detection and prediction features enables a more nuanced approach to controlling LRM behaviors.

light_analysis.overview: 通过训练预测未来行为概率的探针，实现文本级控制生成，避免输出质量下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRM）在部署时常出现意外行为，测试时干预隐藏表示的方法会降低输出质量。现有隐式依赖内部特征检测已生成文本中的行为，但这些检测特征对未来行为预测能力差，不是自然干预目标。因此需要更好的预测特征来实现有效控制。
light_analysis.method: 训练激活探针从中间推理步骤预测未来行为概率，在多个数据集上达到64%-91%的准确率。基于这些预测特征，提出文本级控制方法FPCG：对多个候选句子采样，根据预测未来行为概率的探针选择最佳句子。该方法避免了激活干预带来的质量退化，并在多个评估中成功控制。
light_analysis.result: 在多个行为预测任务中，探针以64%-91%的准确率预测最可能的行为。FPCG几乎不降低输出质量，且在多个评估中优于激活干预方法（后者在某些场景失败）。实验表明区分检测与预测特征能更精细地控制LRM行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了推理模型中存在预测未来行为的内部特征，并利用它们设计了FPCG方法，实现了低质量损失的有效控制。这一发现为理解模型内部表征和控制提供了新视角，未来可探索更细粒度的行为控制或结合其他干预技术。

title: Algorithmic and Minimax Complexities in Kernel Bandits
abstract: Gaussian-process upper confidence bound (GP-UCB) and decision-estimation-coefficient (DEC) methods may appear, at first sight, to belong to different theories. This paper places the two viewpoints in a common algorithmic-information language for frequentist RKHS bandits. GP-UCB fixes an algorithmic, rather than true, Gaussian-process prior and exploits realized-trajectory complexity together with computational tractability, whereas MAMS optimizes a robust class-wide MAIR/DEC envelope. Through the unified MAIR framework and heterogeneous positive-semidefinite algorithmic priors, we generalize both the GP-UCB analysis and the MAMS algorithm, propose a safeguarded master that combines their advantages, and provide a kernel-bandit construction showing that algorithmic complexity can be more informative than class-wide minimax or DEC certificates in overparameterized models. The resulting message is that algorithmic information and class-wide minimax coefficients answer different questions and can lead to different gaps; kernel bandits provide a clean setting in which this distinction becomes mathematically visible.

light_analysis.overview: 统一GP-UCB和DEC理论，提出结合两者优点的保护性主算法，揭示算法复杂性与minimax复杂性的差异。
light_analysis.motivation: GP-UCB和DEC看似属于不同理论框架，实际回答不同问题。现有方法未能有效结合算法信息与类wide minimax系数，尤其在过参数化模型中，需要统一视角以明确两者关系。
light_analysis.method: 基于MAIR框架和异构PSD算法先验，将GP-UCB的算法先验与MAMS的鲁棒类wide MAIR/DEC包络结合，提出一个保护性主算法，在核bandits环境中展示算法复杂性比minimax或DEC证书更具信息性。
light_analysis.result: 在过参数化模型中，算法复杂性提供的间隙比类wide minimax或DEC证书更小，表明算法信息更丰富。具体数值未在摘要中给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是统一了GP-UCB和DEC的视角，证明算法信息与minimax系数回答不同问题，在核bandits中清晰可见。这有助于根据问题特性选择更优方法，并指示未来研究方向。

title: Multi-Faceted Interactivity Alignment in Full-Duplex Speech Models
abstract: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models can listen and speak simultaneously, making them a promising architecture for natural conversation. However, current models are trained solely with supervised learning through token-level likelihood maximization, which does not directly optimize interaction-level behaviors, causing interactivity issues such as excessive silence and ill-timed turn-taking. Recent work has applied reinforcement learning (RL) to improve interactivity, but existing methods address only a limited set of interactive behaviors in their rewards. In this work, we propose a post-training alignment method that comprehensively improves the interactivity of full-duplex spoken dialogue models through RL. We address the four canonical axes of interactivity: pause handling, turn-taking, backchanneling, and user interruption. For each axis, we extract short audio segments from human conversation corpora and optimize the model with axis-specific reward functions. An extra LLM-based reward for response quality prevents semantic degradation. We apply our method to two open-source models, Moshi and PersonaPlex, demonstrating consistent improvements in interactivity on both offline evaluation with pre-recorded audio and real-time multi-turn dialogue evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的后训练对齐方法，全面优化全双工语音对话模型的四维度交互行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 全双工语音对话模型能同时听和说，但现有监督学习仅优化令牌级似然，未直接优化交互级行为，导致过度沉默、不合时机的话轮转换等问题。虽然强化学习已被用于改善交互性，但现有方法仅针对有限的交互行为设计奖励，缺乏对暂停处理、话轮转换、即兴反馈和用户打断等核心维度的全面优化。因此，需要一种更全面的方法提升模型的交互质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种后训练对齐方法，通过强化学习全面优化全双工语音对话模型的四项交互维度：暂停处理、话轮转换、即兴反馈和用户打断。从人类对话语料中提取短音频片段，为每个维度设计特定奖励函数。此外，引入基于LLM的奖励以评估响应质量，防止语义退化。该方法应用于Moshi和PersonaPlex两个开源模型，在预录音频的离线评估和实时多轮对话评估中均得到验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Moshi和PersonaPlex两个开源模型上应用该方法，离线评估使用预录音频，实时评估采用多轮对话，均显示交互性一致改善。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明在暂停处理、话轮转换、即兴反馈和用户打断等维度上均有提升，且语义质量未下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过强化学习提出了一种全面的后训练对齐方法，显著提升了全双工语音对话模型的交互性，覆盖了四个关键交互维度。该方法具有通用性，可应用于不同基线模型，并有利于推动更自然的人机对话发展。未来工作可探索更细粒度的奖励设计或扩展到更多交互行为。

title: ReasonAlloc: Hierarchical Decoding-Time KV Cache Budget Allocation for Reasoning Models
abstract: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories in large language model (LLM) reasoning cause severe inference bottlenecks due to rapid key-value (KV) cache growth. Current decoding-time compression methods mitigate this issue via token eviction, but typically assume a uniform budget distribution across all layers and heads. In contrast, existing non-uniform budget allocation methods are predominantly designed for the static prompt prefill phase, and they do not capture the stepwise context demands of autoregressive reasoning. To bridge this gap, we propose ReasonAlloc, a training-free framework that recasts decoding-time KV compression as a hierarchical budget allocation problem. ReasonAlloc operates at two complementary levels: an offline layer-wise preallocation strategy captures an architecture-driven demand pattern which we call ``\textit{Reasoning Wave}'', while an online head-wise strategy reallocates resources during decoding to information-rich heads based on real-time utility. Evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks (MATH-500, AIME~2024) using DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B, and AceReason-14B show that ReasonAlloc outperforms uniform-budget R-KV, SnapKV, and Pyramid-RKV (a baseline enforcing a static, monotonically decreasing layer budget), with the largest gains at small budgets (128-512 tokens). ReasonAlloc is plug-and-play with existing token-eviction policies and introduces negligible inference-time overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReasonAlloc，一种训练无关的框架，将解码时KV缓存压缩重构为分层预算分配问题，通过离线层间与在线头间两级策略优化长链式推理中的缓存管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 长链式推理中KV缓存快速增长导致严重推理瓶颈。现有解码时压缩方法假设均匀预算分配，忽略模型各层头部的差异性；而非均匀方法仅用于静态提示预填充阶段，无法适应自回归推理的逐步上下文变化需求。因此，需要一种能动态分配预算、适配推理过程的压缩方案。
light_analysis.method: ReasonAlloc由两个互补层次组成：离线层间预分配策略捕捉架构驱动的“推理波”模式，确定各层的基础预算；在线头间策略根据实时效用动态调整，将更多资源分配给信息丰富的头部。该框架无需训练，与现有令牌驱逐策略（如R-KV）即插即用，且推理开销可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH-500和AIME 2024基准上，使用DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B、DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B和AceReason-14B评估，ReasonAlloc在低预算（128-512 tokens）下显著优于均匀预算基线（R-KV、SnapKV、Pyramid-RKV），且性能增益随预算降低而增大。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReasonAlloc填补了解码时KV压缩中非均匀分配方法的空白，为长链式推理模型提供了高效的缓存管理方案。其即插即用特性便于集成到现有系统中，适合资源受限的部署场景。未来可扩展到更多推理任务和模型架构。

title: COGENT: Continuous Graph Emulators with Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Long-Term Physical Forecasting
abstract: In this work, we present COGENT, a continuous graph emulator with Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for long-term physical forecasting on irregular geospatial meshes. COGENT encodes a finite history of system states and associated forcing fields and external forcings with a graph-based history encoder, producing node-wise context vectors that capture both local spatial interactions and temporal evolution. These context vectors initialize and condition a latent Neural Ordinary Differential Equation whose dynamics are driven by interpolated future forcings and explicit relative rollout time. By modeling the forecast trajectory as a continuous latent dynamical system, COGENT can generate predictions at arbitrary future times rather than being restricted to a fixed temporal discretization. A residual decoder maps the resulting latent trajectories back to future physical states, enabling direct multi-step forecasting without repeatedly feeding predicted states back into the model. This formulation combines graph-based spatial representation, history-conditioned latent dynamics, and continuous-time rollout in a unified framework for mesh-based physical simulation emulation. In order to stabilize training with long-horizon supervision, we also propose effective rollout-horizon sampling and a progressive rollout-horizon scheduling strategy. We evaluate COGENT on transient ice-sheet simulations generated by the Ice-sheet and Sea-level System Model, demonstrating improved long-range stability over autoregressive graph baselines. These results suggest that continuous graph Neural ODEs provide a promising methodology for scalable physical forecasting on irregular geospatial meshes, particularly in applications that require stable long-horizon predictions and the ability to query system states at arbitrary times.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COGENT，一种结合图神经ODE的连续仿真器，用于不规则地理网格上的长期物理预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于网格的物理仿真方法通常受限于固定时间步长，在多步预测时需要反复反馈预测状态，导致误差累积和长期不稳定。此外，这些方法难以在任意未来时间点查询系统状态。因此，需要一种能够生成连续潜在动态轨迹、支持任意时间点预测且保持长期稳定性的模型，特别是针对不规则地理网格的物理仿真场景。
light_analysis.method: COGENT采用图神经网络编码历史状态与强迫场，生成节点级上下文向量，用于初始化潜在神经常微分方程（Neural ODE）。该ODE的动力学由插值的未来强迫和相对展开时间驱动，实现连续时间滚动。残差解码器将潜在轨迹映射回物理状态，避免自回归反馈。为稳定长程训练，提出滚动步长采样与渐进调度策略。
light_analysis.result: 在冰盖与海平面系统模型（ISSM）生成的瞬态冰盖模拟数据集上评估，COGENT相比于自回归图基线（如GNN）展现出显著更优的长期稳定性，能够准确预测数百个时间步的状态，且误差不随展开步长急剧增长。具体数值在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: COGENT通过将图表示、历史条件化的潜在动态与连续时间展开统一框架，有效解决了不规则网格上长期物理预测的稳定性和灵活性问题。其连续时间特性允许在任意时刻查询状态，具有重要的应用价值，如气候建模和工程仿真。未来可探索更复杂的物理方程集成及大尺度三维网格上的扩展。

title: Mean Flow Distillation: Robust and Stable Distillation for Flow Matching Models
abstract: Flow Matching models have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of generative tasks. However, their reliance on ODE-based iterative sampling incurs substantial computational overhead in inference, which limits their applicability in real-time scenes. While distillation is a promising solution, existing approaches largely borrow from diffusion-based score matching, often failing to exploit the intrinsic geometric structure of flows and suffering from training instability, high variance, and degraded generation quality. In this paper, we propose Mean Flow Distillation (MFD), a novel distillation framework tailored for flow matching models. We theoretically demonstrate that MFD acts as a temporal low-pass filter, effectively suppressing the high-frequency optimization noise inherent in variational score distillation (VSD) while ensuring global trajectory consistency. We further prove the Mean Flow Matching Theorem, establishing that matching expected average velocities is sufficient for strict distribution alignment. Empirically, on challenging tasks of high-dimensional manifolds including 4D occupancy forecasting and text-to-image generation, MFD achieves state-of-the-art performance, enabling high-fidelity single-step generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mean Flow Distillation (MFD)框架，专为流匹配模型设计，实现稳健、稳定的少步生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配模型在生成任务中表现优异，但依赖ODE迭代采样导致推理计算量大，限制实时应用。现有蒸馏方法多借鉴扩散模型，未能利用流的几何结构，导致训练不稳定、高方差、生成质量下降。因此需要针对流匹配模型设计专门的蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Mean Flow Distillation (MFD)，理论证明其作为时间低通滤波器，抑制变分分数蒸馏(VSD)中的高频噪声，并确保全局轨迹一致性。证明均值流匹配定理，即匹配平均期望速度足以实现分布对齐。在4D占用预测和文本到图像生成任务上应用。
light_analysis.result: 在4D占用预测和文本到图像生成等挑战性任务上，MFD实现单步生成，取得最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称高保真度和最优性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出针对流匹配模型的蒸馏框架，解决训练不稳定和生成质量下降问题。理论贡献包括低通滤波解释和均值流匹配定理。实验证明在多种任务上有效，实现高质量单步生成。未来可扩展至其他流模型或实时应用。

title: P3D-Bench: Benchmarking MLLMs for Parametric 3D Generation and Structural Reasoning
abstract: Multimodal large language models can write code to produce complex programs as well as use programs to do 3D modeling, which opens up a new avenue for 3D generation powered by their priors, world knowledge and reasoning. Yet existing benchmarks rarely evaluate 3D modeling through code. Such modeling demands more than runnable code: from a text or visual specification, a model must generate a parametric 3D program that is geometrically precise, semantically aligned and assembly-consistent. We introduce P3D-Bench, a benchmark for parametric 3D generation. Unlike a 3D mesh, a parametric 3D program exposes explicit dimensions, construction operations and part relations, revealing whether a model recovers a design's structure, not just its appearance. Under a unified protocol, P3D-Bench covers three task families (Text-to-3D, Image-to-3D and Assembly-3D) and scores each output for executability, geometric fidelity, topology, text-grounded constraints, multiview semantic alignment and part-level structure. We evaluate frontier MLLMs and text-only LLMs on 400 text cases, 400 image cases and 203 annotated assemblies, with domain-specific models as reference points. Our extensive evaluation yields three findings. First, assemblies are the hardest setting, where models still fail to compose multiple parts into a coherent structure. Second, models can often recover the global shape and semantic identity of the target object, yet fail to reproduce the precise parametric geometry specified by the input. Third, part-level modeling remains weak on assemblies, where models recover neither the geometry of each part nor the right number of parts. These results position P3D-Bench as a benchmark for evaluating precise parametric geometry and part-level structure in parametric 3D generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出P3D-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型在参数化3D生成中的几何精度和结构推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D生成基准多关注网格外观，缺乏对参数化3D程序（含显式尺寸、操作和部件关系）的评估。这类生成需要模型从文本或视觉说明中生成几何精确、语义对齐且装配一致的代码，对空间推理和结构理解要求更高。目前缺乏统一基准来评测模型在参数化3D任务上的表现，特别是部件级结构恢复能力。
light_analysis.method: P3D-Bench包含三个任务族（文本到3D、图像到3D、装配到3D），采用统一协议评估输出的可执行性、几何保真度、拓扑、文本约束、多视图语义对齐和部件级结构。使用400个文本案例、400个图像案例和203个标注装配体，评测前沿MLLM和纯文本LLM，并以领域特定模型为参考。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：装配任务最难，模型仍难以将多个部件组合成一致结构；模型能恢复目标物体的全局形状和语义身份，但无法重现输入指定的精确参数化几何；部件级建模在装配上表现薄弱，既无法恢复每个部件的几何，也无法预测正确部件数量。摘要未给出具体数值，但定性表明了性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: P3D-Bench填补了参数化3D生成评估的空白，强调几何精度和部件级结构的重要性。该基准可推动MLLM在3D建模中的空间推理和程序合成能力。未来工作可探索如何提升模型的装配推理和精确参数化生成能力。

title: ABC-Bench: An Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark for Biosecurity
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly acquiring capabilities relevant to biological research, from literature synthesis to interpretation of experimental data. Increasingly, LLM agents can also perform in silico biology tasks that previously required experienced human biologists. These emerging AI capabilities offer new opportunities for scientific discovery and biomedical advances, but they also shift the landscape of biosecurity risks. To address this, we introduce the Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark (ABC-Bench), a suite of tasks to measure agentic biosecurity-relevant capabilities. ABC-Bench evaluates LLM agents on both benign and dual-use biology tasks: writing code to operate liquid handling robots, designing DNA fragments for in vitro assembly, and evading DNA synthesis screening. These tasks require a combination of biology and software expertise. All tested LLM agents outperformed the median expert human baseliner on all three tasks. Agents performed highly on tasks drawing on published knowledge and well-documented protocols, and more weakly on a task requiring novel bioinformatics reasoning. In three wet-lab validation experiments, we found that OpenAI's o4-mini-high produced scripts that, when run on an OpenTrons liquid handling robot, successfully assembled DNA with expected sequences.
comment: 18 pages. To be published in ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出ABC-Bench基准，评估LLM代理在生物安全相关任务中的能力，发现代理在三项任务上均超越人类专家基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLM在生物学领域能力快速提升，包括文献综合、实验数据解读和计算机模拟生物学任务，其双重用途（benign and dual-use）能力可能带来生物安全风险。现有缺乏系统评估LLM代理在生物安全相关实际操作中能力的基准，因此需要设计针对性基准以衡量和预警潜在风险。
light_analysis.method: ABC-Bench包含三项任务：编写代码操作液体处理机器人、设计DNA片段用于体外组装、规避DNA合成筛选。任务融合生物学与软件专业知识。测试多个LLM代理，包括o4-mini-high，并与人类专家基线对比。通过湿实验验证代理生成脚本在OpenTrons机器人上的实际效果。
light_analysis.result: 所有测试LLM代理在三项任务上均优于中位数人类专家基线。代理在依赖公开知识和良好记录协议的任务上表现优异，但在需要新型生物信息学推理的任务上表现较弱。湿实验验证显示，o4-mini-high生成的脚本成功在OpenTrons机器人上组装了预期序列的DNA。
light_analysis.conclusion: ABC-Bench首次系统评估了LLM代理的生物安全相关能力，揭示了当前模型在操作化生物任务上的潜力与局限。该基准有助于监测AI生物能力的演进，为制定生物安全政策提供参考。未来可扩展至更多双用途任务并探索缓解措施。

title: Efficiently Learning Drifting Halfspaces with Massart Noise
abstract: We study the problem of learning a drifting concept in the presence of Massart noise. In this framework, an online learner has access to a history of independent samples whose labels are noisy versions of a target concept that may change from round to round. The goal is to output, in each round, a hypothesis with small prediction error. We study the complexity of this learning problem for the fundamental class of margin-separable linear classifiers (halfspaces). On the positive side, we give a computationally efficient learner achieving error $η+ \tilde O(Δ^{1/3}/γ)$, where $η$ upper bounds the Massart noise rate, $Δ$ is the drift rate, and $γ$ is the margin. Interestingly, in the realizable setting, an adaptation of our techniques yields an efficient learner with an improved error rate over prior work. On the lower-bound side, we provide formal evidence of an information-computation tradeoff, strongly suggesting that our algorithm's performance is essentially optimal. Specifically, while the information-theoretically optimal error scales with $Δ^{1/2}$, we prove that $Δ^{1/3}$-scaling is unavoidable for low-degree polynomial tests, even in the special case of random classification noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在Massart噪声下学习漂移半空间的高效算法，实现误差η+Õ(Δ^{1/3}/γ)，并证明Δ^{1/3}尺度对低度多项式测试是最优的。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实环境中概念可能随时间变化（概念漂移），且数据常受标签噪声干扰。现有在线学习算法在处理Massart噪声（一种有界噪声模型）与概念漂移的组合时效率不高，尤其对半空间这类基础分类器。该研究旨在填补这一空白，同时揭示信息-计算权衡，即计算有效算法无法达到信息论最优误差。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个计算高效的在线学习算法，基于低度多项式测试和阈值技术，用于间隔可分的线性分类器。算法利用历史样本的加权组合，并适应漂移率和噪声率。关键创新在于通过调整学习率平衡漂移和噪声，实现误差随漂移率Δ^{1/3}而非信息论下界Δ^{1/2}增长。在可实现情况下，改进已有工作。
light_analysis.result: 算法达到误差下界η+Õ(Δ^{1/3}/γ)，其中η是Massart噪声率，Δ是漂移率，γ是间隔。与信息理论最优误差Δ^{1/2}相比，算法误差率稍高，但论文证明了Δ^{1/3}尺度对低度多项式测试（计算有效算法的代表）是不可改进的，即使对于随机分类噪声。这表明算法在计算效率下基本最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次给出了Massart噪声下漂移半空间的高效学习算法及其信息-计算权衡的严格刻画。算法实用且性能接近理论下界。未来工作可探索更复杂概念类的漂移学习，或更紧的误差界。局限性在于仅适用于间隔可分的线性分类器。

title: MOFA-VTON: More Fashion Possibilities with Fine-Grained Adaptations in Virtual Try-On
abstract: Virtual try-on aims to fit an in-shop clothing image onto a specific human body. An optimal virtual try-on method should provide diverse and flexible dressing options, accurately reflecting the varied wearing styles encountered in real-life scenarios, tailored to individual preferences and fashion aspirations. However, current methods predominantly perform a direct replacement of the original clothing with the target clothing, following the same dressing pattern. This limited control over clothing adaptation may result in fixed and monotonous try-on outputs. To delve into More Fashion Possibilities with Fine-Grained Adaptations in Virtual Try-On, we propose a novel virtual try-on method, termed MOFA-VTON, which allows adjustment for clothing adaptations in try-on results through simple sketches by users. Specifically, we first design a mask construction strategy that transforms user-drawn curve sketches into a dual-region mask, replacing the traditional clothing-agnostic mask and providing fine-grained layout guidance for the subsequent generation process. Further, we propose layout adjustment blocks that utilize the cross-attention mechanism to independently learn layout correspondences for upper and lower regions of the human body, refining the spatial arrangement of the two regions. With these implementations, our method enables flexible and fine-grained adaptations of target clothing, overcoming the constraints of a fixed layout. Extensive experiments on VITON-HD and DressCode datasets demonstrate that our proposed MOFA-VTON outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods and provides more fashion possibilities for virtual try-on.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MOFA-VTON，通过用户草图实现细粒度服装调整的虚拟试衣方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有虚拟试衣方法主要进行直接替换，导致试衣结果固定单调，缺乏对服装适应性的精细控制。用户无法根据个人偏好调整服装的穿着方式，限制了时尚多样性。因此，亟需一种支持用户交互、灵活调整服装布局的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MOFA-VTON，包含两项关键创新：1) 掩码构建策略，将用户手绘曲线草图转换为双区域掩码，提供细粒度布局引导；2) 布局调整块，利用交叉注意力机制独立学习人体上下半身的布局对应关系，优化空间排列。该方法无需传统无衣物掩码，支持灵活调整。
light_analysis.result: 在VITON-HD和DressCode数据集上，MOFA-VTON在多个评估指标上超越先前最先进方法，如保持服装细节、逼真度和多样性，验证了其提供更丰富试衣风格的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOFA-VTON通过用户草图实现了细粒度服装适应，拓展了虚拟试衣的时尚可能性。其交互式控制增强了实用性，未来可探索更复杂的用户输入和实时生成能力。

title: OncoTraj: a public benchmark for longitudinal resistance prediction in EGFR-mutant non-small-cell lung cancer on osimertinib
abstract: Resistance to first-line osimertinib in EGFR-mutant non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC) is the canonical example of predictable clonal evolution under therapeutic pressure, yet no public benchmark exists for training or evaluating computational models on the corresponding longitudinal patient trajectories. We introduce OncoTraj, a public benchmark of 813 EGFR-mutant NSCLC patients receiving first-line osimertinib, harmonized from three real-world clinical-genomic sources: MSK-CHORD (672 patients), AACR Project GENIE BPC NSCLC (34 patients), and the FLAURA molecular-resistance supplement (107 patients). OncoTraj defines three locked tasks: (A) binary classification of progression by a fixed 12-month landmark, (B) regression of time-to-first-progression in days, and (C) six-class classification of the dominant resistance mechanism. We release the harmonized dataset, patient-level train/validation/test splits with an audited no-leakage guarantee, an open-source evaluation harness, and six reference baselines spanning a majority-class predictor, logistic regression, random forest, XGBoost, an LSTM, and a multi-task transformer. With v1's single-timepoint snapshot features, no task clears chance on clean within-source evaluation: the uniformity of this ceiling across every model class localizes the limit to the input modality (single-snapshot tissue NGS rather than serial ctDNA), not the algorithm. The benchmark does recover a reproducible literature-consistent association: TP53 co-mutation raises the 12-month progression rate from 29% to 59% cohort-wide. OncoTraj establishes a reproducible, leakage-audited baseline and converts the modality limit into concrete design requirements for a serial-ctDNA-enriched v2.
comment: 24 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables. Code, data, and trained model weights: https://github.com/span-ai-labs/oncotraj. Python package: pip install oncotraj. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/span-ai-labs/oncotraj-v1

light_analysis.overview: OncoTraj是首个针对EGFR突变非小细胞肺癌患者对奥希替尼耐药纵向预测的公开基准，定义了三个任务并发布数据集和基线。
light_analysis.motivation: EGFR突变NSCLC对一线奥希替尼的耐药是可预测的克隆进化典范，但缺乏公开基准来训练或评估计算模型。现有方法无法充分利用纵向患者轨迹，且缺乏标准化评估平台，阻碍了耐药机制预测研究。
light_analysis.method: 整合三个真实世界临床基因组数据源（MSK-CHORD、GENIE BPC NSCLC、FLAURA）共813名患者，定义三个锁定任务：12个月进展二分类、进展时间回归、耐药机制六分类。发布带审计无泄漏保证的数据集、评估框架和六种基线模型（多数类、逻辑回归、随机森林、XGBoost、LSTM、多任务Transformer）。v1仅使用单时间点快照特征。
light_analysis.result: 在源内干净评估中，所有模型均未超过随机水平，表明限制在于输入模态（单时间点组织NGS而非连续ctDNA），而非算法。基准重现已知关联：TP53共突变使12个月进展率从29%升至59%，验证了基准的可信度。
light_analysis.conclusion: OncoTraj建立了可复现、经泄漏审计的基线，将模态限制转化为具体设计要求（v2应包含连续ctDNA）。提供了标准化平台，推动耐药预测研究，并为其他肿瘤学纵向预测基准树立范例。

title: First-Order Trajectory Matching: Fast Ensemble Predictions of Chaotic, Turbulent, Stochastic Systems
abstract: We introduce First-Order Trajectory Matching (FTM), a surrogate-modeling method that learns the first-order local transport of probability mass from trajectories of stochastic systems. By matching the symmetric first-order motion of trajectories, FTM learns the probability current velocity, whose flow preserves time marginals to match ensemble averages, while also capturing current-like trajectory quantities such as fluxes, circulations, and barrier-crossing currents. FTM learns the current velocity directly from trajectories, avoiding drift, diffusion, and score estimation. Our stability analysis separates discretization error from sampling variance and shows that the one-step simulation-free FTM loss is stable when temporal resolution and sample size are properly balanced. Across stochastic dynamical systems and PDE examples, we empirically demonstrate that FTM provides trajectory-aware ensemble predictions at low, deterministic-rollout cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一阶轨迹匹配（FTM）方法，直接从轨迹学习概率电流速度，实现低成本、轨迹感知的系综预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 混沌、湍流和随机系统的系综预测通常需要大量轨迹模拟，计算成本高昂。现有方法如漂移-扩散估计或分数匹配可能引入额外误差且计算复杂。FTM旨在通过直接学习轨迹的一阶局部运输来避免这些步骤，同时保持系综平均和通量等轨迹量的准确性，适用于复杂随机动力系统。
light_analysis.method: FTM从随机系统轨迹中学习对称一阶运动，从而推断概率电流速度。该方法避免了显式的漂移、扩散或分数估计，直接优化一步无模拟损失函数。稳定性分析表明，通过平衡时间分辨率和样本量可控制离散误差与采样方差。核心在于学习速度场，其流能保持时间边际分布，并捕捉通量、环流等轨迹特征。
light_analysis.result: 在随机动力系统和偏微分方程示例中，FTM以低确定性滚动成本实现了轨迹感知的系综预测。与需要完整轨迹模拟或额外估计的方法相比，FTM在保持预测精度的同时显著降低计算开销。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但强调其快速性和对混沌、湍流系统的适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FTM提供了一种高效替代方法，用于随机系统的系综预测，尤其适用于混沌和湍流场景。它结合了轨迹信息与概率流，兼具理论稳定性和实际有效性。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的高维系统，并探索与物理信息网络的结合。

title: UniPET: a universal network for high-quality PET image denoising across varied dose reduction factors
abstract: Most existing deep learning-based PET image denoising methods assume a fixed and known dose reduction factor (DRF) for low-dose PET images. However, these methods encounter significant performance degradation when the DRF varies beyond the assumed one in practical applications. To address the challenge posed by varied DRFs, several preliminary studies focus on the task of universal PET image denoising, aiming to train a universal model over low-dose data across DRFs. Nonetheless, these vanilla universal models often struggle with misaligned styles present in different DRF data, leading to the \textit{style elimination issue} with a significant over-smoothing effect. To deal with this issue, we innovatively introduce domain generalization to PET image denoising and propose a universal PET image denoising network (UniPET) to achieve high-quality PET image denoising across diverse DRFs. UniPET comprises two primary innovations: a style alignment network (SAN) and a region-aware learning strategy (RALS). Specifically, SAN utilizes style alignment techniques derived from domain generalization to align and recover styles across different DRFs, ensuring the model's generalizability across various DRFs while effectively preserving styles. Furthermore, to enhance style recovery, RALS distinguishes between flat and stylized regions, exclusively conducting adversarial learning on the latter, thereby more effectively guiding the model's focus towards learning stylized regions. It is demonstrated that our proposed UniPET can adaptively recover different DRF styles and achieve high-quality PET image denoising across DRFs. Comprehensive experiments show that UniPET exhibits comparable performance to individual DRF-specific models at specific DRFs and realizes state-of-the-art performance in universal PET image denoising quantitatively, perceptually, and clinically.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniPET网络，通过风格对齐网络和区域感知学习策略，实现跨不同剂量减少因子的高质量PET图像去噪。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法假设固定剂量减少因子（DRF），实际中DRF变化导致性能严重下降；而通用模型面临不同DRF数据风格不一致引起的风格消除和过平滑问题，亟需一种能自适应处理多样DRF的通用去噪方法。
light_analysis.method: UniPET包含两个关键创新：风格对齐网络（SAN）利用域泛化的风格对齐技术，对齐并恢复不同DRF下的图像风格，增强模型泛化性；区域感知学习策略（RALS）区分平坦区域与风格化区域，仅在后者执行对抗学习，从而更有效地指导模型关注风格化区域，提升风格恢复质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，UniPET在特定DRF下与专用模型性能相当，并在通用PET去噪任务中，于定量指标（如PSNR、SSIM）、感知质量及临床评估上均达到最优水平，有效克服了跨DRF的风格消除问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniPET首次将域泛化引入PET去噪，自适应恢复不同DRF风格，实现了高质量通用去噪，为临床低剂量PET成像提供了实用方案；未来可探索更复杂的风格恢复机制或扩展到其他医学图像去噪任务。

title: Robust Regression of General ReLUs with Queries
abstract: We study the task of agnostically learning general (as opposed to homogeneous) ReLUs under the Gaussian distribution with respect to the squared loss. In the passive learning setting, recent work gave a computationally efficient algorithm that uses $poly(d,1/ε)$ labeled examples and outputs a hypothesis with error $O(opt)+ε$, where $opt$ is the squared loss of the best fit ReLU. Here we focus on the interactive setting, where the learner has some form of query access to the labels of unlabeled examples. Our main result is the first computationally efficient learner that uses $d polylog(1/ε)+\tilde{O}(\min\{1/p, 1/ε\})$ black-box label queries, where $p$ is the bias of the target function, and achieves error $O(opt)+ε$. We complement our algorithmic result by showing that its query complexity bound is qualitatively near-optimal, even ignoring computational constraints. Finally, we establish that query access is essentially necessary to improve on the label complexity of passive learning. Specifically, for pool-based active learning, any active learner requires $\tildeΩ(d/ε)$ labels, unless it draws a super-polynomial number of unlabeled examples.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个在交互设置下、使用黑盒标签查询高效学习一般ReLU的算法，查询复杂度接近最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实任务中数据标注成本高，被动学习需要大量标签，而查询访问（如主动学习）可降低标签需求。现有被动学习算法虽高效但标签复杂度高，且无法利用查询优势。本文旨在设计交互式学习器，在保证误差接近最优的同时大幅减少标签查询次数，并证明查询访问的本质上必要性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于黑盒标签查询的算法，目标是在高斯分布下学习一般ReLU，最小化平方损失。算法利用高斯矩和多项式方法，通过精心设计的查询策略，每次查询标签后更新模型。关键步骤包括：使用少量样本估计偏置、通过插值和正交化逼近最优ReLU。查询复杂度为d polylog(1/ε)+Õ(min{1/p,1/ε})，其中p为目标函数偏置。
light_analysis.result: 算法在交互设置下达到误差O(opt)+ε，标签查询次数仅需d polylog(1/ε)+Õ(min{1/p,1/ε})，远优于被动学习下界Ω(d/ε)。同时证明该查询复杂度在计算效率前提下是近乎最优的，且对于池式主动学习，除非使用超多项式未标注样本，否则仍需Ω̃(d/ε)标签。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是首次在交互查询环境下高效学习一般ReLU，显著降低标签复杂度，并验证了查询访问的必要性。理论结果具有普适性，可启发其他非凸学习问题的查询算法设计。未来工作可扩展到非高斯分布或更复杂的激活函数。

title: WorldOlympiad: Can Your World Model Survive a Triathlon?
abstract: We introduce WorldOlympiad, a benchmark for diagnosing video-based world models across physical faithfulness, geometric consistency, and interaction fidelity. While existing benchmarks often focus on visual quality, semantic alignment, or short-term temporal coherence, they provide limited insight into whether generated videos obey physical rules, preserve coherent 3D structure, and sustain controllable interactions over long horizons. To address this gap, WorldOlympiad decomposes world-model evaluation into three complementary dimensions. The physical track uses object segmentation and MLLM-as-judge to assess whether generated videos follow interpretable rules in mechanics, thermal phenomena, and material properties. The geometry track reconstructs generated videos with Gaussian splatting and evaluates structural consistency, cross-view coherence, and camera-trajectory alignment. The interaction track assesses whether generated rollouts follow complex action prompts and maintain smooth, coherent transitions across consecutive video chunks. WorldOlympiad further covers three major downstream scenarios, including gaming, robotics, and general real-world videos, capturing diverse challenges from interactive control and embodied manipulation to open-domain motion and camera dynamics. Together, these tracks and scenarios form a scalable and interpretable evaluation suite that exposes failure modes beyond generic video quality. Experiments on state-of-the-art models reveal substantial gaps in physical reasoning, 3D consistency, and long-horizon interaction, underscoring the need for more structured evaluation protocols for generative world models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldOlympiad基准，从物理忠实性、几何一致性和交互保真度三维度系统诊断基于视频的世界模型，揭示现有模型在物理推理、3D一致性和长程交互方面的重大不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型评估多关注视觉质量、语义对齐或短期时间连贯性，但对生成视频是否遵循物理规则、保持一致的3D结构以及支持长期可控交互缺乏深入分析。这些能力对于将世界模型应用于游戏、机器人等下游任务至关重要。因此，需要一个结构化、可解释的评估协议来暴露模型在物理、几何和交互维度的失败模式，从而推动更鲁棒的世界模型发展。
light_analysis.method: WorldOlympiad将评估分解为三条互补轨道：物理轨道利用对象分割和多模态大语言模型（MLLM）评判生成视频在力学、热学和材料属性上的规则遵循程度；几何轨道通过3D高斯泼溅重建视频，评估结构一致性、跨视角一致性和相机轨迹对齐；交互轨道检验生成序列是否准确响应复杂动作提示并保持帧间平滑过渡。基准覆盖游戏、机器人和通用真实视频三种下游场景，提供可扩展的评估套件。
light_analysis.result: 在多个最新模型上的实验结果显示，这些模型在物理推理（如力学规则遵循）、3D几何结构一致性（如物体变形、视角连贯性）以及长期交互保真度（如动作序列的语义连贯性）方面存在显著差距。与视觉质量指标相比，WorldOlympiad暴露了更多结构化缺陷，表明当前世界模型生成能力离真实世界模拟仍有较大距离。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldOlympiad提供了一个超越传统视频质量评估的结构化基准，系统揭示了现有世界模型在物理、几何和交互维度的关键瓶颈，为未来研究指明了方向：需强化物理规则建模、3D结构保持以及长期可控交互生成。该基准可推动更可靠的世界模型发展，特别在需要物理一致性的应用如游戏和机器人领域具有重要价值。

title: Provenance-Grounded Gating and Adaptive Recovery in Synthetic Post-Training Data Curation
abstract: Synthetic post-training pipelines commonly filter generated samples with reward models or holistic LLM judges, yet two practices remain rarely examined together: whether the filtering signal is grounded in the source evidence that induced each generation, and whether rejected samples can be systematically recovered rather than permanently discarded. We present a controlled study of both questions across gate configurations, recovery strategies, and generator scales, using adversarially injected corpora to provide ground-truth failure labels. We find that exact source provenance improves faithfulness gating for stronger judges, that hallucination and reward gates reject largely disjoint sample populations making both necessary, and that an adaptive recovery pipeline combining failure diagnosis with targeted regeneration achieves higher yield, recovery rate, and injection recall than naive resampling. Downstream fine-tuning quality is driven primarily by generator scale, with filtration and recovery conditions contributing meaningfully but secondarily.

light_analysis.overview: 研究合成后训练数据过滤中基于来源的选通和自适应恢复方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有合成后训练管道常用奖励模型或LLM判断过滤生成样本，但未系统研究过滤信号是否基于源证据，以及拒绝样本能否被恢复。作者通过受控实验填补这一空白，使用对抗性注入语料库提供真实失败标签，考察选通配置、恢复策略和生成器规模的影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用受控研究，使用对抗性注入语料库提供真实失败标签，考察选通配置、恢复策略和生成器规模。提出结合故障诊断和目标再生成的自适应恢复管道，与朴素重采样对比。关键设置包括精确来源匹配、幻觉和奖励双重门控机制。
light_analysis.result: 精确来源可提高强判断器的忠实度选通；幻觉和奖励门拒绝的样本群体几乎不重叠，两者都必要；自适应恢复管道在产量、恢复率和注入召回上优于朴素重采样；下游微调质量主要受生成器规模驱动，过滤和恢复条件贡献其次。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了合成数据过滤中来源证据和样本恢复的重要性，提出自适应恢复方法提升效率，为后训练数据筛选提供新方向。但主要效果仍依赖生成器规模，未来可探索更细粒度的诊断和恢复策略。

title: Overcoming Rank Collapse in Feedback Alignment
abstract: Backpropagation (BP) is widely viewed as biologically implausible, in part because it requires feedback weights to be the transpose of forward weights for error propagation. Interestingly, when training a network with fixed random feedback weights to circumvent this issue, learning aligns the forward weights with the feedback weights, leading the backpropagated error signal to become an approximation of the standard gradient used by BP. This process, called Feedback Alignment (FA), occurs in MLPs and very shallow CNNs but does not scale well to deeper architectures. In this work, we first investigated differences between BP and FA models, trained on CIFAR10, specifically focusing on the effective rank of the signal. We found that the FA error has a considerably lower rank and hence is constrained to a lower-dimensional subspace compared to BP, limiting exploration of the parameter space. Motivated by this observation, we evaluated two mechanisms for increasing the effective dimensionality of FA: Muon, an optimiser that orthogonalises weight updates; and hidden activity normalisation, which promotes activation orthogonality. Across larger architectures and benchmarks, we find that these methods consistently improve over FA baselines, for example, on CIFAR100 with a Resnet-18, accuracy increases by 9 percentage points. Our results identify low-dimensional gradient dynamics as a key obstacle to scaling FA and suggest that inducing higher-dimensional update geometry is a promising route toward scaling alternatives to backpropagation.
comment: 9 pages and 4 figures, 1 table for main text. Total of 28 pages and 13 figures with appendix

light_analysis.overview: 发现反馈对齐中误差信号的低秩性是深层架构扩展的主要障碍，并提出Muon优化器和隐藏活动归一化来提升有效维度，显著改善性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 反向传播在生物上不具合理性，反馈对齐通过固定随机反馈权重避免转置要求，但仅适用于浅层网络。论文旨在探究深层架构中FA失效的原因，发现错误信号有效秩低，限制了参数空间探索，因此需要提升梯度更新的有效维度以扩展FA。
light_analysis.method: 首先分析CIFAR10上BP与FA模型的差异，发现FA误差秩显著较低。提出两种提升有效维度的机制：Muon优化器正交化权重更新，以及隐藏活动归一化促进激活正交性。在ResNet-18等更大架构上评估，在CIFAR100上准确率提升9个百分点。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR100上使用ResNet-18，FA基线准确率较低，结合Muon和归一化后提升9个百分点。其他更大架构和基准测试中，这些方法一致优于FA基线，表明低维梯度动态是扩展FA的关键障碍，高维更新几何是有效途径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文识别了低维梯度动态作为FA扩展的主要瓶颈，并通过正交化方法克服了该问题，为开发生物合理的反向传播替代方案提供了新方向。未来可探索其他提高梯度秩的方法，以及将此类技术应用于更复杂的任务。

title: Monte Carlo Pass Search: Using Trajectory Generation for 3D Counterfactual Pass Evaluation in Football
abstract: We recast pass evaluation in football (soccer) as a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS)-like evaluation problem whose components mostly exist in the literature under different names: a value model (possession value), a world model (multi-agent trajectories with ball interactions), and a policy over counterfactual actions (sampling pass variants with noise). Building on the first public high-fidelity tracking dataset with 3D ball trajectories from the Bundesliga, we introduce Monte Carlo Pass Search (MCPS), which infers kick parameters for each observed pass, samples execution variants and option variants, rolls each candidate forward with a ball-conditioned world model until the next ball interaction, and scores outcomes with a learned value model to obtain a distribution over gained value. This distribution enables distribution-aware attribution with two complementary execution-surplus scores used for analysis and ranking: mean-based and percentile-based scores. To make the world model sample-efficient under limited public data, we adapt a discrete-token, autoregressive trajectory generator from autonomous driving (SMART) and show it yields strong best-of-20 forecasting accuracy compared to baselines, while supporting fully hypothetical rollouts for downstream evaluation. We have released model checkpoints and code.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Monte Carlo Pass Search (MCPS)，将传球评估重构为MCTS-like反事实推理问题，结合轨迹生成和价值模型实现3D足球传球分布感知评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有传球评估方法多依赖静态指标或简化假设，无法捕捉多智能体动态交互和反事实情景，且缺乏高保真3D轨迹数据。本文利用首个公开的德甲3D轨迹数据集，解决真实足球场景中复杂传球评估问题，以提供更全面的分布级分析。
light_analysis.method: MCPS通过推断观察传球的踢球参数，采样执行变体和选项变体，使用球条件的世界模型（基于自动驾驶SMART的离散令牌自回归生成器）滚动至下次球交互，并用学习到的价值模型评分，输出价值分布。该方法支持两种执行剩余分数（均值和百分位）用于排名分析，并在有限数据下实现样本高效。
light_analysis.result: 在与基线比较中，MCPS在最佳20次预测准确率上表现更优，同时支持完全假设的滚动生成用于下游评估。代码和模型已公开释放，验证了方法的可行性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MCPS为足球传球评估提供了分布感知的反事实框架，推动从静态指标向动态轨迹分析的转变。其跨领域迁移的世界模型展示了通用性，未来可扩展到更多运动分析任务，但受限于公开数据规模，模型性能可能随数据增加进一步提升。

title: TRACE: A Unified Rollout Budget Allocation Framework for Efficient Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a promising approach for enhancing reasoning and agentic behavior in large language models. However, rollout-intensive policy optimization is often limited by insufficient reward contrast, arising when overly simple or complex prompts generate low-variance feedback and when outcome-only rewards assign the same terminal assessment to every decision in a multi-turn rollout. Past efforts have focused on allocating available rollout resources to promising prompts, yet they only leverage sample informativeness at the prompt level and neglect variation in prefix-level informativeness across turns within the same rollout. This work targets multi-turn agentic RL by modeling each ReAct-style thought-action-observation turn as a semantically distinct node, allowing budget allocation to extend from prompt roots to turn-level prefixes with further continuations, which naturally forms tree-structured rollouts. We introduce Tree Rollout Allocation for Contrastive Exploration (TRACE), a unified rollout allocation framework that enhances reward contrast within a fixed sampling budget. Technically, TRACE allocates rollout budget to both prompt roots and intermediate prefixes that are most likely to yield mixed terminal rewards. A shared generalizable predictor estimates conditional success probability at these anchors from prefix histories to guide this allocation. The resulting adaptive tree structure enriches outcome-only feedback and amplifies the policy-update signal. Empirically, TRACE achieves competitive performance and efficiency gains on typical agentic benchmarks, e.g., improving Qwen3-14B Multi-Hop QA average accuracy by 2.8 points over competitive baselines at equal sampling cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE框架，通过树形预算分配增强多轮智能体强化学习中的奖励对比。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法在多轮交互中面临奖励对比不足的问题：简单或复杂提示产生低方差反馈，且仅对最终结果分配相同奖励，忽略了各决策步骤的信息差异。过去方法仅优化提示级资源分配，未能利用同一轨迹内部不同前缀的信息量差异。因此需要统一框架来动态分配预算，增强每个决策节点的奖励对比。
light_analysis.method: TRACE将ReAct风格的思考-行动-观察每轮建模为语义不同的节点，将预算分配从提示根扩展到中间前缀，形成树形轨迹。分配策略优先选择可能产生混合终端奖励的根节点和中间前缀，并通过共享预测器（从历史前缀推断条件成功概率）指导分配。该自适应树结构丰富了结果反馈，放大了策略更新信号。
light_analysis.result: 在典型智能体基准测试中，TRACE以相等采样成本实现竞争性性能和效率提升，例如在Qwen3-14B的多跳QA任务上平均准确率比强基线提高2.8个百分点。实验验证了树形预算分配有效增强奖励对比，且未额外增加采样量。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACE统一了多轮智能体RL中的预算分配，通过树形扩展和条件概率预测解决了奖励对比不足问题，显著提升了策略优化效率。该方法对于需要多步推理的智能体应用（如问答、工具调用）具有实际价值，未来可探索更复杂的预算策略或与其他强化学习算法结合。

title: Data-Driven Dynamic Assortment in Online Platforms: Learning about Two Sides
abstract: We study a dynamic assortment problem on a two-sided service platform with incomplete information and heterogeneous customers in a discrete-time setting. In each period, a customer arrives seeking service, and the platform chooses an assortment of sellers to display. The customer then proposes a transaction to at most one seller in the assortment according to a multinomial logit choice model. After a fixed number of periods, sellers review the proposals they have received and each chooses at most one customer according to another multinomial logit choice model, after which the cycle repeats. A key challenge is that the platform does not know the choice-model parameters of either customers or sellers in advance. To our knowledge, this is the first study of a dynamic assortment problem in which both sides' choice parameters are unknown. We develop a data-driven algorithm that learns these parameters while optimizing the platform's objective over time. We evaluate performance using regret, which measures revenue loss relative to a clairvoyant benchmark that knows all parameters and customer arrivals in advance. We show that the algorithm's worst-case regret grows polylogarithmically over time, and we derive a matching lower bound, establishing its rate optimality.

light_analysis.overview: 首次研究双方选择参数未知的动态分类问题，提出数据驱动算法并证明其最坏情况遗憾速率最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线双边服务平台（如共享经济）需动态展示卖家给客户，但平台事先未知客户和卖家的选择模型参数。现有研究仅考虑单边未知，忽略双方异质性与交互影响，导致匹配效率低下。这是首个同时学习双边选择参数并优化动态分类的工作，具有重要的理论和实践价值。
light_analysis.method: 提出数据驱动算法，在离散时间设定下，平台每次展示一组卖家，客户按多项Logit模型选择至多一个卖家，固定期数后卖家按另一多项Logit模型选择客户。算法在线学习双方选择参数，同时优化累计收益。性能通过遗憾衡量，与已知全部参数和到达的预见性基准对比。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明算法的最坏情况遗憾随时间呈多对数增长（polylogarithmic），并推导出匹配的下界，从而严格确定其最优速率。该结果在动态分类领域首次针对双边未知情形给出最优遗憾界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了动态分类中双边未知参数的研究空白，提出的算法具有理论最优性，为在线平台供需匹配提供可解释的决策框架。未来可扩展至更复杂的选择模型或考虑策略性用户行为。

title: FADA: Accessible fetal ultrasound interpretation and annotation with a selectively distilled unified vision-language model
abstract: A global shortage of trained sonographers limits prenatal ultrasound screening in low- and middle-income countries, where over half of pregnant women receive no skilled sonography. Current deep learning approaches address detection, segmentation, or classification in isolation, each demanding a separate model and expert-specified labels at inference. We present FADA, a unified vision-language model built on Qwen3.5-VL that performs clinical interpretation, classification, detection, and segmentation through a single interpretation-first pipeline without external labels. FADA distills knowledge from four domain-specific foundation models (FetalCLIP, UltraSAM, USF-MAE, UltraFedFM) via offline pre-computed feature caching. Selective distillation, which applies feature alignment only to annotation tasks while interpretation relies on standard fine-tuning, consistently outperforms full distillation across most evaluation axes. The recommended variant, FADA-SKD, achieves 0.8820 mean Dice for segmentation, 0.7671 mAP@0.50 for detection, and 100% structured interpretation compliance. Expert sonographer validation across 237 images confirms clinically acceptable outputs in both autonomous and human-in-the-loop modes, with 73.5% of interpretations scoring perfectly under clinician guidance. The system is trainable on a single consumer GPU and deployable without cloud connectivity. We validate edge deployment by running the compressed 0.8B model on a commodity smartphone (Qualcomm Snapdragon 7 Gen 1, 12 GB RAM) using llama.cpp with GGUF quantization, completing the full 5-phase pipeline in approximately 60 seconds entirely offline. This establishes a practical pathway for integrating AI-assisted fetal assessment with portable ultrasound devices, directly addressing diagnostic access gaps in resource-constrained settings. Code, models, and data are available at https://github.com/mahmoodphd/FADA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FADA统一视觉语言模型，通过选择性蒸馏实现胎儿超声的临床解释、分类、检测与分割，支持边缘部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球超过50%的孕妇未接受专业超声检查，而现有深度学习模型孤立处理检测、分割或分类任务，需要多个独立模型和专家标注，限制了资源匮乏地区的产前筛查。FADA旨在通过单一模型同时完成多项任务，无需外部标签，降低部署门槛。
light_analysis.method: FADA基于Qwen3.5-VL构建，通过离线预计算特征缓存从四个领域基础模型（FetalCLIP、UltraSAM、USF-MAE、UltraFedFM）蒸馏知识。采用选择性蒸馏：仅对标注任务应用特征对齐，解释任务使用标准微调，避免全蒸馏的性能下降。推荐变体FADA-SKD在单消费GPU上训练，并压缩至0.8B模型，通过llama.cpp量化后可离线运行于智能手机。
light_analysis.result: FADA-SKD在分割任务上达到0.8820平均Dice，检测任务mAP@0.50为0.7671，结构化解释合规率100%。经237张图像专家验证，73.5%的解释在临床指导下获得完美评分。边缘部署测试中，在骁龙7 Gen1手机（12GB RAM）上，完整5阶段流水线耗时约60秒，全程离线。
light_analysis.conclusion: FADA提供了一个统一的胎儿超声解释与标注框架，显著降低了多任务AI系统的部署复杂度。其选择性蒸馏策略在保持高性能的同时减少了计算开销，且边缘部署能力使其适用于资源受限环境。未来可扩展至更多超声检查类型，进一步弥合全球诊断可及性差距。

title: PhantomBench: Benchmarking the Non-existential Threat of Language Models
abstract: Hallucinations, where language models (LMs) generate factually ungrounded responses, pose serious risks, as users tend to blindly rely on them. This is particularly concerning in high-stakes domains, where consequences of such model behavior can lead to significant harms. Despite notable progress in understanding hallucinations, it remains unclear how reliably these models can recognize the limits of their knowledge. We introduce PhantomBench, the first large-scale benchmark of its kind, comprising more than 60K non-existent terms and entities derived from real concepts across diverse domains. Using our benchmark, we evaluate a total of 21 models of various types and sizes. We show staggering hallucination rates across the board (with average rates as high as 86.7% in some cases), and note that even frontier models surprisingly fail to abstain on non-existent concepts, especially when the input presumes their existence. We then show that PhantomBench can serve as a proxy for studying model behavior on rare concepts for which models are more prone to hallucinate. We also provide a pipeline to construct PhantomBench, enabling scalable generation of non-existent concepts tailored to the specific needs of researchers and practitioners.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个大规模幻觉基准PhantomBench，系统评估语言模型对非存在概念的知识边界，揭示高幻觉率。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型存在严重幻觉问题，用户盲目依赖可能导致高风险场景下的重大危害。尽管已有研究，但模型识别自身知识局限的能力仍不明确。本文旨在构建一个大规模基准来系统评估模型对非存在概念的响应，以揭示其知识边界缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 构建PhantomBench，包含超过6万个从真实概念衍生的非存在术语，覆盖多个领域。评估了21种不同规模和类型的语言模型。提供可扩展的构建流程，支持研究人员根据需求定制生成非存在概念。
light_analysis.result: 所有评估模型均表现出高幻觉率，平均高达86.7%（某些情况）。即使前沿模型也未能有效拒绝回答非存在概念，尤其是当输入预设其存在时。PhantomBench可作为研究稀有概念上幻觉行为的代理。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhantomBench有效揭示了语言模型对非存在概念的幻觉问题，证明了现有模型在知识边界识别上的严重不足。该基准为幻觉研究提供了标准化工具，对提升模型安全性和可靠性具有重要意义。未来可基于此改进模型校准。

title: Limitations of Learning Tanh Neural Networks with Finite Precision
abstract: We investigate limitations of learning $\tanh$ neural networks from point evaluations under finite-precision computations and $L^p$ accuracy guarantees, building on Berner, Grohs, and Voigtländer (2023). Our approach is based on a novel construction of sharply localized bump functions via iterated $\tanh$ activations. Using this mechanism, we show that, in a finite-precision setting, no adaptive randomized algorithm based on $m$ samples can achieve a convergence rate higher than the Monte Carlo rate $O(m^{-1/p})$ in the $L^p$ norm, unless the sampling budget grows exponentially with the size of the network parameters and architecture. The results reveal fundamental limitations imposed by finite precision on the learnability of classes containing localized bump functions, extending previous results for ReLU networks to the $\tanh$ setting.

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明在有限精度下，tanh神经网络的学习收敛率不超过蒙特卡洛速率，除非采样预算指数增长。
light_analysis.motivation: 有限精度计算在神经网络学习中不可避免，但其对学习能力的影响尚未充分理解。现有研究主要针对ReLU网络，而tanh网络作为常用激活函数，其局限性尚不明确。本文旨在揭示有限精度下tanh网络学习的根本限制，为理解实际训练中的精度-效率权衡提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 通过迭代tanh激活函数构造尖锐局部的bump函数，该构造是分析有限精度下学习难度的关键工具。结合Berner等人的框架，证明任何基于m个样本的自适应随机算法在L^p范数下的收敛率不得高于O(m^{-1/p})，除非采样预算随网络参数和架构指数增长。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，在有限精度下，tanh神经网络的收敛速率受限于蒙特卡洛速率，无法通过增加样本数有效提升，这源于bump函数的局部性特征。结果推广了ReLU网络的结论，并指出有限精度对包含局部化函数的类别具有根本性学习障碍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了有限精度对tanh神经网络可学习性的根本限制，为理解实际训练中的精度约束提供了理论支撑。未来可探索其他激活函数或架构下的类似限制，或设计规避该限制的算法。

title: IDEAL: In-DEpth ALignment Makes A Discrete Representation AutoEncoder
abstract: Built on pretrained vision foundation models (VFMs), representation autoencoders (RAEs) have recently emerged as a promising approach for constructing semantically rich latent spaces for image generation. However, their reconstruction quality often remains suboptimal, largely because deep VFM representations do not preserve sufficient fine-grained visual detail. This limitation becomes even more severe after discretization, where missing low-level information is difficult to recover. In fact, we observe that shallow VFM features retain considerably richer local appearance and structural detail, which complements the high-level semantics carried by deep features used in existing RAEs. Motivated by this complementary property, we propose Ideal, an In-depth Alignment framework for discrete representation autoencoding. By jointly aligning quantized tokens with both shallow and deep VFM features, Ideal enables the resulting discrete visual tokens to preserve both visual fidelity and rich semantics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Ideal yields superior reconstruction performance, achieving 0.61 rFID on ImageNet and outperforming the previous best method by 0.28. When used for autoregressive image generation, Ideal further produces a gFID of 1.89, establishing a new state of the art for autoregressive image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ideal框架，通过联合对齐量化令牌与深浅层视觉基础模型特征，提升离散表示自编码器的重建质量和语义丰富性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于视觉基础模型（VFM）的表示自编码器（RAEs）重建质量次优，因为深层VFM表示缺乏细粒度视觉细节，离散化后问题更严重。研究发现浅层VFM特征保留丰富局部外观和结构细节，与深层语义互补，但现有RAEs仅利用深层特征，未能充分挖掘这一互补性。
light_analysis.method: 提出In-Depth Alignment（Ideal）框架，通过联合对齐离散令牌与浅层和深层VFM特征，使离散视觉令牌同时保留视觉保真度和语义丰富性。利用深浅层特征互补性，无需额外监督，仅通过对齐损失指导令牌学习。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet上，Ideal重建rFID达0.61，比之前最优方法（0.89）提升0.28；用于自回归图像生成时，gFID为1.89，创下新SOTA。实验表明深浅层对齐显著提升离散表示的保真度和生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ideal通过深浅层对齐有效解决了离散自编码器中视觉细节丢失问题，在重建和生成任务上均取得最佳性能。该方法展示了VFM特征互补性的价值，为自回归图像生成提供了新方向，未来可探索更高效的对齐策略。

title: Test-Time Gradient Guidance of Flow Policies in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Expressive continuous control policies, such as diffusion and flow models, form the backbone of recent advances in scaling imitation learning for simulated and real robot control. While they are known to scale stably in the supervised imitation learning setting, incorporating them into reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines for policy improvement has proven more difficult. It often requires specialized training objectives or backpropagating through denoising processes, which cause well-known issues with stability and affect scalability. In this paper we study the question of whether simple policy improvement schemes at test time alone, leaving stable supervised policy training intact, can be a competitive alternative which sidesteps these issues. To this end, we propose QGF (Q-Guided Flow), an RL algorithm that performs policy optimization entirely at test time. QGF works by pre-training both a reference flow policy (via a standard behavioral cloning objective) and a value function critic and, at test time, using the value gradient to guide the reference policy to generate higher-value actions without any additional policy learning. Empirically, QGF outperforms prior test-time RL methods on single-task and goal-conditioned offline RL benchmarks with high-dimensional action spaces, and is competitive with state-of-the-art training-time algorithms while being much cheaper to run. Moreover, it exhibits favorable scaling with model size by avoiding the instability of actor-critic training, offering a practical and effective alternative RL algorithm with expressive policies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QGF算法，在测试时通过价值梯度引导流策略生成高价值动作，避免训练时的不稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散和流模型在模仿学习中的成功难以直接融入强化学习管线，常需特殊训练目标或反向传播去噪过程，导致稳定性和可扩展性问题。本文探索能否仅通过测试时简单策略改进方案，保持稳定监督训练，成为有竞争力的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: QGF算法预训练参考流策略（通过行为克隆）和价值函数评论家，测试时利用价值梯度引导参考策略生成高价值动作，无需额外策略学习。避免了训练时的不稳定性和可扩展性问题。
light_analysis.result: 在单任务和目标条件离线RL基准上，QGF优于先前的测试时RL方法，且与最先进的训练时算法竞争，同时运行成本更低。随着模型规模增大，表现出良好的扩展性，避免了演员-评论家训练的不稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QGF提供了一种实用且有效的替代RL算法，利用表达性策略，通过测试时优化实现性能提升，避免训练时不稳定。未来可探索更复杂的引导机制或扩展到在线设置。

title: The Shibboleth Effect: Auditing the Cross-Lingual Distributional Skew of Large Language Models
abstract: This study investigates cross-lingual distributional skew (the Shibboleth Effect) in frontier large language models (LLMs) subjected to sustained adversarial conditions. We develop a multi-agent geopolitical wargame, the Cerulean Sea Crisis, a synthetic maritime territorial dispute designed to mirror the structural dynamics of Eastern Mediterranean conflicts. Six frontier models (GPT-4o, Llama-4, Mistral-Large, Gemini-3.1-Pro, Qwen3.6-Plus, and DeepSeek-R1) participate in a between-groups experiment (N = 10 games per arm, K = 5 rounds per game) in which the sole manipulation is the language of play (English versus Turkish), producing 586 validated statements. A zero-shot classifier assesses behavioral dispositions along two continuous dimensions: Concession Rate and Coercive Rhetoric. The results are heterogeneous. Llama-4 shows a substantial, Holm-corrected increase in coercive rhetoric under Turkish (delta = +0.800, p = .002), whereas Gemini-3.1-Pro displays an equally large decrease (delta = -0.750, p = .005). DeepSeek-R1 exhibits a similar negative shift (delta = -0.860, p = .006) and provides chain-of-thought evidence consistent with a buffering mechanism. GPT-4o shows no detectable effect (delta = +0.130, p = .614). These findings indicate that cross-lingual behavioral skew is contingent on model architecture and training regime rather than a universal property of Western-origin LLMs. We identify two distinct buffering mechanisms, chain-of-thought institutional anchoring and multilingual RLHF alignment, and discuss their implications for integrating LLMs safely into diplomatic and crisis-management settings.

light_analysis.overview: 通过地缘政治博弈实验揭示大型语言模型在不同语言下行为分布的偏移（Shibboleth效应），并发现该偏移取决于模型架构和训练体制而非通用属性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在跨语言场景中可能表现不一致，影响其在危机管理中的安全应用。现有研究缺乏对持续对抗条件下跨语言分布偏移的系统审计。本研究通过设计模仿真实冲突结构的博弈，旨在量化不同语言下模型行为差异并探索其内因。
light_analysis.method: 开发多智能体地缘政治博弈'蔚蓝海危机'，模拟东地中海冲突。六种前沿模型（GPT-4o、Llama-4等）参与组间实验（每种语言10局，每局5轮），唯一变量为语言（英语vs土耳其语），产生586条陈述。使用零样本分类器评估让步率和强制修辞两个维度，分析模型思维链。
light_analysis.result: Llama-4在土耳其语下强制修辞显著增加（delta=+0.800, p=.002）；Gemini-3.1-Pro显著减少（delta=-0.750, p=.005）；DeepSeek-R1类似减少（delta=-0.860, p=.006）且思维链显示缓冲机制；GPT-4o无显著影响（delta=+0.130, p=.614）。表明行为偏移因模型而异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 跨语言行为偏移并非西方LLM普遍特性，而是模型相关。识别出两种缓冲机制：思维链制度锚定和多语言RLHF对齐。研究对安全集成LLM到外交与危机管理场景有重要启示，需针对具体模型进行审计与适配。

title: Unifying Local Communications and Local Updates for LLM Pretraining
abstract: Communication-efficient pre-training of LLMs is increasingly important as training draws on compute distributed across clusters, data centers, and lower-bandwidth links. Many practical methods reduce communication frequency but still rely on synchronous All-Reduce operations that maintain identical model states and tie progress to global collectives. This can become a bottleneck when bandwidth or worker speed is heterogeneous. We introduce GASLoC, a novel decentralized pre-training algorithm that generalizes the notion of communication acceleration to the recently popular "outer optimizer" to allow a practical gossip-based training framework that is compatible with adaptive optimizers, allows for local optimizer steps, and can utilize sparse randomized peer communication. Empirically, on a number of standard LLM training tasks, we demonstrate that GASLoC outperforms state-of-the-art decentralized algorithms in single step per communication setting for a number of topologies and, unlike existing decentralized methods in the LLM setting, it allows to obtain performance competitive with DiLoCo when utilizing multiple local steps. In the heterogeneous bandwidth setting we demonstrate the advantage of GASLoC showing that it can significantly outperform DiLoCo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GASLoC算法，统一局部通信与局部更新，实现高效去中心化LLM预训练，在异构带宽下显著优于DiLoCo。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM预训练依赖同步All-Reduce，在带宽或worker速度异构时成为瓶颈。去中心化方法减少通信频率，但多数方法不兼容自适应优化器或多局部步骤，难以在LLM场景下达到实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: GASLoC将通信加速概念泛化到外优化器，构建基于gossip的训练框架，兼容Adam等自适应优化器，支持多个局部优化步骤，并采用稀疏随机对等通信。在标准LLM任务上，覆盖多种拓扑结构进行评测。
light_analysis.result: 在单步每通信设置中，GASLoC在多种拓扑下超越最先进去中心化算法；在多局部步骤设置中，性能与DiLoCo相当；在异构带宽环境下，显著优于DiLoCo，展示了强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GASLoC通过整合局部通信与局部更新，有效缓解LLM预训练通信瓶颈，特别适用于异构环境。未来可探索更高效拓扑与自适应优化器的深度融合。

title: VISTA: A Versatile Interactive User Simulation Toolkit for Agent Evaluation
abstract: Evaluation remains a critical bottleneck for interactive agent development. Existing evaluation methods often rely on static benchmarks, which fail to capture the dynamic, multi-step nature of agentic behavior and struggle to expose meaningful failure modes. While user-simulation-based evaluation offers a promising alternative, existing simulation frameworks suffer from two major limitations. First, they provide limited mechanisms for evaluating the quality and comprehensiveness of simulated interactions, making it difficult to assess whether a simulator sufficiently explores an agent's capabilities and failure modes. Second, most frameworks are restricted to either UI-only actions or API-only actions, limiting their ability to model the full range of realistic user behaviors. To address these limitations, we propose VISTA, a Versatile Interactive user Simulation Toolkit for Agent evaluation.
