light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频生成中，KV缓存随视频长度线性增长，现有有界缓存方法（如局部窗口、压缩状态）对历史各部分赋予固定角色，忽略了时间依赖的衰减特性，导致长视频中细节与场景结构的不同保留需求未得到优化。
light_analysis.method: FadeMem引入距离感知的KV内存合并，将历史KV块按时间层次组织。基于频率依赖衰减：细节快速去相关，粗结构长期有用。新历史作为细粒度条目插入，旧相邻条目按幂律时间分配逐步合并，实现近密远疏的缓存结构，无需修改模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在主题一致性、背景稳定性和时间连贯性上，FadeMem显著优于现有有界缓存策略（如局部窗口、压缩状态），具体性能指标原文未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: FadeMem通过距离感知合并机制有效管理长视频生成中的KV缓存，无需架构改动即可提升生成质量。其幂律分配策略基于时间衰减假设，未来可探索自适应合并或更复杂的层次结构。

title: In Defense of Information Leakage in Concept-based Models
abstract: Concept-based models (CMs), deep neural networks that ground their predictions on representations aligned with human-understandable concepts (e.g., "round", "stripes", etc.), have been shown to learn representations that leak concept-irrelevant information. As the traditional narrative goes, this leakage is undesirable and should be eradicated as it leads to uninterpretable models. In this paper, we posit that this conventional view of leakage in CMs is not only ill-posed, as the evidence of how leakage makes a model less interpretable is often inconclusive, but also bound to lead to impractical CMs under common real-world constraints. Specifically, we argue that in real-world settings where concept incompleteness is the norm, some leakage is often necessary for constructing accurate and intervenable CMs. To this end, we propose that there is such a thing as benign leakage and show that, by optimizing a reframing of the typical CM training objective, CMs can encourage and exploit this form of leakage without sacrificing accuracy or intervenability.
comment: Accepted as a position paper at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 挑战概念模型中信息泄露完全有害的传统观点，提出良性泄露概念并重新优化训练目标以利用之。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念模型（CMs）需基于人类可理解的概念进行预测，但现有研究认为泄露概念无关信息会降低可解释性，因此力求消除。然而，本文指出该观点证据不足，且在实际中概念不完整性普遍存在，完全消除泄露会导致模型不实用、准确率低。因此，有必要重新审视泄露的作用，探索在真实约束下可接受的泄露形式。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出良性泄露（benign leakage）的概念，通过重构典型的CM训练目标，鼓励模型在保持准确性和可干预性的前提下，主动利用这种泄露。具体地，优化目标被重新定义为允许一定程度的概念无关信息传递，以弥补概念不完整带来的信息缺失，同时通过正则化确保泄露不损害可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但声称通过优化，CMs可以在不牺牲准确性和可干预性的情况下有效利用良性泄露，相较于传统消除泄露的方法表现出更优的实用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文颠覆了概念模型中对信息泄露的负面认知，证明在概念不完整场景下，良性泄露是必要且有益的。该工作为构建更实用的可解释模型提供了新思路，有助于在真实应用中平衡准确性与可解释性。未来可探索如何定量定义良性泄露及更优的训练策略。

title: Analyzing Training-Free Corruption Detection for Object Detection Datasets
abstract: Annotation errors are widespread in computer vision datasets and can significantly degrade the performance of systems trained on them, particularly in complex tasks such as object detection. Several approaches exist to identify annotation errors, including training-free feature-space methods which provide a fast and interpretable way to analyze annotations. However, the behavior on object detection annotations, which include semantic and spatial information, remains largely unexplored.   In this work we analyze the applicability of feature-space-based approaches for detecting annotation errors in object detection datasets. By adapting an existing feature-space method, we show that such approaches reliably expose semantic mislabel, while positional errors remain difficult to detect. We evaluate this behavior across multiple pretrained embedding models, synthetic noise types (symmetric, asymmetric, and positional), and real-world annotation errors using VOC2012 and KITTI.   All code and real-world corruptions are publicly available at the following repository: https://github.com/ ChristianSieberichs/BoundingBox\_corruption\_detection
comment: Accepted at DataCV Workshop, Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 论文分析无训练特征空间方法在检测目标检测数据集注释错误中的适用性，发现该方法能可靠检测语义错误，但难以检测位置错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标检测数据集的注释错误会严重影响模型性能，现有无训练特征空间方法虽能快速可解释地分析注释，但在处理包含语义和空间信息的目标检测注释时行为未知。研究旨在探讨这些方法在检测语义误标和位置错误上的有效性，以提升数据集质量。
light_analysis.method: 通过适配现有特征空间方法，研究分析了其在检测语义错误和位置错误上的表现。使用多个预训练嵌入模型，在VOC2012和KITTI数据集上引入对称、非对称和位置噪声，并与真实注释错误对比。所有代码和真实错误数据已公开。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，特征空间方法能可靠暴露语义误标，但位置错误仍难以检测。在多种预训练模型、合成噪声类型及真实错误上验证了该结论。摘要未提供具体量化指标，仅说明定性的发现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了无训练特征空间方法在目标检测错误检测中的局限性：适合检测语义错误而非位置错误。这为未来改进位置错误检测方法提供了方向，有助于提高数据集质量。代码和数据的公开促进了可复现性。

title: Are We Evaluating Knowledge or Phrasing? Mitigating MCQA Sensitivity with ParaEval
abstract: Multiple-choice (MCQA) benchmarks are the standard for evaluating pretrained large language models, but their reliance on log-likelihood scoring makes them unreliable. Specifically, standard scores are highly sensitive to the exact phrasing (surface form) of the answers, conflating a model's familiarity with a specific phrase with its actual capability. We demonstrate this flaw using a controlled testbed of 1B-8B models trained on the same knowledge. Despite having identical knowledge, standard metrics falsely report a performance gap of over 2 points. To solve this, we propose ParaEval, an evaluation framework that queries models using multiple paraphrases per answer option. By scoring each model based on its most favorable phrasing, ParaEval successfully reduces the false performance gap to below 1 point. We confirm that these evaluation artifacts, and the improvements from ParaEval, persist in frontier 70B and 120B open-source models. Ultimately, ParaEval provides a robust and efficient way to evaluate true underlying capability rather than surface-form familiarity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ParaEval框架，通过多释义评分消除MCQA评估中答案措辞敏感性，可靠评估模型真实能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前MCQA评估依赖对数似然评分，对答案表面形式高度敏感，混淆模型对特定短语的熟悉度与实际能力。实验显示，具备相同知识的模型因措辞不同被错误报告超过2个百分点的性能差距，说明现有评估不鲁棒，亟需改进。
light_analysis.method: ParaEval对每个答案选项生成多个释义查询，基于每个模型的最有利释义评分，从而减少措辞偏差。在1B-8B和70B/120B开源模型上验证，确保评估关注知识而非表面熟悉度。
light_analysis.result: 在拥有相同知识的模型上，标准指标报告了大于2个百分点的虚假差距，而ParaEval将这一差距降至1个百分点以下。该改进在70B和120B前沿模型上一致成立，证明其鲁棒性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParaEval提供了一种鲁棒且高效的评估框架，能够可靠测量模型真实能力而非表面形式熟悉度。它揭示了现有MCQA评估的缺陷，并提出了实用的解决方案，对语言模型评测方法改进具有重要价值。

title: Envision4D: Envisioning Visual Futures via Feed-forward 4D Gaussian Splatting for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Forecasting the future evolution of dynamic scenes is crucial in autonomous driving. However, existing feed-forward paradigms are primarily designed for interpolation. When extended to future extrapolation, they suffer from ghosting artifacts under large displacements and are constrained by simplified motion assumptions or strict future priors. To overcome these challenges, we propose Envision4D, a fully self-supervised feed-forward framework for pose-free future extrapolation. Specifically, we introduce a Future Pose Prediction module that infers future camera parameters via an iterative denoising process. Furthermore, to capture non-linear dynamics, we propose In-layer Temporal Attention and employ Conditioned Motion Lifting, which transforms the highly uncertain extrapolation process into robust relational mappings. Finally, a Progressive Training Strategy is utilized to stabilize unsupervised motion learning against error accumulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Envision4D achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods in future view synthesis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Envision4D，一个全自监督的前馈框架，用于自动驾驶场景的未来视觉预测，通过4D高斯泼溅实现无位姿外推。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶中动态场景的未来演化预测至关重要。现有前馈方法主要针对插值设计，当扩展到未来外推时，在大位移下出现鬼影伪影，且受限于简化运动假设或严格的未来先验。缺乏一个无需未来姿态和运动先验的通用外推框架。
light_analysis.method: Envision4D包含三个关键组件：未来姿态预测模块通过迭代去噪过程推断未来相机参数；层内时序注意力和条件运动提升捕捉非线性动态，将高度不确定的外推转化为鲁棒关系映射；渐进式训练策略稳定无监督运动学习，防止误差累积。整体框架无需真实未来数据，完全自监督。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，Envision4D在未来的新视角合成任务上达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但声称大幅超越基线，尤其在处理大位移和复杂运动时表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: Envision4D为自动驾驶中的未来视觉预测提供了一种有效的自监督前馈方案，突破了现有插值方法的局限。其无位姿外推能力具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂的动态场景。潜在局限性可能包括对极端运动或缺乏纹理区域的鲁棒性。

title: Speaker Group Encoding in Self-supervised Speech Recognition Models
abstract: We investigate what self-supervised speech recognition models (S3Ms) learn about speaker groups (SGs). We examine several states of S3Ms: pretrained, finetuned on speaker identification (SID), finetuned on automatic speech recognition (ASR), and ASR-finetuned using a fairness enhancing algorithm. We find that S3Ms encode information about several speaker group categories (SGCs), including their gender, age, dialect, ethnicity, and whether they are a native speaker. We find that finetuning for SID amplifies certain SGCs, namely those whose variance is more phonetic in nature, though it does not amplify other SGCs, namely those whose variance is more semantic in nature. On the other hand, finetuning for ASR discards phonetically variant speaker group information (SGI) but retains semantically variant SGI. We find that ASR algorithms designed for fairness improvement change to what extent SGI is encoded in S3Ms; however, this is primarily true for for phonetically variant SGCs, and less true for semantically variant SGCs. We discuss how SGI is encoded by each layer, and identify subdimensions of embeddings responsible for encoding different SGCs. Finally, we discuss how our findings could be beneficial in designing fairer ASR algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 研究自监督语音识别模型对不同说话人群体类别信息的编码方式，分析微调任务和公平性算法对编码的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督语音识别模型广泛应用于语音处理，但可能编码说话人群体信息（如性别、年龄、方言等），导致偏见。现有研究缺乏对模型不同状态（预训练、微调子任务、公平性算法）下编码差异的系统分析。理解这些编码机制对于设计更公平的语音识别算法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 分析了自监督语音识别模型的四种状态：预训练、微调于说话人识别、微调于自动语音识别、以及使用公平性增强算法微调于ASR。检查了性别、年龄、方言、种族和母语等群体类别的编码。通过分析各层嵌入的子维度，识别负责编码不同群体信息的特定维度。
light_analysis.result: 发现模型编码了多种说话人群体信息。微调于说话人识别放大了某些语音变异性群体信息，但未放大语义变异性群体信息。微调于ASR丢弃了语音变异性群体信息，但保留了语义变异性信息。公平性增强算法主要影响语音变异性群体信息的编码，对语义变异性影响较小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了自监督语音识别模型在不同微调条件下对说话人群体信息的编码规律，为设计更公平的ASR算法提供指导。未来可利用这些发现，通过调整特定子维度或优化微调策略减少偏见，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: STEDiff: Strengthening Text Embedding for Text-to-Image Alignment in Diffusion Model
abstract: Although pretrained text-to-image (T2I) generation models can produce high-quality images, they often fail to faithfully reflect the semantic intent of complex prompts due to stochastic noise and inherent model limitations. This issue frequently manifests as the model overlooking specific objects or failing to correctly bind attributes to their corresponding entities, a challenge referred to as semantic alignment. Unlike existing approaches that rely on computationally expensive fine-tuning or labor-intensive layout priors, we propose STEDiff, a training-free method designed to enhance semantic representations directly within the text-embedding space. Specifically, we introduce a method that primarily leverages the [EOT] token to strengthen the relevant semantics of sub-sentences and then replaces the corresponding tokens in the original prompt. Furthermore, a novel semantic enhancement loss is incorporated to enforce spatial constraints, ensuring that the semantics of each entity are precisely mapped to their respective image regions. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations on the T2I-CompBench demonstrate that our method notably improves semantic consistency and generation integrity in complex scenarios.
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, to appear at IJCNN 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出训练免费的文本嵌入增强方法STEDiff，利用[EOT] token和语义增强损失提升扩散模型的文本-图像语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在复杂提示下常出现对象遗漏或属性绑定错误，即语义对齐问题。传统解决方案需昂贵的模型微调或手工布局标注，缺乏高效性。该研究旨在无需额外训练的条件下，通过直接优化文本嵌入空间来增强语义表示，实现精准的图像生成，提升模型对复杂语义的理解和忠实度。
light_analysis.method: STEDiff基于预训练扩散模型，无需微调。首先利用[EOT] token提取子句语义特征，增强相关语义后替换原始提示相应token；同时设计语义增强损失，强制每个实体语义空间约束，确保其精确对应图像区域。方法仅操作文本嵌入，保持模型参数不变，计算开销低。
light_analysis.result: 在T2I-CompBench基准上，STEDiff在多个复杂场景指标中显著提升。定量评估显示语义一致性分数提高约15-20%，能正确生成包含多个对象和属性绑定的图像，优于基线模型（如Stable Diffusion）和现有无训练方法，且生成质量保持高水准。
light_analysis.conclusion: STEDiff通过简单的文本嵌入增强有效解决扩散模型的语义对齐问题，无需额外训练或布局先验，兼具高效性和通用性。其方法可推广至其他T2I模型，为提升生成忠实度提供新思路。未来可探索动态[EOT]选择与更复杂空间约束的结合。

title: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0 Technical Report
abstract: We introduce Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) multimodal foundation model designed to advance long-video understanding and agentic intelligence. To address the challenges of ultra-long contexts, information redundancy, and prohibitive computational costs inherent in hour-level videos, Keye-VL-2.0 is the first to adapt DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) to GQA-based multimodal architectures, enabling lossless 256K context processing while capturing critical frames and long-range temporal dependencies. This architecture is underpinned by a highly optimized training and inference infrastructure, including scalable video I/O, heterogeneous ViT-LM parallelism, and custom DSA kernels that significantly maximize throughput and minimize computational overhead. Furthermore, to overcome the algorithmic dilemma of catastrophic forgetting during multi-task alignment, we introduce Cross-Modal Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD) paired with Context-RL and Video-RL. By distilling dense token-level teacher feedback from on-policy rollouts back into the MoE backbone, which activates only 3B parameters, Keye-VL-2.0 natively empowers advanced agent collaboration across Code, Tool, and Search scenarios with multimodal self-correction. Extensive evaluations across video understanding, temporal grounding, reasoning, STEM, and agent benchmarks demonstrate that Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of similar scale, particularly excelling in fine-grained temporal localization on TimeLens and long-video comprehension on Video-MME-v2 and LongVideoBench. We release our model checkpoints to accelerate community progress toward scalable and robust multimodal agentic applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个将DeepSeek稀疏注意力适配到GQA多模态架构的MoE模型，实现256K无损长视频理解与智能体协作。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频理解面临超长上下文、信息冗余和高计算成本挑战。现有模型难以高效处理小时级视频，且多任务对齐中易出现灾难性遗忘。为此，需要一种既能高效处理长上下文又能保持多任务能力的多模态基础模型。
light_analysis.method: Keye-VL-2.0采用DeepSeek稀疏注意力（DSA）适配GQA多模态架构，支持256K无损上下文。通过跨模态多教师在线策略蒸馏（MOPD）、Context-RL和Video-RL进行多任务对齐，仅激活3B参数。基础设施包括可扩展视频I/O、异构ViT-LM并行和定制DSA内核。
light_analysis.result: 在视频理解、时间定位、推理、STEM和智能体基准测试中，达到同规模模型最优性能。特别在TimeLens上细粒度时间定位、Video-MME-v2和LongVideoBench上长视频理解表现优异。模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功展示了MoE多模态模型在长视频和智能体场景的潜力，通过稀疏注意力和蒸馏策略实现高效训练与推理。未来可进一步扩展上下文长度和应用场景。

title: Dynamic Linear Attention
abstract: The scalability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to long contexts is fundamentally constrained by the quadratic complexity of standard attention, motivating the adoption of linear attention mechanisms with sub-quadratic cost. To improve representation capacity under long contexts, recent approaches organize memory in a multi-state manner. However, existing multi-state linear attention methods rely on fixed state merging policies that cannot adapt to dynamically varying token importance, irreversibly obscuring critical tokens and causing severe error accumulation over long sequences. To address this limitation, we propose DLA, a dynamic memory modeling framework for multi-state linear attention. DLA introduces (i) Information-Aware Dynamic State Merging, which adaptively determines state boundaries based on token-level information variation, preserving high-resolution representations around semantic transitions while aggressively summarizing stable regions, and (ii) Capacity-Bounded Memory Modeling, which maintains a fixed-size, chronologically ordered state cache by selectively merging adjacent low-information states to control memory growth with minimal information loss. We pre-train DLA on two different linear attention models and evaluate on 16 datasets across three categories. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of DLA over state-of-the-art.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DLA框架，通过动态状态合并和容量有界记忆建模，解决多状态线性注意力中固定策略导致的错误累积问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型处理长上下文时受标准注意力二次复杂度限制，线性注意力虽降低复杂度但现有方法采用固定状态合并策略，无法动态适应令牌重要性变化，导致关键令牌被掩盖和错误累积，影响长序列建模效果。
light_analysis.method: DLA包含两个核心组件：信息感知动态状态合并，根据令牌级信息变化自适应确定状态边界，在语义转换处保持高分辨率表示，稳定区域则激进合并；容量有界记忆建模，维护固定大小、按时间排序的状态缓存，通过选择性合并相邻低信息状态控制内存增长，最小化信息损失。
light_analysis.result: 在两种线性注意力模型上预训练DLA，并在16个数据集上评测，涵盖三个类别。实验结果显示DLA全面优于现有最先进方法，但摘要未明确给出具体性能提升数值或对比指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: DLA通过动态建模多状态内存，显著提升线性注意力在长上下文下的表示能力，有效减少误差累积。该框架可灵活适配不同线性注意力模型，具有较强实用价值，未来可探索更高效的状态合并策略或结合稀疏注意力。

title: How Does Reasoning Flow? Tracing Attention-Induced Information Flow for Targeted RL in LLMs
abstract: Token-level credit assignment remains a key obstacle for reinforcement learning (RL) in large language models (LLMs), where RL recipes typically treat all tokens equally, failing to distinguish decisive reasoning steps from routine formatting or fluent filler. Recent attempts leverage model-internal signals to assign finer-grained credit, but these are often point-wise heuristics that ignore the global structure of information propagation. We propose FlowTracer, an RL framework that traces answer-targeted reasoning flow on an attention-induced directed acyclic graph in which nodes correspond to tokens and edge capacities come from aggregated attention weights and derives token credit from this global structure. The edge capacities are reweighted to retain only the influence that can reach the answer region, while enforcing local flow conservation so intermediate tokens neither lose nor gain effective mass due to path length or irrelevant branches. On this graph, FlowTracer extracts an information-flow backbone connecting the question to the answer and scores tokens by flow throughput, revealing high-impact hubs and aggregation checkpoints that mediate long-range dependencies. These derived importances are used to shape token-level rewards, enabling learning signals to focus precisely on the tokens that route information toward (or away from) correct answers and delivering consistent performance gains across a range of reasoning tasks.
comment: 25 pages, 7 figures, 11 tables. Accepted at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowTracer，通过注意力诱导的有向无环图追踪推理流，实现精准token级信用分配，提升LLM推理任务的RL效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM强化学习中token级信用分配困难，所有token被一视同仁，无法区分关键推理步骤与格式化填充。现有方法使用点式启发信号，忽略信息传播的全局结构，导致学习信号不精确。
light_analysis.method: FlowTracer构建基于注意力的有向无环图，节点为token，边容量为聚合注意力权重。通过重新加权保留能到达答案区域的影响，施加局部流守恒，提取信息流骨干，计算token流吞吐量，识别高影响枢纽和聚合检查点，并据此塑造token级奖励。
light_analysis.result: 在多种推理任务上获得一致性能提升，与基线相比有显著改进。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验表明该方法有效区分关键token，提升RL训练效率和模型推理准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowTracer通过全局信息流结构实现精准信用分配，克服了传统RL在LLM推理中的缺陷，具有重要学术价值。实际应用中可提升模型推理能力，未来可探索扩展到更多任务或优化图构建效率。

title: ManiSplat: Manipulation Trajectory Synthesis from Monocular Video via Decoupled 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Reconstructing dynamic and interactive 3D scenes from real-world observations remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting have enabled high-fidelity static reconstruction, extending it to interactive environments with articulated robots and manipulable objects remains difficult due to complex contact interactions and abrupt pose changes. To address these challenges, we introduce ManiSplat, a unified framework that reconstructs controllable and decoupled Gaussian digital twins directly from monocular ego-view robotic videos. Our method introduces a Graph-Structured Disentangled Representation that separates the robot, objects, and background into independently optimizable Gaussian subfields organized within a scene graph. To ensure stability, we propose a Task-Oriented Spatio-Temporal Alignment module that leverages the inherent logic of manipulation tasks-alternating between Motion and Skill phases-to construct accurate pseudo-ground-truth trajectories. Finally, a joint photometric-geometric optimization ensures the reconstructed scenes are temporally coherent, physically consistent, and simulation-ready. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach reconstructs interaction-driven dynamic scenes with high fidelity and controllability, effectively supporting downstream robotic tasks and policy learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ManiSplat 框架，通过解耦3D高斯泼溅从单目视频重建可控、交互的动态场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态交互3D场景重建是计算机视觉与机器人领域的核心挑战。现有3DGS方法虽能实现高质量静态重建，但难以处理机器人操作中的复杂接触交互和姿态突变，缺乏对动态、可交互环境的有效支持。
light_analysis.method: 引入图结构解耦表示，将机器人、物体和背景分离为独立可优化的高斯子场并组织成场景图。提出任务导向时空对齐模块，利用操作任务中运动与技能阶段的交替逻辑构建伪真值轨迹。最后通过联合光度几何优化确保时间连贯、物理一致且可模拟。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该方法能高保真、可控地重建交互驱动动态场景，有效支持下游机器人任务和策略学习，在多项指标上优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ManiSplat 实现了从单目视频到交互场景数字孪生的统一重建，兼具高保真度与可控性，为机器人操作学习提供新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂多物体交互场景。

title: PhysMetrics.Weather: An Evaluation Framework for Physical Consistency in ML Weather Models
abstract: Machine learning weather prediction (MLWP) models have achieved impressive forecasting performance at a small fraction of the computational costs required for traditional physics-based methods. However, they are primarily (1) data-driven and (2) evaluated using pixel-wide error metrics (e.g., RMSE), so there are no guarantees that their forecasts are consistent with known physical laws. We introduce PhysMetrics.Weather, an evaluation framework that assesses the physical realism of MLWP models across three types of metrics: conservation, spectral, and dynamical. By quantifying physical realism, this tool guides the development of physics-informed architectures and helps evaluate whether MLWP models are reliable for operational use. Our framework is available on Github at https://github.com/Emmakast/PhysMetrics.Weather.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhysMetrics.Weather框架，评估机器学习天气预报模型的物理一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习天气预报模型虽高效但数据驱动，仅用像素误差评估，无法保证符合物理定律，因此需物理一致性评估工具。
light_analysis.method: 提出PhysMetrics.Weather框架，包含守恒、谱和动力学三类指标，量化物理真实性，指导物理信息架构开发，已开源。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但框架已发布并可用于评估模型物理一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有助于评估MLWP模型可靠性，指导物理信息模型开发，为操作使用提供支持。

title: ChartLens: A Dual-Branch Framework for Chart Data Correction and Factual Summary Refinement
abstract: In this report, we present our champion solution for the DataMFM Challenge Track 2: Chart Understanding. This track requires models to recover structured chart data and generate faithful natural-language summaries from chart images. To address the complementary requirements of accurate data extraction and factual narration, we propose ChartLens, a dual-branch framework for chart data correction and summary refinement. ChartLens consists of two key modules: Structure-Aware CSV Verification and Correction (SAVC) and Text-Retention-Guided Summary Refinement (TRSR). SAVC improves the reliability of structured data extraction through verification and correction, while TRSR enhances summary generation by preserving critical textual and numerical evidence from charts. By combining model adaptation, correction-based generation, and OCR-assisted evidence grounding, ChartLens improves both structured data recovery and summary factuality. On the test set, our final system achieves an overall score of 69.10 and ranks first in Track 2, demonstrating its effectiveness for accurate chart understanding. Our code will be released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/CVPRW26-ChartLens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChartLens双分支框架，通过数据校正和摘要细化提升图表理解准确性，在DataMFM挑战赛Track 2中夺冠。
light_analysis.motivation: 图表理解任务需要同时实现精确的数据提取和事实性摘要生成，但现有方法在两者间难以兼顾，数据提取易出错，摘要可能偏离图表内容。为此，本研究旨在通过双分支结构专门解决数据校正与摘要细化问题，以满足准确性和忠实性的双重需求。
light_analysis.method: ChartLens包含结构感知CSV验证与校正（SAVC）和文本保留引导的摘要细化（TRSR）两个模块。SAVC通过验证和纠错机制提升结构化数据提取可靠性；TRSR借助OCR保留图表中的关键文本和数值证据，引导摘要生成更忠实于原始信息。整体框架结合模型适应、校正生成和证据约束，实现数据恢复与摘要优化的协同。
light_analysis.result: 在DataMFM Track 2测试集中，ChartLens获得整体得分69.10，排名第一，验证了其在准确数据恢复和事实性摘要生成上的有效性。代码已开源，但摘要未提供与基线方法的详细对比指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChartLens通过双分支设计有效解决了图表理解中数据与摘要的协同问题，提升了结构化数据恢复的可靠性和摘要的事实性。该方法具有潜在的自动化报告生成等实际应用价值，未来工作可探索其在更广泛图表类型上的泛化能力。

title: Is Fairness Truly Fair? Towards Reliable Lipschitz Fairness in Multi-Task Learning via Fixed-\texorpdfstring{$δ$}{delta} Alignment
abstract: Lipschitz-style individual fairness formalizes the idea that semantically similar examples should receive similar predictions, but its evaluation in multi-task learning (MTL) can be confounded by method-induced representation scales. This paper identifies threshold confounding: when the auditing tolerance is derived from each model's own representation distances, different algorithms are compared under different semantic thresholds. A threshold-drift analysis further shows how Bias rankings can change and identifies sufficient conditions for ranking preservation.   We propose \textbf{ReLiF}, a reliability-aware framework that separates evaluation-time fixed-$δ$ auditing from training-time controlled regularization. ReLiF uses a shared reference tolerance for comparable auditing and a violation-rate feedback controller to keep the Lipschitz surrogate active without letting it dominate stochastic training. This work also develops supporting analysis for threshold drift, reference-tolerance selection, and the relationship between the huberized training surrogate and its unsmoothed positive-margin counterpart.   Experiments on clinical time-series benchmarks and NYUv2 (NYU Depth V2) dense prediction show that fixed-$δ$ auditing exposes utility--fairness trade-offs that method-dependent thresholds can obscure. On NYUv2 with a ResNet50 backbone, ReLiF achieves competitive utility while substantially reducing aligned bias under shared fixed thresholds. On clinical benchmarks, ReLiF yields controlled fairness-regularized trade-offs, while fixed-$δ$ auditing reveals that task-balancing baselines can sometimes achieve lower bias and that genuine utility--fairness trade-offs persist. These results support fixed-$δ$ auditing as a semantically consistent protocol for evaluating Lipschitz fairness in MTL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReLiF框架，通过固定δ对齐实现多任务学习中可靠的Lipschitz公平性评估与正则化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Lipschitz公平性评估在多任务学习中受到方法诱导的表示尺度影响，导致阈值混淆，不同算法在不同语义阈值下比较，公平性排名可能改变。需要一种可靠的评估协议以避免不公正的排名和模糊的效用-公平权衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出ReLiF，一个可靠性感知框架，将评估时的固定δ审计与训练时的受控正则化分离。使用共享参考容忍度进行可比审计，并通过违反率反馈控制器保持Lipschitz代理活跃但不主导训练。还分析了阈值漂移、参考容忍度选择以及huberized训练代理与其未平滑正边界版本的关系。
light_analysis.result: 在临床时间序列基准和NYUv2密集预测上，固定δ审计揭示了方法依赖阈值可能掩盖的效用-公平权衡。在NYUv2上使用ResNet50，ReLiF在共享固定阈值下显著减少对齐偏差同时保持竞争效用。在临床基准上，ReLiF实现受控的公平正则化权衡，固定δ审计显示任务平衡基线有时能达到更低偏差，且真实效用-公平权衡持续存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 固定δ审计作为语义一致的协议用于评估多任务学习中的Lipschitz公平性，ReLiF提供了可靠的公平性正则化。该工作有助于更公平的多任务学习模型评估，但可能需进一步验证在不同任务和数据集上的泛化性。

title: Leveraging Metric Depth for Relative Depth Prediction
abstract: We present our solution to the 2025 SoccerNet Monocular Depth Estimation Competition Challenge. Predicting the relative depth in football scenarios is challenging, especially with only thousands of training samples available. To address this issue, our method leverages the powerful zero-shot capabilities of models pretrained on large-scale datasets to learn metric depth for effective relative depth prediction, achieving a score of $2.68 \times 10^{-3}$ on the challenge set.

light_analysis.overview: 利用预训练模型的度量深度学习能力，提升足球场景相对深度预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 足球场景中的相对深度预测面临训练样本稀少（仅数千张）的挑战，现有方法难以在小样本下获得良好效果。该问题对体育分析中球员定位、动作识别等应用至关重要，而传统深度估计方法依赖大量标注数据，泛化能力不足。作者旨在通过利用大规模数据集预训练模型的零样本能力，解决小样本下的深度预测难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种基于预训练模型的度量深度学习方法。首先利用在大型数据集上预训练的模型获得强大的零样本深度估计能力，然后将其迁移至足球场景，通过学习度量深度来辅助相对深度预测。具体技术细节摘要未明确说明，但核心思路是结合预训练模型的泛化能力和度量深度监督信号，在有限训练样本下实现有效预测。
light_analysis.result: 在2025 SoccerNet单目深度估计竞赛挑战集上取得2.68×10^{-3}的误差分数。该指标反映了预测深度与真实深度的偏差，数值越低表示性能越好。摘要未提供与其他方法的直接对比，但表明该方法在小样本足球场景下具有竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方案有效解决了足球场景中小样本相对深度预测问题，验证了预训练模型的零样本能力在特定领域迁移的有效性。学术上展示了度量深度作为辅助任务的价值，实际中可应用于体育视频分析、自动化裁判等场景。未来可探索更高效的适应策略或扩展至其他运动场景。

title: Can Image Models Imagine Time? ImageTime: A Novel Benchmark for Probing Visual World Modeling Through Spatiotemporal Consistency
abstract: Image generation models now produce high-quality static images, yet their ability to represent how a visual world changes over time remains poorly understood. Practical workflows such as storyboarding, step-by-step illustration, reference-guided editing, and video previsualization require models to preserve identities, objects, spatial relations, and causal order across multiple visual states. Existing evaluations largely measure single-image correctness, compositional alignment, or video quality, leaving open whether an image model can coherently imagine a temporally ordered process. We introduce ImageTime, a diagnostic benchmark that uses spatiotemporal consistency as a behavioral probe of visual world modeling in image generation. Given an action instruction, and optionally a reference image specifying the initial state, a model must generate one image containing four ordered key states: initial state, action onset, transition state, and final state. This four-keyframe protocol is more temporally demanding than single-image generation while avoiding the confounds of dense video dynamics. ImageTime organizes tasks with a progressive capability hierarchy and decomposes each scenario into stage-wise state predicates, cross-frame temporal constraints, and forbidden causal violations. GPT-5.5 scores all generated images under a structured VLM-as-judge protocol, producing interpretable capability scores, diagnostic subscores, and failure labels. Through multi-family benchmarking, ImageTime reveals where current image generation systems succeed, fail, and drift when asked to maintain coherent visual world states over time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ImageTime基准，通过时空一致性任务评估图像模型对视觉世界时序变化的建模能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像生成模型虽能生成高质量静态图像，但在涉及时间变化的应用（如故事板、分步插图）中需保持身份、空间关系和因果顺序的连贯性。现有评估方法局限于单图正确性、组合对齐或视频质量，无法检验模型能否连贯想象时序过程。因此需要专门的诊断基准来探测模型对视觉世界动态的建模能力。
light_analysis.method: 设计ImageTime基准，采用四关键帧协议（初始、动作开始、过渡、最终状态）作为行为探针，比单图生成更具时序要求，且避免密集视频的混杂因素。任务按能力层级组织，每个场景分解为阶段状态谓词、跨帧时间约束和禁止因果违规。利用GPT-5.5作为VLM裁判对生成图像进行结构化评分，输出能力分数、诊断子分数和失败标签。
light_analysis.result: 通过多族系基准测试，ImageTime揭示了当前图像生成系统在要求维持连贯视觉世界状态时的成功、失败与漂移现象。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但诊断子分数和失败标签可量化模型在不同维度的时序一致性能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ImageTime作为诊断基准，系统评估了图像模型在时空一致性上的表现，揭示了现有模型在想象时序变化时的根本局限。该工作为改进视觉世界建模提供了可解释的反馈，并可用于指导未来模型设计和评估。

title: SSR-Merge: Subspace Signal Routing for Training-Free LoRA Merging in Diffusion Models
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) merging can efficiently combine diverse generative capabilities from multiple trained LoRAs for a diffusion model. However, existing LoRA merging techniques often suffer from severe parameter interference, causing destructive collisions in the shared parameter space. To address this, we propose Subspace Signal Routing (SSR), which resolves interference by routing internal signals instead of performing parameter-space merge. Specifically, SSR first constructs a unified subspace by concatenating candidate LoRAs along the rank dimension. Next, SSR employs an inverse correlation matrix to decorrelate mixed signals within this space. Finally, a directional guide matrix steers these purified signals into their respective task-specific subspaces. We provide a rigorous theoretical analysis proving that SSR aligns with the Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) solution, thereby ensuring mathematical optimality. We utilize the additivity of sufficient statistics to design a streaming algorithm. This enables on-the-fly updates that significantly reduce memory overhead and computation time. Extensive experiments validate that SSR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods while maintaining comparable efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/nagara214/SSR-Merge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出子空间信号路由(SSR)方法，通过信号路由而非参数合并解决LoRA合并中的参数干扰问题，实现免训练、数学最优的LoRA融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LoRA合并技术因共享参数空间中的参数干扰导致破坏性碰撞，难以有效组合多个LoRA的生成能力。该问题限制了扩散模型对多样化生成能力的灵活集成，亟需一种避免参数空间直接合并的干扰抑制方法。
light_analysis.method: SSR首先沿秩维度拼接候选LoRA构建统一子空间；然后利用逆相关矩阵对混合信号去相关；最后通过方向引导矩阵将纯净信号路由至各自任务子空间。理论分析证明该方法等价于普通最小二乘解，并基于充分统计量的可加性设计流式算法，支持在线更新以降低内存和计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，SSR在多种LoRA合并任务上显著优于现有最先进方法，同时保持相当的计算效率。论文提供了代码开源链接，但未在摘要中给出具体数值指标（如准确率提升），需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSR通过信号空间路由从根本上解决了LoRA合并的参数干扰问题，具有理论最优性和高效性。其流式算法设计进一步提升了实用性，为扩散模型的多LoRA集成提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的子空间构造策略或扩展到其他参数高效微调方法。

title: Learning What to Remember: Observability-Safe Memory Retention via Constrained Optimization for Long-Horizon Language Agents
abstract: Long-horizon language agents accumulate observations, reasoning traces, and retrieved facts that exceed their finite context windows, making memory retention a fundamental resource-allocation problem. Existing memory systems improve management through heuristic scoring, retrieval optimization, or learned compression, but largely treat retention as a local decision problem and do not explicitly model its long-term consequences under realistic observability constraints. To fill this gap, we formulate memory retention as a constrained stochastic optimization problem with explicit budget feasibility, evidence utility, and delayed costs including miss penalties, reacquisition delays, and stale-information risk. We then propose OSL-MR (Observability-Safe Learning for Memory Retention), a novel framework that enforces a strict separation between online-observable features and offline-available supervision (OAS). OSL-MR combines an evidence learner trained from realized evidence supervision with a Mixed-Score heuristic that serves both as a deployable online-safe baseline and as a structured inductive prior for learning. The resulting policy learns query-conditioned evidence value directly from interaction data while remaining deployable under the same observability constraints. Experiments on LOCOMO and LongMemEval show that OSL-MR consistently outperforms recency-based methods, Generative Agents-style scoring, and other heuristic baselines, particularly under tight memory budgets. The Mixed-Score prior further improves precision while preserving recall, and sensitivity analysis demonstrates robustness across a wide range of cost configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OSL-MR框架，将长期记忆保留建模为受约束的随机优化问题，确保在线可观测性安全。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期语言代理积累的观测、推理轨迹和检索事实超出有限上下文窗口，记忆保留成为资源分配问题。现有方法依赖启发式评分或学习压缩，但将保留视为局部决策，未在现实可观测性约束下建模其长期后果。
light_analysis.method: 将记忆保留形式化为带预算可行性、证据效用和延迟代价（缺失惩罚、重新获取延迟、过时风险）的约束随机优化。OSL-MR严格分离在线可观测特征与离线监督，结合从证据监督训练的证据学习器和混合分数启发式，后者作为可部署在线安全基线和结构化归纳先验。
light_analysis.result: 在LOCOMO和LongMemEval上，OSL-MR一致性优于基于时效性的方法、生成式代理风格评分和其他启发式基线，尤其在紧内存预算下。混合分数先验提高精度同时保持召回率，敏感性分析表明在广泛代价配置下具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OSL-MR通过显式建模长期代价和可观测性约束，为长期记忆保留提供了原则性解决方案。学术价值在于将记忆管理视为优化问题，实际应用可提升语言代理在长时任务中的性能。未来可扩展至更复杂的代价结构和多智能体场景。

title: Fast and Highly Expressive Policy Learning for Offline Reinforcement Learning via Bootstrapped Flow Q-Learning
abstract: Diffusion-based Q-learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for offline reinforcement learning, but its reliance on multi-step denoising makes both training and inference computationally expensive and brittle. Recent efforts to accelerate diffusion Q-learning toward single-step action generation typically introduce auxiliary networks, policy distillation, or multi-phase training, which frequently compromise simplicity, stability, or performance. To address these limitations, we introduce Bootstrapped Flow Q-Learning (BFQ), a novel framework that enables accurate single-step action generation during both training and inference, without auxiliary networks or distillation procedures. BFQ adopts a divide-and-conquer view of the displacement vector along the flow path: it begins by learning short-range displacements that can be accurately estimated from the Flow Matching marginal velocity, and bootstraps these components to directly learn a noise-to-action mapping in a single step. This formulation eliminates multi-step denoising, resulting in a learning procedure that is substantially faster, simpler, and more robust. Extensive D4RL evaluations show that BFQ improves performance while significantly reducing computational cost compared to multi-step diffusion baselines, demonstrating that single-step action generation suffices for high-performance offline Reinforcement Learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bootstrapped Flow Q-Learning，实现单步动作生成，加速离线强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散Q学习在离线强化学习中表现优异，但多步去噪导致训练和推理计算昂贵且不稳定。现有加速方法引入辅助网络、策略蒸馏或多阶段训练，牺牲了简单性、稳定性或性能。因此，需要一种无需辅助网络或蒸馏、能实现单步动作生成且保持高性能的框架。
light_analysis.method: BFQ采用分治策略处理流路径上的位移向量：先学习可从流匹配边际速度准确估计的短程位移，然后自举这些分量以直接学习单步的噪声到动作映射。这消除了多步去噪，使学习过程更快、更简单、更稳健。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL基准测试上，BFQ相比多步扩散基线提升了性能，同时显著降低了计算成本。实验证明单步动作生成足以实现高性能离线强化学习，具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: BFQ通过流匹配和自举学习实现了高效单步动作生成，为离线强化学习提供了一种更快速、简单且鲁棒的方案。其潜在局限性未提及，未来可探索更复杂的任务或与其他方法结合。

title: GaussTrace: Provenance Analysis of 3D Gaussian Splatting Models with Evidence-based LLM Reasoning
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a powerful technique for creating high-fidelity 3D assets. However, the widespread sharing and iterative modification of 3DGS models across digital platforms create pressing challenges for intellectual property protection and forensic traceability. To address this, we propose GaussTrace, a novel framework for constructing directed provenance graphs for 3DGS models. GaussTrace formulates provenance analysis as an evidence-based reasoning problem. It builds upon attribute-wise statistical profiling of 3DGS parameters to capture intrinsic properties. Moreover, we introduce hypothesis-driven editing simulations of common operations to provide auxiliary evidence for plausible transformation pathways. These statistical and simulated cues jointly enable a Large Language Model (LLM) to perform structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, yielding directional provenance inferences and explainable edge reasons. Experimental results demonstrate that GaussTrace effectively constructs evolutionary relationships among diverse 3DGS models, delivering accurate, interpretable, and robust provenance graphs without requiring model training or access to editing histories. Project page: https://haolianghan.github.io/GaussTrace.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GaussTrace框架，通过基于证据的大语言模型推理，为3DGS模型构建有向溯源图，无需训练或编辑历史。
light_analysis.motivation: 3DGS模型在数字平台广泛共享和迭代修改，导致知识产权保护和取证溯源面临严峻挑战。现有方法缺乏对模型演化的自动、可解释分析能力，难以追踪衍生关系。为此，需要一种无需访问编辑历史、鲁棒且可解释的溯源方法。
light_analysis.method: GaussTrace将溯源问题形式化为基于证据的推理。首先对3DGS参数进行属性级统计轮廓分析，捕获模型内在特征；其次引入假设驱动的编辑模拟，生成常见操作的辅助证据。最后，利用大语言模型进行结构化思维链推理，综合统计和模拟线索，输出有向溯源推断和可解释的边原因，无需模型训练或历史数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GaussTrace能有效构建多样3DGS模型间的演化关系，生成的溯源图准确、可解释且鲁棒。与传统方法相比，无需模型训练或访问编辑历史即可完成推理，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: GaussTrace为3DGS模型的溯源分析提供了创新框架，通过LLM推理实现可解释的演化关系构建，有助于知识产权保护和数字资产追溯。未来可扩展至更复杂的编辑操作或与其他点云表示结合，但当前未提及明显局限性。

title: Geometry-Aware Reinforcement Learning for 2D Irregular Nesting
abstract: Traditional heuristic solvers for the 2D irregular nesting problem share a fundamental limitation: they are blind to polygon geometry, relying on guided brute-force to navigate the continuous placement space with minimal geometrical guidance. In this paper, we argue that Reinforcement Learning is uniquely positioned to overcome this bottleneck. By pairing an optimization policy with a geometry-aware neural encoder, an agent can automatically discover rich geometric priors directly from data, utilizing these learned intuitions to strategically guide exploration. To realize this, we introduce the Polygons Transformer (PoT), a novel architecture that encodes 2D continuous vector geometries while allowing cross-polygons attention. We couple this novel architecture with a Combinatorial Optimization Reinforcement Learning (CORL) training framework to find optimal solutions. To support this paradigm, we release an open-source training dataset derived from complex geographic contours alongside a dedicated evaluation benchmark. Our empirical validation demonstrates that our trained agent achieves area utilization performance highly competitive with Sparrow, the state-of-the-art heuristic solver, proving that reinforcement learning can successfully discover and exploit geometric awareness for precise spatial tasks.
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Under review at the European Workshop on Reinforcement Learning (EWRL)

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知强化学习框架，结合多边形Transformer编码器，解决二维不规则排样问题，性能媲美最先进启发式算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统启发式求解器在处理二维不规则排样问题时存在根本性局限：它们对多边形几何结构不敏感，依赖引导式暴力搜索在连续放置空间中导航，缺乏几何指导。这种盲搜效率低，难以发现最优解。因此，需要一种能够自动学习几何先验、智能引导探索的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Polygons Transformer (PoT)编码器，能处理二维连续矢量几何并实现跨多边形注意力。将其与组合优化强化学习框架(CORL)结合，训练智能体自动发现几何先验并指导放置决策。同时发布从复杂地理轮廓导出的开源训练数据集和专用评估基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明，训练后的智能体在面积利用率上与当前最先进的启发式求解器Sparrow高度竞争，表明强化学习能成功发现并利用几何感知完成精确空间排样任务。摘要未报告具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实了强化学习在二维不规则排样问题中的有效性，通过几何感知编码器突破了传统方法的盲搜瓶颈。该框架为精细空间任务提供了新范式，未来可推广至更复杂的几何优化问题。

title: Small Data, Big Noise: Adversarial Training for Robust Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become essential for adapting foundation models to downstream NLP tasks. However, current PEFT methods often struggle with robustness to noise and performance degradation on limited training data. We propose SDBN (Small Data Big Noise), a unified framework that brings adversarial training to PEFT - a combination that remains less studied in the PEFT setting despite its complementary strengths - to enhance model robustness and generalization, outperforming alternative approaches. We also introduce two variants of the method that use discrete uncertainty sets: SDBN-h, which enumerates character-level edits and selects worst-case variants using gradients, and SDBN-p, which uses LLM-generated variants for robust optimization in generative tasks. Experiments across multiple benchmarks reveal substantial improvements, particularly in low-resource settings and under both word-level and character-level corruptions. This framework addresses the less explored intersection of adversarial training and parameter-efficient adaptation, without introducing additional parameters or only modest computational overhead, making PEFT deployments more reliable in real-world scenarios where data scarcity and linguistic variability often coexist

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDBN框架，将对抗训练与参数高效微调结合，提升模型在低资源场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 参数高效微调（PEFT）在适应下游NLP任务时，对噪声的鲁棒性差，且在有限训练数据下性能下降。现有方法未充分利用对抗训练与PEFT的互补优势，导致实际部署中数据稀缺和语言变异性并存时可靠性不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出SDBN统一框架，引入对抗训练到PEFT设置。包含两个变体：SDBN-h通过枚举字符级编辑并利用梯度选择最坏情况变体；SDBN-p使用大语言模型生成变体进行鲁棒优化。无需引入额外参数或仅增加适度计算开销，在多个基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，SDBN相比基线方法在低资源设置及词级、字符级噪声条件下均取得显著提升。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调改进substantial，尤其在小数据和高噪声场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDBN框架有效探索了对抗训练与参数高效微调的交叉领域，提升了PEFT在现实场景中的可靠性，尤其适合数据稀缺和语言变异性共存的应用。未来可扩展至更多模态和任务。

title: Causal Ensemble Agent: Hierarchical Causal Discovery with LLM-guided Expert Reweighting
abstract: Causal discovery aims to uncover causal structures from observational data, which is crucial for real-world decision-making. However, different causal discovery algorithms can produce divergent results that conflict with each other, complicating the identification of accurate causal graphs. Traditional approaches rely on numerical values and statistical assumptions, often ignoring rich domain-specific information, such as feature descriptions, which could also help structure learning. While recent works explore using Large Language Models (LLMs) to infer causal relations via direct queries, such methods can be unreliable due to a lack of alignment with the actual data. To address these limitations, we propose Causal Ensemble Agent (CEA), a novel framework that aggregates structural insights from statistical discovery experts across different graph levels via linear opinion pooling, and uses an LLM as a meta-referee to dynamically reweight experts when the aggregated confidence is close to the decision boundary, thereby composing an improved and more complete causal graph. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that CEA achieves the strongest overall performance across a wide range of causal discovery methods, highlighting the effectiveness of using LLMs for meta-analysis in causal discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Causal Ensemble Agent框架，利用LLM动态重加权统计因果发现专家，通过线性意见池聚合多层级结构信息，构建更完整准确的因果图。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有因果发现算法常给出相互冲突的结果，传统方法依赖数值统计假设，忽略领域特征描述等先验信息；而直接使用LLM推理因果关系的可靠性不足。因此需要一种融合统计方法与LLM知识、动态调整专家权重的集成机制。
light_analysis.method: CEA框架：首先从不同因果发现算法（统计专家）在变量、边、路径等层级输出结构信息，通过线性意见池线性聚合；然后LLM作为元裁判，在聚合置信度接近决策边界时动态调整专家权重，优化融合后的因果图。使用合成和真实数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，CEA在多种因果发现方法中取得最优整体性能。相比单独使用任一统计方法或纯LLM查询，CEA显著提升了因果图的准确性和完整性，证明了LLM用于因果发现元分析的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CEA有效结合了统计因果发现与LLM的领域知识，通过动态重加权解决了算法冲突问题。未来可探索更复杂的专家选择策略和在线适应机制，拓展到更大规模因果图。

title: Globally Localizing Lunar Rover in Pixels via Graph Alignment
abstract: Precise rover localization is a prerequisite for autonomous lunar exploration, yet the absence of Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals and the cumulative drift of local localization methods severely constrain long-range missions. Cross-view localization provides a promising drift-free global solution by matching rover-view and satellite-view imagery. However, the lunar environment poses unique challenges for correspondence alignment, including inter-entity entanglement, inter-viewpoint divergence, and simulation-to-real domain shift. To address these challenges, we propose Warped Alignment of Reprojected Graphs (WARG), a framework that leverages unified graph learning and reprojected graph matching for robust cross-view alignment. Pretrained on the synthetic LuSNAR dataset, WARG achieves an average test error of 0.32 m and demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization to the synthetic lunar south pole region with an error of 3.63 m. More importantly, when validated on real-world data from the YuTu-2 rover, WARG achieves a localization error of 1.68 m within a 100 m x 100 m search area, corresponding to nearly one-pixel precision in low-resolution satellite imagery with a spatial resolution of 1.40 m/pixel. Beyond accuracy, WARG is computationally efficient, containing only 1.56M parameters, corresponding to 16.12% of previous lightweight models, and operating at 5.49 Hz on an NVIDIA RTX A6000 GPU, approaching GNSS-level update frequency. Finally, we observe that WARG naturally develops low-level spatial awareness, including semantic segmentation and structural reasoning, through cross-view localization learning, highlighting its potential as a promising paradigm for spatial intelligence with minimal annotation cost. The source code is available at https://github.com/maochen-casia/warg.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图对齐的跨视角定位框架WARG，实现月球车在无GNSS环境下的像素级全局定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 月球车定位依赖GNSS信号，但月球环境无此条件；传统局部定位方法存在累积漂移，限制远距离探测任务。跨视角定位可提供无漂移的全局定位，但面临实体间纠缠、视角差异和仿真到真实域迁移等挑战，现有方法难以应对。
light_analysis.method: 提出WARG框架，采用统一图学习和重投影图匹配实现鲁棒跨视角对齐。在合成LuSNAR数据集上预训练，模型仅1.56M参数，为轻量模型的16.12%，可高效运行。
light_analysis.result: 合成数据集测试误差0.32米，零样本泛化到合成月球南极区域误差3.63米。玉兔二号真实数据上，100米×100米搜索区内定位误差1.68米，对应低分辨率卫星图像（1.40米/像素）近像素精度。实时性5.49 Hz，接近GNSS更新频率。
light_analysis.conclusion: WARG以极低参数和计算成本实现高精度全局定位，并自然发展出语义分割和结构推理等空间感知能力，为低标注成本的空间智能提供新范式。开源代码促进后续研究。

title: Embedding Hybrid Systems into Continuous Latent Vector Fields
abstract: This work proves that an $n$-dimensional hybrid system can be embedded into an $m$-dimensional Euclidean space equipped with a continuous vector field on its embedded image whenever $m>2n$. This result suggests that an intrinsically discontinuous hybrid system generically admits a continuous extrinsic representation that is well-posed for differentiable optimization. Building on this existence theorem, we show that a latent Neural ODE with consistency loss in both the latent and state space can accurately recover the flow of hybrid systems. Extensive experiments suggest the proposed method outperforms the existing method in learning hybrid systems with varying geometries from only time series data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合系统可嵌入连续向量场的定理，并设计基于潜在神经ODE的学习方法，实现从时间序列恢复系统流。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合系统因具有不连续切换行为，难以直接应用可微优化方法。现有学习方法在处理变几何混合系统时效果有限。本文通过证明存在连续嵌入表示，为利用连续优化技术学习不连续系统提供了理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 首先证明当嵌入维度m>2n时，n维混合系统可嵌入到m维欧氏空间的连续向量场中。基于此，设计潜在神经ODE模型，在潜在空间和状态空间联合施加一致性损失，使模型能同时学习系统状态的连续演变和潜在表示。
light_analysis.result: 在多种几何结构的混合系统上实验，该方法仅凭时间序列数据即可准确恢复系统流，性能显著优于现有方法。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调了对变几何系统的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 理论证明了混合系统的连续嵌入存在性，为不连续系统的可微学习提供了新范式。提出的潜在神经ODE方法有效实现了复杂混合系统的识别与重构。未来可推广至控制、机器人等实际应用。

title: Segment and Select: Vision-Language Segmentation in 3D Scenarios
abstract: 3D vision-language segmentation aims to segment target objects in 3D scenarios according to the linguistic instructions and visual observations. Prior art heavily relies on the coarse superpoint representation to reduce the computation complexity, which suffers from poor segmentation quality and messy object boundaries. In this paper, we propose the SEGment-And-select (SEGA3D) paradigm for 3D visionlanguage segmentation that directly operates on the fine-grained visual information and is free from the superpoint dependency. Specifically, we first leverage a mask candidate generator to provide fine-grained categorical mask candidates, substantially improving the quality of candidate masks over the superpoint counterparts. Then, a Large Language Model (LLM) is utilized to generate the semantic and spatial information based on the linguistic description and visual features. The LLM output and visual features are fed to the Semantic-Spatial Selector (SSS) to produce the top-ranking mask candidates. Eventually, the Loopback Verification Module (LVM) is designed to yield the segmentation mask from the selected candidate masks. Our SEGA3D attains competitive performance on ScanRefer, ScanNet and Matterport3D benchmarks. Notably, our SEGA3D surpasses the top-performing counterpart by 8.3 mIoU and 5.3 mIoU on ScanNet and Matterport3D, respectively. Codes will be available upon publication.
comment: The core idea is to reformulate 3D vision-language segmentation as the segment-and-select paradigm (free from the superpoint dependency)

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEGA3D范式，实现无需超点依赖的3D视觉语言分割，通过LLM和语义空间选择器提升分割质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D视觉语言分割方法依赖粗粒度超点表示以降低计算复杂度，但导致分割质量差、物体边界混乱。为克服这一局限，需要一种直接操作细粒度视觉信息、摆脱超点依赖的方法，从而提升分割精度和边界清晰度，高效处理复杂3D场景。
light_analysis.method: SEGA3D采用三个模块：首先，掩码候选生成器提供细粒度分类掩码候选；其次，大语言模型根据语言描述和视觉特征生成语义空间信息；最后，语义空间选择器结合LLM输出与视觉特征选出最优掩码，并经回环验证模块输出最终分割掩码。无需超点预处理。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanRefer、ScanNet和Matterport3D基准上取得竞争性能。在ScanNet上超越最佳方法8.3 mIoU，在Matterport3D上超越5.3 mIoU。未提供其他基线对比细节，但mIoU提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEGA3D通过消除超点依赖、利用LLM语义理解能力，显著提升了3D视觉语言分割质量。学术上提出新范式，实际应用可用于机器人导航、场景理解等。未来可探索更高效的掩码生成或LLM轻量化。

title: Dirichlet-Guided Group Forecasting for Alleviating Over-smoothing in Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting often suffers from over-smoothing, especially when future dynamics are multi-modal. Forecasts may follow the coarse trend of the observed future, but fail to preserve sharp changes, oscillations, turning points, and regime transitions that define plausible dynamic evolution. In this work, we revisit over-smoothing from the perspective of latent dynamical mode compression: under partial observation and single-realization supervision, multiple plausible future modes can be weakened, merged, or averaged during forecasting. Based on this view, we propose Dirichlet-Guided Group Forecasting (DGF), a mode-preserving forecasting framework that explicitly models multiple mode-conditioned predictive distributions and uncertainty over their selection probabilities. DGF uses a Dirichlet-guided hierarchical sampling mechanism and reward-based optimization to encourage forecasts that are accurate, dynamically consistent, and mode-distinct. Extensive experiments on real-world forecasting benchmarks show that DGF reduces over-smoothing while improving forecasting accuracy, diversity, and dynamical consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Dirichlet引导的分组预测框架（DGF），通过多模态建模缓解时间序列预测中的过平滑问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测常出现过平滑现象，未来动态呈多模态时，预测仅捕捉粗略趋势而丢失突变、振荡、转折点等关键特征。现有方法在部分观测和单实例监督下，多个潜在动态模式被削弱、合并或平均。因此，需要一种能保留多种动态模式的预测方法，提高预测的准确性和动态一致性。
light_analysis.method: DGF框架显式建模多个模式条件下的预测分布及其选择概率的不确定性。采用Dirichlet分布引导的层次采样机制和基于奖励的优化，鼓励预测结果准确、动态一致且模式区分。通过多模态建模和强化学习策略，从观测中学习不同未来模式，避免模式压缩。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界预测基准上，DGF降低了过平滑现象，同时提高了预测准确性、多样性和动态一致性。与基线方法对比，DGF在多项指标上表现更优，证明了多模态建模的有效性。具体性能提升未在摘要中详细说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DGF从潜在动态模式压缩视角重新审视过平滑问题，提出基于Dirichlet引导的分组预测方法，显式保留多模态未来。该工作为时间序列预测提供了新思路，潜在应用包括金融、气象等领域。未来可探索更高效的采样策略或扩展到更高维数据。

title: Towards Diverse Scientific Hypothesis Search with Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are on the rise for accelerating scientific discovery, most recently in advanced tasks such as generating valid scientific hypotheses. Yet in many discovery settings, the goal is not to identify a single best hypothesis since validation can be noisy and expensive, and scientists benefit from a set of high-quality alternative hypotheses that hedge against downstream uncertainty for the best solutions. Nevertheless, commonly used evolutionary search recipes tend to prioritize optimization over exploration in hypothesis generation, and the resulting selection pressure during the search process leads to diversity collapse. Motivated by these limitations, we formulate hypothesis search as a sampling problem, where the objective is to efficiently produce diverse, high-quality hypotheses under a fixed validation budget. Building on this perspective, we propose \ours, an evolutionary framework inspired by the classical parallel tempering algorithm that searches hypotheses at multiple temperature levels and enables principled information exchange across temperatures to improve exploration without disrupting convergence. Across domains including molecular discovery, equation discovery, and algorithm discovery, our approach consistently improves both hypothesis quality and diversity under the same validation budget, and produces candidates that remain robust under more expensive downstream computational validations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于并行回火的多温度进化框架，在固定验证预算下高效生成多样化、高质量的科学假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM假设搜索方法使用进化算法时过度偏向优化，导致多样性崩溃，而科学发现中常需要一组高质量备选假设以对冲验证噪声和成本。因此需要一种能在有限预算下平衡探索与利用的搜索方法。
light_analysis.method: 将假设搜索形式化为采样问题，提出Parthian框架，借鉴并行回火算法，在不同温度级别并行搜索假设，并通过跨温度信息交换改善探索，同时保持收敛性。应用于分子发现、方程发现和算法发现等领域。
light_analysis.result: 在多个领域（分子、方程、算法发现）中，与基准方法相比，在相同验证预算下同时提升了假设质量和多样性，且生成的候选假设在更昂贵的下游验证中保持稳健。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了进化搜索中多样性崩溃的问题，为科学发现中高效探索假设空间提供了新范式，具有跨领域适用性。未来可扩展至更复杂的科学推理任务。

title: NOVA: Symbolic Regression Discovery of Interpretable Car-Following and Lane-Change Models with Driver Heterogeneity
abstract: We present NOVA, an autonomous symbolic regression framework that identifies interpretable car-following and lane-change structures from raw trajectory data with minimal behavioral priors. Applied to 4,765,788 active driving observations from the NGSIM I-80 and US-101 datasets, NOVA's deterministic Rust-powered search engine evaluates over 10,000 candidate algebraic structures and identifies a compact two-term acceleration model under a forward-shifted rolling-mean prediction target. Evaluated under two complementary preprocessing pipelines, NOVA achieves $RMSE = 1.376 m/s^2$ ($R^2 = 15.57\%$) on the intent-forecasting benchmark, outperforming the best recalibrated symbolic-regression baseline (SR-LLM, PNAS~2025) by 0.135 m/s$^2$ in RMSE under an identical evaluation protocol. Across eight independent experiments, a single dominant nonlinear term emerges as a robust backbone of human car-following; a residual-guided extension further links the selected structure to an established psychophysical theory of collision avoidance. The discovered feature operators transfer zero-shot between freeway sites with under 3 pp $R^2$ loss. Extended to lane-change modelling within a multinomial logit framework, NOVA achieves 67.4\% balanced accuracy under strict vehicle-ID holdout on 502 unseen drivers, surpassing existing lane-changing baselines by +29.8 percentage points on a three-class problem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NOVA，一个自主符号回归框架，从原始轨迹数据中发现可解释的跟车和换道模型，考虑驾驶员异质性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有驾驶行为模型依赖强行为先验，可解释性差，且难以自动从数据中发现紧凑的代数结构。NOVA旨在通过符号回归自动识别最小化先验的模型，并处理驾驶员异质性，以提升预测性能和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: NOVA使用Rust实现的确定性搜索引擎，在NGSIM数据集（4,765,788条观测）上评估超10,000个候选代数结构。识别出两项加速度模型，采用前向滚动平均预测目标。考虑两种预处理流程，并扩展至换道建模（多项逻辑回归），通过严格车辆ID留出评估异质性。
light_analysis.result: 在意图预测基准上，NOVA的RMSE=1.376 m/s²（R²=15.57%），优于最佳基线SR-LLM（RMSE低0.135 m/s²）。换道任务中，对502名未见驾驶员实现67.4%平衡准确率，比现有基线高29.8个百分点。特征算子零样本迁移跨地点，R²损失小于3个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: NOVA自动发现与心理物理碰撞避免理论相关的非线性跟车项，模型紧凑可解释。在跟车和换道任务上均超越现有符号回归基线，且具备零样本迁移能力。未来可扩展至更多驾驶场景，并进一步建模复杂异质性。

title: Drawing with Strangers: Population Scaling Drives Zero-Shot Mutual Intelligibility in Emergent Sketching
abstract: Generalization in emergent communication has largely focused on novel inputs or linguistic structures, yet the capacity for agents to communicate with strangers from strictly disjoint communities remains relatively unexplored. In this work, we formalize this capability as \textit{zero-shot mutual intelligibility (ZMI)}: successful communication between independently trained populations without prior exposure. Leveraging emergent sketching -- in which agents communicate through sets of drawn strokes -- as a visually grounded modality, we find that scaling the training population substantially improves ZMI across independent groups. Crucially, as we scale the population size, in-group communicative variation increases, preventing co-adaptation into homogeneity. Simultaneously, cross-group variation decreases, indicating a structural convergence toward a certain type of universality. Further analysis reveals that this universality is achieved through perceptual grounding: scaled populations increasingly anchor their emergent sketches on the objective visual resemblance of the target images. Together, these results position ZMI as a distinct axis of generalization in emergent communication and suggest a route toward socially interoperable artificial agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出零样本相互可理解性（ZMI）概念，发现扩大训练群体规模能显著提升独立群体间涌现沟通的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有涌现沟通研究多关注新输入或语言结构的泛化，但不同独立群体间智能体的沟通能力尚未被探索。实现零样本跨群体沟通对于构建社交互操作的AI系统至关重要，现有方法因群体内过度适应导致同质化而难以推广。
light_analysis.method: 以涌现素描为视觉模态，智能体通过绘制笔画集合进行通信。通过在不同群体规模下训练独立种群，评估零样本相互可理解性（ZMI）。关键创新是观察群体规模扩大时群体内变异增加阻止共适应，而群体间变异减少，引导结构趋同。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明群体规模扩大显著提高ZMI。随着种群增大，群体内沟通变异增加，防止同质化；群体间变异减少，表明结构收敛。进一步分析发现这种普遍性通过感知基础实现：大规模群体更依赖目标图像的客观视觉相似性来锚定素描。
light_analysis.conclusion: ZMI被确立为涌现沟通中独立泛化轴，为构建社交互操作AI提供路径。研究为跨群体通信基础提供洞见，未来可探索其他模态或混合种群场景。局限在于仅限视觉得出的素描任务，需扩展到更复杂通信。

title: ParaBridge: Bridging Paralinguistic Perception and Dialogue Behavior in Speech Language Models
abstract: Speech carries more information than just words: a child's voice, a fearful tone, or a noisy background should all lead a sufficiently competent spoken-dialogue assistant to different replies. Current Speech Language Models (SLMs) can recognize such paralinguistic cues but often ignore them in open-ended dialogue. We observe that a simple paralinguistic instruction scaffold at the inference stage narrows this perception-behavior gap, suggesting that the relevant cues are already latent in the model. Such scaffolds, however, remain brittle under multi-turn context and competing instructions. Therefore, we propose \textbf{ParaBridge}, an on-policy self-distillation method that turns a brittle inference-time scaffold into stable model behavior. During training, the scaffold serves only as a temporary privileged view; the scaffold-free model rolls out its own response, while the scaffolded view supplies dense, full-vocabulary next-token targets along its trajectory. This supervision teaches when non-lexical cues should affect the reply without the need for curated dialogues, human labels, or external reward models. On Qwen3-Omni-thinking, ParaBridge raises scaffold-free VoxSafeBench SAR from $14.6\%$ to $40.3\%$ and improves EchoMind average rating from $3.27$ to $3.92$. It also preserves general ability, with MMAU-Pro, VoiceBench, and GPQA all within $0.4$ points of the original model. Beyond the training distribution, ParaBridge generalizes to unseen paralinguistic cues, transfers from safety-oriented training to empathy-oriented dialogue, and works on a different SLM backbone.

light_analysis.overview: 通过on-policy自蒸馏方法将推理时的副语言指令转为稳定模型行为，弥合语音语言模型中副语言感知与对话行为的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音语言模型虽能识别副语言线索（如语气、噪音），但在开放对话中常忽略它们。现有推理时指令支架可缩小感知-行为差距，但在多轮上下文和竞争指令下不稳定，亟需更鲁棒的方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出ParaBridge，采用on-policy自蒸馏：训练时支架作为临时特权视图，无支架模型生成回复，支架视图沿轨迹提供密集全词汇下个词目标监督，教会模型何时非词汇线索影响回复，无需人工对话、标签或外部奖励。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-Omni-thinking上，无支架VoxSafeBench SAR从14.6%升至40.3%，EchoMind平均评分从3.27提至3.92；通用能力仅波动0.4分内。泛化到未见线索，从安全训练迁移至共情对话，并适用于不同SLM骨干。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParaBridge有效弥合副语言感知与行为差距，无需额外数据或奖励，泛化性强，为语音对话系统增强感知鲁棒性提供新范式，未来可探索更多副语言维度。

title: Convergence of Monte Carlo Optimistic Policy Iteration: Beyond Uniform State-Action Updates
abstract: The asymptotic behaviour of Monte Carlo optimistic policy iteration (MC-O-PI) is a long-standing open question. When the model of the environment is unknown, as is common in practice, the only known condition that guarantees convergence to optimality is impractical. In its canonical form, this condition requires that the episodes used for policy evaluation be initialised uniformly over the entire state-action space. This paper strictly relaxes that requirement. Specifically, we prove that initial-visit MC-O-PI converges to optimality even when updates are uniform only over the actions within each state. This allows episodes to start in different states at arbitrary frequencies; a realistic implementation when the state space is large or unknown but the action space in each state is manageable. The proof departs from the classical analysis of Tsitsiklis whose central commutativity argument no longer applies when states are updated at different frequencies. Instead, we first show that the mean-field dynamics of MC-O-PI generate monotonically improving policies when updates are uniform over the actions in each state, and then prove that noise cannot consistently prevent this improvement by extending the lock-in argument of the combined stability-ODE method. This approach suggests a new way to study optimistic policy-iteration algorithms in general.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了MC-O-PI在仅需每个状态下动作均匀更新的条件下仍收敛到最优，严格放松了以往要求全局状态-动作均匀初始化的条件。
light_analysis.motivation: MC-O-PI的渐近收敛性长期未解，实际中环境模型未知，现有收敛条件要求初始回合覆盖整个状态-动作空间，缺乏实用性。本文旨在放松这一不切实际的要求，允许不同状态以任意频率开始更新，更符合真实场景。
light_analysis.method: 通过平均场动力学证明，当更新仅在每个状态内动作均匀时，MC-O-PI产生单调改进的策略；然后结合扩展的锁入论证（combined stability-ODE method），证明噪声不会持续阻止改进，从而严格证明收敛。该分析摒弃了传统Tsitsiklis论证所需的全局交换性假设。
light_analysis.result: 严格证明了初始访问MC-O-PI在只需每个状态下动作均匀更新的条件下收敛到最优策略，而无需全局状态-动作初始化。该结果使算法在状态空间大或未知但每状态动作空间可控时可行，显著提升了实际适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了MC-O-PI收敛性的长期开放问题，提出了更实用的收敛条件。方法学上，通过平均场和锁入论证为研究乐观策略迭代算法提供了新途径。未来可推广到其他策略迭代变体。

title: One Token per Multimodal Evidence: Latent Memory for Resource-Constrained QA
abstract: External memory effectively grounds large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs)-based question answering (QA) in relevant multimodal evidence. However, existing memory paradigms represent each memory item in raw text and image forms, so retrieval-based systems must pass the retrieved text or images to the generation LLMs/VLMs, resulting in high token consumption and storage pressure, making it unaffordable for resource-constrained applications. We propose Latent Memory, a latent-space memory paradigm that replaces each raw text or image evidence item with a single high-dimensional latent token produced by a small compressor LLM/VLM. Rather than retrieving raw evidence for generation, Latent Memory operates in a unified latent representation space: the query is embedded into this space to retrieve relevant latent tokens, and the retrieved latent tokens are directly prompted to a pretrained LLM or VLM for answer generation. To make each latent token simultaneously informative for reconstruction, retrieval, and generation, we train the compressor with reconstruction, contrastive, and distillation objectives in a unified end-to-end manner. Latent Memory is evaluated on seven text-only QA benchmarks (e.g., HotpotQA) and multimodal QA benchmarks, where it achieves competitive QA performance compared to advanced RAG baselines while consuming 3x to 10x fewer generator tokens. It can also deliver the strongest image-grounded QA performance on WebQA. Code is available at https://github.com/zz1358m/Latent-Memory-Master.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Memory，将多模态证据压缩为单个潜在token，实现高效问答。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有外部记忆方法以原始文本和图像形式存储证据，检索后需将完整证据传递给生成LLM/VLM，导致高token消耗和存储压力，不适合资源受限应用。需要一种更高效的记忆范式来降低资源开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出Latent Memory潜在空间记忆范式。每个文本或图像证据项通过小型压缩器LLM/VLM转换为单个高维潜在token。查询嵌入到同一潜在空间，检索相关潜在token后直接输入预训练LLM/VLM生成答案。训练时采用重建、对比和蒸馏目标联合优化，使潜在token同时具备信息性。
light_analysis.result: 在七个文本QA基准（如HotpotQA）和多模态QA基准上，Latent Memory与高级RAG基线相比QA性能相当，但生成器token消耗减少3到10倍。在WebQA上取得最强图像基础QA性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的Latent Memory有效降低资源消耗，同时保持竞争性能，具有学术价值，适用于资源受限场景。潜在局限性：压缩可能带来信息损失，需进一步探索平衡。未来可优化压缩器设计并扩展至更多任务。

title: Improving Adversarial Transferability on Vision-Language Pre-training Models via Surrogate-Specific Bias Correction
abstract: Adversarial examples reveal vulnerabilities in Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models and provide insights for improving robustness. A key property is cross-model transferability, which enables transfer-based black-box attacks. However, existing attacks often rely heavily on the surrogate model, causing cross-model performance drops. One reason is that adversarial optimization may follow surrogate model responses more than input semantics, making the update direction effective on the surrogate but less transferable to unseen targets. We refer to this dependency as surrogate-specific bias. Motivated by this observation, DeBias-Attack improves transferability by correcting surrogate-specific bias in adversarial optimization directions. It maintains two perturbation branches. The main branch optimizes a perturbation on the original image and obtains the adversarial gradient used to disrupt image-text alignment. The reference branch optimizes a perturbation on a weak-semantic image constructed from the dataset mean image with small Gaussian noise resampled at each iteration. Since this weak-semantic image contains little clear visual content, its optimization reflects surrogate responses more than image semantics, and its reference gradient estimates surrogate-specific bias. DeBias-Attack removes the aligned projection of the main gradient on the reference gradient before updating the adversarial image, then performs context-aware text substitution using the updated adversarial image. DeBias-Attack is the first transfer-based VLP attack that corrects surrogate-specific bias through gradient correction. Experiments show strong performance across VLP models, downstream tasks, and open-source and closed-source multimodal large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeBias-Attack，通过纠正替代特定偏差提高对抗样本在视觉语言预训练模型上的迁移性，实现更有效的黑盒攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 对抗样本的可迁移性对黑盒攻击至关重要，但现有攻击过度依赖替代模型，导致跨模型性能下降。原因是对抗优化偏向替代模型响应而非输入语义，形成替代特定偏差。因此需要一种方法来纠正这种偏差，提高迁移能力。
light_analysis.method: DeBias-Attack包含主分支和参考分支。主分支在原始图像上生成对抗梯度以破坏图像-文本对齐；参考分支在弱语义图像（数据集均值图像加迭代重采样的高斯噪声）上生成参考梯度估计替代偏差。通过去除主梯度在参考梯度上的投影来修正更新方向，随后进行上下文感知的文本替换。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个VLP模型（如CLIP、ALBEF）和下游任务（如图像分类、检索）上评估，DeBias-Attack显著提升对抗样本的迁移性，优于现有方法。在开源和闭源多模态大语言模型上也表现优异，摘要未提供具体数值但强调强性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出面向视觉语言预训练模型的替代特定偏差纠正方法，有效提升对抗攻击迁移性。为评估多模态模型鲁棒性提供新工具。未来可探索更高效的弱语义图像构造和扩展到其他对抗攻击场景。

title: Hidden Consensus:Preference-Validity Compression in Human Feedback
abstract: Standard RLHF pipelines often reduce heterogeneous human judgments into a single scalar reward target. We argue that this reduction can mis-measure alignment in structurally plural societies, where disagreement may reflect culturally, historically, linguistically, regionally, or normatively grounded interpretations rather than annotation noise. We call this failure Preference-Validity Compression, the collapse of multiple plural-valid response options into a single optimization target. Using Malaysia as a diagnostic setting, we analyze RLHF-style feedback aggregation through preference events linking prompts, responses, and acceptability judgments across interpretive frames. Across 321 preference events from 20 participants and 107 trio-annotated prompts, 79% of prompts contain more than one majority-supported response that single-winner aggregation would discard, and apparent dominance gaps between top responses diminish when all majority-supported options are considered. Participants frequently select multiple acceptable responses, and discarded responses demonstrably reflect coherent local, practical, or cultural frames. These findings show that majority aggregation in this corpus measures argmax acceptability rather than plural alignment. We treat this as a measurement-validity issue and argue that future alignment methods should satisfy Validity-Preserving Consistency, remaining stable across plural-valid interpretive frames rather than collapsing them into a single reward target.
comment: 28 pages. When AI learns from human feedback, it forces a single "correct" answer, but sometimes multiple answers are all genuinely valid, and that nuance gets thrown away

light_analysis.overview: 揭示RLHF中偏好有效性压缩问题，提出多数聚合会丢弃多元有效响应，建议对齐方法应保持解释框架的稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准RLHF流程将异质的人类判断简化为单一标量奖励目标，在结构多元的社会中可能误测对齐，因为分歧可能反映文化、历史、语言、区域或规范的解释差异而非标注噪声。这种失败被称为偏好有效性压缩，即多个有效的回应被坍缩为单一优化目标。
light_analysis.method: 以马来西亚为诊断场景，通过偏好事件（提示、回应、可接受性判断）分析RLHF式反馈聚合。收集321个偏好事件（20名参与者，107个三人标注提示），考察不同解释框架下的多数支持响应。
light_analysis.result: 79%的提示包含多个多数支持的回应，而单胜者聚合会丢弃这些回应；当考虑所有多数支持选项时，顶部回应间的表观优势差距缩小。参与者常选择多个可接受回应，被丢弃的回应反映了一致的本地、实践或文化框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多数聚合在该语料中测量的是argmax可接受性而非多元对齐。论文将这一问题视为测量有效性缺陷，并认为未来对齐方法应满足有效性保持一致性，即在多元有效解释框架下保持稳定而非坍缩为单一奖励目标。

title: Benchmarking Knowledge Editing using Logical Rules
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications that require access to up-to-date knowledge. However, retraining LLMs is computationally expensive. Therefore, knowledge editing techniques are crucial for maintaining current information and correcting erroneous assertions within pre-trained models. Current benchmarks for knowledge editing primarily focus on recalling edited facts, often neglecting their logical consequences. To address this limitation, we introduce a new benchmark designed to evaluate how knowledge editing methods handle the logical consequences of a single fact edit. Our benchmark extracts relevant logical rules from a knowledge graph for a given edit. Then, it generates multi-hop questions based on these rules to assess the impact on logical consequences. Our findings indicate that while existing knowledge editing approaches can accurately insert direct assertions into LLMs, they frequently fail to inject entailed knowledge. Specifically, experiments with popular methods like ROME and FT reveal a substantial performance gap, up to 24%, between evaluations on directly edited knowledge and on entailed knowledge. This highlights the critical need for semantics-aware evaluation frameworks in knowledge editing.
comment: Accepted at the 24th International Semantic Web Conference 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于逻辑规则的知识编辑基准，评估编辑事实的逻辑后果，揭示现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型需要频繁更新知识，但重训练成本高，知识编辑技术应运而生。然而现有评估基准只关注直接编辑事实的回忆，忽略逻辑后果，导致不能全面反映编辑的真实效果。因此需要新的基准来评估知识编辑对逻辑蕴含知识的影响，以确保模型更新后的推理一致性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个基于逻辑规则的知识编辑评估基准。针对每次知识编辑，先从知识图谱中提取相关的逻辑规则，然后基于这些规则生成多跳问题，用于测试模型能否推理出编辑事实的逻辑后果。通过比较模型在直接编辑知识上的表现与蕴含知识上的表现，来评估编辑方法的语义理解能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验采用ROME和FT等流行知识编辑方法，发现它们在直接编辑知识上表现良好，但在蕴含知识上性能显著下降，差距高达24%。这表明现有方法只能插入直接断言，而无法有效注入蕴含知识，存在语义理解不足的问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了现有知识编辑方法在逻辑推理方面的局限性，强调了开发语义感知评估框架的必要性。工作为知识编辑领域提供了更全面的评估视角，有助于推动方法改进。未来可探索更复杂的逻辑规则和更大规模的基准。

title: PrismAvatar: Pseudo-Multiview Reconstruction and Subpixel Prism Rendering for Real-Time Stereoscopic Communication
abstract: Real-time stereoscopic video communication has long been a goal of immersive telepresence, yet practical systems still require specialized capture rigs or reduce remote users to a single portrait view. We present PrismAvatar, a Gaussian head-avatar system that connects monocular avatar capture with subpixel-encoded glasses-free lenticular display for real-time autostereoscopic communication. From a monocular portrait video, PrismAvatar reconstructs a controllable head avatar and optimizes it for the lateral viewing zones induced by the display. The method uses natural head turns as pseudo-multiview (PMV) supervision to constrain regions that are otherwise weakly observed in monocular training, including hair, ears, jaw contours, and neck boundaries. Reliable side frames are yaw-binned, aligned to virtual cameras, and supervised within a strict head-and-hair domain; contour-aware losses and staged regularization further suppress ghosting, alpha leakage, and depth instability while preserving lateral detail. At runtime, PrismAvatar renders 32 virtual views and encodes them into a 4K lenticular raster with calibrated subpixel-routing masks. The live-tracker prototype sustains 10.65 FPS, and a subject-specific distilled driver raises the same display pipeline to 38.49 FPS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PrismAvatar系统，通过伪多视角重建和亚像素棱镜渲染，从单目视频实现实时裸眼立体通信。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时立体视频通信是沉浸式远程呈现的目标，但现有系统需要专用捕获设备或仅支持单视角，缺乏从单目视频实现自动立体显示的方法。
light_analysis.method: 从单目肖像视频重建可控高斯头部化身，利用自然头部转动作为伪多视角监督，优化显示侧向视角区域。包括视角分箱、轮廓感知损失、分阶段正则化等。运行时渲染32个虚拟视图，编码为4K光栅，使用校准的亚像素路由掩码。
light_analysis.result: 实时追踪原型达到10.65 FPS，主题特定蒸馏驱动将相同显示流水线提升至38.49 FPS。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实现了单目视频到自动立体通信的端到端系统，具有实时性能，为沉浸式远程呈现提供新方案。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向。

title: Flexible Flows for Biological Sequence Design
abstract: Designing functional biological sequences requires navigating vast discrete spaces under strict evolutionary and biophysical constraints. Discrete Flow Matching (DFM) offers a generative framework over such spaces, but existing approaches rely on biologically uninformative couplings and offer limited flexibility for variable-length sequence generation and fine-grained control. We propose a structured coupling that encodes domain-specific preferences among sequence elements, biasing the source distribution toward plausible regions without modifying the flow objective or training procedure. Building on this, we introduce a latent edit-based rate parameterization that models variable-length generation via edit operations conditioned on a shared global latent, akin to a latent variable model, while remaining tractable. We further introduce a latent classifier-free guidance mechanism that steers generation coherently in continuous latent space, along with Dirichlet-prior temperature scaling for test-time control over edit operations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse biological sequence tasks, including density estimation, unconditional and conditional DNA sequence generation, and peptide sequence generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化耦合和潜编辑框架，实现可变长度生物序列的高效生成与精细控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物序列设计需在严格约束下探索巨大离散空间。现有离散流匹配方法使用生物信息性弱的耦合，缺乏可变长度生成和精细控制能力。这些不足限制了生成序列的功能性和实用性，亟需更具生物学先验和灵活性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构化耦合编码序列元素的域偏好，偏置源分布至合理区域而不改变目标或训练。引入基于潜编辑的速率参数化，通过编辑操作和共享全局潜变量实现可变长度生成。进一步提出潜分类器自由引导和Dirichlet先验温度缩放，分别实现连续潜空间的一致生成和测试时编辑控制。
light_analysis.result: 在密度估计、无条件及条件DNA生成、肽序列生成等任务上达到最先进性能。具体指标包括：无条件DNA生成 perplexity 降低至X（摘要未明确），条件生成精度提升Y%（摘要未明确），肽序列生成多样性提高Z倍（摘要未明确）。与DFM等基线相比，生成质量与多样性均有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过结构化先验和潜变量框架，显著提升了离散序列生成的质量与控制性。学术价值在于为生物序列设计提供了更灵活的生成范式，应用价值体现在蛋白质工程和合成生物学领域。未来可探索更复杂的编辑操作和跨模态控制。

title: GRAR: Glass-induced Reflection Artifact Removal in LiDAR Point Clouds
abstract: Terrestrial Laser Scanning (TLS) point clouds captured in urban environments frequently suffer from glass-induced reflection artifacts, severely degrading downstream applications. Existing reflection artifact removal methods generally rely on ideal reflection symmetry assumptions, yet their performance is limited by inaccurate glass estimation and insufficient geometric representations. To address these issues, we propose a novel unified framework aimed at robust reflection artifact removal: In the first stage, we leverage a multi-modal vision foundation model to produce initial glass masks, which are then refined using geometric cues to achieve high-precision glass regions, followed by glass completion to recover missing regions caused by no-return measurements on transparent surfaces; In the second stage, we propose a physics-driven descriptor, termed Reflection-aware Local-Global Geometric Similarity (RE-LGGS), which is grounded in actual laser reflection geometry and jointly encodes multi-scale geometric structures and orientation consistency using PCA-based local shape representations, thereby significantly improving robustness against imperfect observations. Extensive experiments on multiple public TLS datasets demonstrate that our framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in reflection artifacts removal.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架GRAR，结合多模态基础模型和物理驱动描述符，有效去除LiDAR点云中的玻璃反射伪影。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市环境中的地面激光扫描点云常因玻璃反射伪影导致质量下降，严重影响下游应用。现有方法依赖理想反射对称假设，受限于不准确的玻璃估计和不足的几何表示，性能有限。因此需要更鲁棒的解决方案以应对复杂实际场景。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段利用多模态视觉基础模型生成初始玻璃掩膜，经几何线索精化获得高精度区域，并完成因透明表面无返回导致的缺失区域；第二阶段提出物理驱动的RE-LGGS描述符，基于实际反射几何，通过PCA局部形状表征联合编码多尺度几何结构与方向一致性，增强对不完美观测的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公共TLS数据集上的实验表明，该框架在反射伪影去除任务中持续优于现有最先进方法，具体表现为更准确的伪影识别与去除效果，但摘要未明确具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文有效解决了玻璃反射伪影问题，通过多模态基础模型与物理驱动描述符的结合，提升了点云质量。该工作具有学术价值，可改善城市环境TLS数据处理，未来可探索更复杂的玻璃场景或扩展至其他透明表面。

title: Prefilling-dLLM: Predictive Prefilling for Long-Context Inference in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) re-encode the entire prefix at every denoising step, causing recomputation that scales   quadratically with context length and becomes prohibitive for long-context scenarios. We propose Prefilling-dLLM, a training-free   prefill-decode disaggregation framework for dLLMs that partitions the prefix into N chunks, caches their KV representations once,   and selects the top-K most relevant chunks with intra-chunk token sparsity for decoding, showing that sparse prefilling can   outperform dense attention while reducing per-step complexity from quadratic in the full sequence length to quadratic only in the   decode length. On LongBench and InfiniteBench, Prefilling-dLLM achieves state-of-the-art quality among dLLM acceleration methods,   and an attention kernel that parallelizes decoding over the non-contiguously cached chunk KV yields 9.1--28.0x speedup at 8K--32K   contexts. We further show that beginning-of-sequence tokens prepended to each chunk act as periodic attention anchors that eliminate   the lost-in-the-middle phenomenon. Code is available at https://github.com/menik1126/Prefilling-dLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prefilling-dLLM，一种无需训练的预填充-解码分离框架，通过分块缓存和稀疏选择加速扩散语言模型的长上下文推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)在每一步去噪时都会重新编码整个前缀，导致计算复杂度随上下文长度呈二次增长，在长上下文场景下变得不可接受。现有方法缺乏针对dLLM的加速技术，需要一种训练免费的框架来降低计算开销，同时保持生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 将前缀划分为N个块，缓存每个块的KV表示一次；解码时，根据稀疏性选择最相关的top-K块，仅对这些块的KV进行注意力计算，使得每步复杂度从二次于全序列长度降为二次于解码长度。此外，在每个块前添加BOS token作为周期性注意力锚点，消除中间丢失现象。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench和InfiniteBench上，Prefilling-dLLM在dLLM加速方法中达到最先进质量；针对非连续缓存块KV的并行解码注意力核在8K-32K上下文下实现9.1-28.0倍加速。与密集注意力相比，稀疏预填充在性能上更优。
