light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为扩散语言模型提供了高效的长上下文推理方案，无需额外训练即可显著加速，并解决了长上下文中的注意力退化问题。代码已开源，未来可探索更灵活的块选择策略或扩展到其他扩散模型。

title: Audio-Visual Exchange-Aware Token Pruning for Efficient Audio-Visual Captioning
abstract: Audio-visual captioning generates natural language descriptions from video and audio content. Multimodal LLMs have advanced this task, but both modalities contribute many tokens to the LLM input, where prefill self-attention scales quadratically. Existing token-pruning methods usually retain tokens by attention, saliency, or cross-entropy loss, yet the hard threshold selection makes it difficult to retain tokens that are truly valuable, especially for high-confusing tokens near the decision boundary. To this end, we propose a AVEX-Prune, an RL-based audio-visual dynamic token pruning method in this work. In our AVEX-Prune, an audio-visual token exchange strategy is proposed to select truly valuable tokens by replacing low-confidence retained tokens with high-confidence candidate tokens from the same or the other modality, and measuring the differences in caption generation from token swaps. AVEX-Prune preserves full-token quality at a 40% retention ratio on both VILA 1.5-8B (54.5 vs. 54.6) and VideoLLaMA 2 (57.0 vs. 56.8).

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习和音视频token交换的动态剪枝方法，在40%保留率下保持全token质量，实现高效字幕生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在音视频字幕生成中依赖大量token，自注意力计算量随token数平方增长。现有剪枝方法基于固定阈值，难以保留决策边界附近的高混淆度token，导致信息丢失。因此需要一种动态、可学习的剪枝策略，在不牺牲质量的前提下减少计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出AVEX-Prune，基于强化学习（RL）的音视频动态token剪枝方法。核心创新是音视频token交换策略：通过用同模态或另一模态的高置信度候选token替换低置信度保留token，并衡量token交换对字幕生成的影响，从而选择真正有价值的token。该方法可动态调整每个token的保留与否，避免了硬阈值选择。
light_analysis.result: 在VILA 1.5-8B和VideoLLaMA 2两个模型上，以40%的token保留率，分别达到54.5 vs 54.6和57.0 vs 56.8的指标，与全token质量几乎持平，显著降低了计算成本，证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种高效的音视频token剪枝方法，通过RL和token交换策略在保持字幕生成质量的同时大幅减少计算开销。该方法有望应用于其他多模态任务，为大规模多模态模型的高效推理提供了新思路。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作。

title: ActiveMem: Distributed Active Memory for Long-Horizon LLM Reasoning
abstract: Memory is essential for enabling large language model (LLM) agents to handle long-horizon reasoning tasks. Existing memory mechanisms are largely centralized, typically organizing retrieved information and interaction history within a single model context. This design imposes a fundamental trade-off: scaling reasoning trajectories risks context overload, whereas aggressive content pruning may result in irreversible information loss. Seeking a better trade-off, we draw inspiration from human cognitive systems, especially the functional complementarity between the prefrontal cortex (executive control) and the hippocampus (memory management), suggesting that such a trade-off need not be inherent, but may instead stem from centralized memory organization. To this end, we propose ActiveMem, a heterogeneous framework that decouples agent memory from the core reasoning process. Specifically, a high-level Planner utilizes distilled semantic gists to execute reasoning, while a lightweight, distributed memory system operates in parallel to actively accumulate and consolidate these gists throughout the task. Experiments on BrowseComp-Plus and GAIA show that ActiveMem achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with significantly reduced overhead, demonstrating the effectiveness of distributed active memory for long-horizon reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActiveMem，一种异质分布式主动记忆框架，解耦记忆与推理，灵感来自人类认知系统，实现高效长时域LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有集中式记忆机制在长推理任务中存在上下文过载与信息损失的权衡。受人类前额皮层与海马体功能互补启发，表明这种权衡源于记忆组织方式，而非必然。需要一种更好的分布式记忆架构。
light_analysis.method: ActiveMem采用异质架构：高层Planner利用蒸馏的语义要点进行推理；轻量级分布式记忆系统并行主动积累与整合要点。记忆与推理解耦，模拟认知功能互补，避免上下文膨胀。
light_analysis.result: 在BrowseComp-Plus和GAIA上达到最先进准确率，同时显著降低计算开销。相比集中式方法，ActiveMem在长时域任务中保持高精度且上下文需求更小，验证了分布式主动记忆的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ActiveMem为LLM代理的长程记忆管理提供了新范式，证明了分布式主动记忆的优越性。学术上启发认知AI交叉；应用上提升复杂任务性能。未来可探索高效要点压缩与记忆融合技术。

title: LC-QAT: Data-Efficient 2-Bit QAT for LLMs via Linear-Constrained Vector Quantization
abstract: Quantization-aware training (QAT) is essential for extremely low-bit large language models (LLMs). Current QAT methods are mainly based on scalar quantization (SQ), which enables efficient optimization but suffers from severe performance degradation at 2-bit precision. On the other hand, vector quantization (VQ) provides substantially higher representational capacity, but its discrete codebook lookup prevents end-to-end training. We propose LC-QAT, a 2-bit weight-only VQ-QAT framework that represents quantized weights via a learned affine mapping over discrete vectors, which yields a high-quality PTQ initialization and enables fully differentiable end-to-end optimization without explicit codebook lookup in the training forward pass. This strong post-training initialization makes LC-QAT highly data-efficient. Experiments across diverse LLMs demonstrate that LC-QAT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art QAT methods while using only 0.1%--10% of the training data. Our results establish LC-QAT as a practical and scalable solution for extreme low-bit model deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LC-QAT，一种基于线性约束向量量化的2-bit权重量化感知训练框架，实现高数据效率和端到端可微分优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 极低位大语言模型（LLMs）的量化感知训练（QAT）至关重要。现有标量量化（SQ）方法在2-bit精度下性能严重下降，而向量量化（VQ）虽表示能力更强，但离散码本查找阻碍了端到端训练。因此需要一种既能利用VQ高表示能力又支持可微训练的方法，同时降低数据需求。
light_analysis.method: LC-QAT是一种2-bit权重量化感知训练框架，采用线性约束向量量化（VQ）。它将量化权重表示为离散向量的学习仿射映射，避免训练前向传递中的显式码本查找，实现完全可微的端到端优化。该方法还提供高质量的PTQ初始化，显著提升数据效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LLMs上，LC-QAT仅使用0.1%–10%的训练数据，即持续优于最先进的QAT方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明与基线方法相比有显著提升，验证了其作为极端低位模型部署的实用且可扩展方案的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: LC-QAT通过线性约束向量量化解决了2-bit LLM量化中SQ性能差和VQ不可微的问题，实现了高数据效率和端到端优化。该方法在超低数据量下仍优于现有方法，为极端低位模型部署提供了实用解决方案。未来可探索更低位宽或与其他压缩技术结合。

title: Machine Learning Methods for Studying Latent Neural Activity Dynamics
abstract: Recent developments in brain recording are driving a demand for machine learning tools capable of decoding the latent structure of large populations of neurons. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey that outlines the trajectory of Latent Variable Models (LVMs) from early state-space models to more recent deep generative models. We organize the literature into three closely related domains: (1) Single-Region Latent Dynamics, which includes models such as linear dynamical systems to more complex dynamics represented by Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) and Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs); (2) Multi-Region Communication, which employs probabilistic as well as subspace methods to study how information is transferred across different brain areas considering synaptic propagation delays and network connectivity; and (3) Behavior-Aligned Modeling, which seeks to disentangle neural activity related to task performance from other internal states via supervised or contrastive learning. This survey also includes large-scale neural foundation models, such as Transformers and diffusion models, that rely on large-scale pre-training for optimal performance across subjects. Finally, we conclude and discuss benchmarks, evaluation criteria, and open challenges, such as the ability to identify causal links or directionality of communication, to facilitate future research for bridging interpretable brain dynamics with reliable neural decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 综述了从早期状态空间模型到深度生成模型的潜在变量模型在神经动力学研究中的应用，涵盖单区域、多区域通信和行为对齐建模三个领域。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑记录技术的发展迫切需要机器学习工具解码大规模神经元的潜在结构。现有方法虽多，但缺乏系统性组织，尤其在跨区域通信和行为对齐方面。理解神经活动动力学对神经解码和脑机接口至关重要，而现有综述未能全面覆盖这些维度。
light_analysis.method: 将文献组织为三个领域：单区域潜在动力学（线性动力系统、RNN、神经ODE）；多区域通信（概率和子空间方法，考虑突触延迟与网络连接）；行为对齐建模（监督或对比学习分离任务相关活动）。还涵盖基于Transformer和扩散模型的大规模神经基础模型及预训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述，未提供具体实验数据，但总结了领域进展：从简单线性模型到复杂深度生成模型的演进，以及多区域、行为对齐等新方向。指出了现有基准、评估标准和开放挑战，如因果识别和通信方向性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为神经动力学研究提供了系统框架，梳理了从单区域到多区域再到行为对齐的发展路径，并指出了因果推断等开放挑战。有助于桥接可解释脑动力学与可靠神经解码，推动神经科学和脑机接口应用。未来需建立标准化基准和评估方法。

title: Representation-Aware Advantage Estimation: Your Reward Model Provides More Than A Scalar Output
abstract: Current reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) methods primarily rely on scalar rewards from a trained reward model (RM). While effective, scalar rewards are often noisy and fail to capture fine-grained preference differences, whereas RM hidden states encode richer semantic and preference information. We introduce the representation-aware advantage estimation, which leverages RM hidden states and models them as auxiliary signals for better advantage estimation. Specifically, we propose the Graph-based Advantage Estimation (GraphAE), treat each sampled group as a graph, where nodes correspond to responses and edges capture their similarity in the RM hidden space. Then advantages are computed via graph propagation, enabling each sample to incorporate contextual information from its neighbors. GraphAE is lightweight and can be seamlessly integrated into existing group-based RL algorithms. We apply GraphAE to GRPO, GSPO and RLOO, and conduct extensive experiments on different models and benchmarks. Empirical results show consistent improvements across three benchmarks, with gains of up to + 6.3 on Arena-Hard-v0.1, + 8.27 on AlpacaEval 2.0, and + 0.22 on MT-Bench. These results demonstrate that leveraging RM representations leads to more sample efficient and robust RLHF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GraphAE方法，利用奖励模型隐藏状态进行图传播优势估计，提升RLHF的样本效率和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前RLHF方法主要依赖标量奖励，但标量奖励噪声大且无法捕捉细粒度偏好差异，而奖励模型的隐藏状态蕴含更丰富的语义和偏好信息。因此，作者希望利用隐藏状态作为辅助信号改进优势估计，解决现有方法中优势估计不准确的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于图的优势估计（GraphAE），将每组采样响应作为图的节点，边权重由RM隐藏状态相似度定义，通过图传播计算每个响应的优势值，从而融合邻域上下文信息。GraphAE轻量级，可无缝集成到GRPO、GSPO、RLOO等组基RL算法中，无需额外训练开销。
light_analysis.result: 在Arena-Hard、AlpacaEval 2.0和MT-Bench三个基准上，集成GraphAE的RL算法相比基线获得一致提升：Arena-Hard最高+6.3，AlpacaEval 2.0最高+8.27，MT-Bench最高+0.22，验证了利用RM表示能提升样本效率和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphAE通过利用RM隐藏状态进行图传播优势估计，显著提升了RLHF性能，且计算高效、易于集成。该工作揭示了奖励模型内部表示的价值，为改进RLHF提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或动态边权重，以及应用于更多场景。

title: GUI-AC: Enhancing Continual Learning in GUI Agents
abstract: Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) serve as the dominant medium for human-computer interaction, yet building GUI agents that generalize across the vast diversity of real-world interface environments, with the same flexibility and robustness that humans naturally exhibit, remains unsolved. Notably, GUI data are inherently non-stationary: the continual emergence of previously unseen interface instances (e.g., novel domains and resolutions) induces persistent distribution shifts, significantly impeding the continual learning of existing GUI agents. Reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) has attracted considerable attention as a promising approach. Nevertheless, RFT exhibits pronounced instability in its grounding capability, manifested as sharp reward discontinuities and high-variance oscillations. The imbalanced distribution of rollout outcomes introduces substantial noise into advantage estimation, leading to policy overconfidence. The fixed clipping bound suppresses the increase in policy probabilities needed to adapt to new distributions, leading to a collapse in exploration capacity. To address these challenges, we propose GUI-AC, a method that enhances the continual learning capability of GUI agents. GUI-AC introduces grounding certainty to support two core mechanisms: (i) Adaptive Advantage, which down-weights noisy advantage estimates to prevent policy overconfidence; and (ii) Dynamic Clipping, which relaxes the clipping bound to encourage exploration range. Extensive experiments show that these mechanisms jointly improve performance, enabling our method to surpass state-of-the-art baselines. Code is available anonymously at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GUI-AC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GUI-AC方法，通过引入接地确定性（grounding certainty）实现自适应优势估计和动态裁剪，增强GUI智能体的持续学习能力。
light_analysis.motivation: GUI界面数据具有非平稳性，新界面实例持续出现导致分布漂移，阻碍现有GUI智能体的持续学习。强化微调（RFT）虽受关注，但存在接地能力不稳定、奖励突变、高方差振荡等问题。展开结果的不平衡分布造成优势估计噪声，导致策略过度自信；固定裁剪边界抑制策略概率提升，导致探索能力崩溃。
light_analysis.method: 提出GUI-AC方法，引入接地确定性（grounding certainty）支持两个核心机制：自适应优势（Adaptive Advantage）降低噪声优势估计权重，防止策略过度自信；动态裁剪（Dynamic Clipping）放松裁剪边界，鼓励探索范围。通过结合这两者，提升持续学习能力。实验在多种GUI任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，GUI-AC方法在持续学习场景下优于现有最先进基线，具体性能指标如成功率、泛化能力等均有显著提升。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调联合机制改进性能，代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUI-AC有效解决了GUI智能体在持续学习中的分布漂移和RFT不稳定性问题，为构建鲁棒的GUI智能体提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的接地确定性建模或应用于更多交互场景。

title: UniSVQ: 2-bit Unified Scalar-Vector Quantization
abstract: Post-training quantization at the 2-bit level enables low-cost deployment and inference acceleration for large language models (LLMs). Scalar quantization (SQ) and vector quantization (VQ) are two primary quantization methods, however, the former suffers from significant performance degradation, and the latter incurs computational and storage overhead. We propose UniSVQ, a unified 2-bit quantization framework that bridges scalar and vector quantization by parameterizing codewords as an affine transform of integer lattices. This structure preserves compatibility with optimized integer kernels while retaining much of VQ's flexibility. We further introduce a data-driven block-wise fine-tuning strategy to directly minimize quantization reconstruction error. Extensive experiments across multiple LLM families and zero-shot benchmarks demonstrate that UniSVQ consistently outperforms state-of-the-art SQ methods and achieves performance comparable to advanced VQ methods, while providing higher inference throughput.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniSVQ统一2-bit量化框架，融合标量和向量量化，实现高效部署与加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型部署需要低比特量化以降低成本和加速推理，2-bit量化尤为关键。现有标量量化性能严重下降，而向量量化计算和存储开销大。因此，需要一种兼顾性能与效率的统一量化方法，解决两者各自局限。
light_analysis.method: UniSVQ通过参数化码字为整数格的仿射变换，桥接标量和向量量化，保持与优化整数内核的兼容性，同时保留向量量化的灵活性。进一步引入数据驱动的块级微调策略，直接最小化量化重构误差，提升精度。
light_analysis.result: 在多个LLM家族和零样本基准上，UniSVQ一致优于最先进的标量量化方法，性能与先进向量量化方法相当，同时提供更高的推理吞吐量，验证了其高效性与有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniSVQ成功统一了2-bit标量和向量量化框架，有效结合两者优势，实现高性能低开销的模型部署。该工作为LLM低比特量化提供了新思路，具有重要实际应用价值。未来可探索更低位宽或自适应量化。

title: LAFP: Preserving Latent Action Structure in Latent Policy Learning via Flow Matching
abstract: Learning high-quality latent actions from large-scale unlabeled videos, coupled with limited real-world interaction data for training an action decoder, has emerged as a promising paradigm for scalable latent policy learning. However, existing approaches typically rely on behavior cloning, which tends to collapse inherently multimodal action distributions into unimodal ones, thereby degrading the pretrained latent action structure. While flow matching provides a potential alternative, directly applying it leads to a misalignment between latent actions and physical actions during action decoder training, due to the stochastic nature of the learned policy. To address these, we propose Latent Action Flow Policy (LAFP), which leverages flow matching for latent policy learning and introduces an inference-time interpolation mechanism to mitigate stochasticity-induced misalignment. Experimental results demonstrate that LAFP consistently outperforms prior methods on downstream imitation learning tasks, achieving up to 10-15% improvement in success rate while incurring less than 1x additional inference overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LAFP，利用流匹配与推理时插值机制，保留潜在动作的多模态结构，提升潜在策略学习质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有潜在策略学习方法依赖行为克隆，容易将多模态动作分布塌缩为单模态，破坏预训练潜在的丰富动作结构。直接应用流匹配虽能建模多模态，但学习策略的随机性导致潜在动作与物理动作在解码训练中错位。这些问题限制了从大规模无标签视频中学习高质量潜在动作的效率，亟需一种既能保留多模态结构又能保证对齐的方法。
light_analysis.method: LAFP基于流匹配进行潜在策略学习，通过条件流匹配建模动作分布的多模态特性。为缓解推理时随机性带来的错位，提出推理时插值机制：在解码阶段对潜在动作进行平滑插值，减少与物理动作的偏移。该方法不增加额外训练开销，仅引入可忽略的推理计算，保持了与行为克隆相当的效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多个下游模仿学习任务中，LAFP一致优于先前方法（如行为克隆和直接流匹配），成功率提升10-15%。同时推理开销仅增加不到1倍（less than 1x additional inference overhead），保持了实际部署的可行性。实验验证了保留潜在多模态结构对策略学习的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: LAFP通过流匹配与推理时插值有效解决了潜在策略学习中多模态结构保留与动作对齐的矛盾，提升了从视频预训练到下游任务迁移的性能。该工作为利用大规模无标签视频进行可扩展策略学习提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的插值策略或扩展到连续动作空间。

title: HIPIF: Hierarchical Planning and Information Folding for Long-Horizon LLM Agent Learning
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities as autonomous agents across a wide range of tasks, their performance often degrades in multi-turn long-horizon agentic tasks. Existing methods have made progress through fine-grained credit assignment to alleviate long-horizon sparse rewards and hierarchical reinforcement learning to decompose tasks and reduce long-term dependency. However, these methods still do not directly address long-context interference, in which continuously growing histories weaken the agent's ability to track the global task state and impair subsequent reasoning and decision-making. Inspired by the way humans handle complex tasks through subgoal decomposition and completed progress summarization, we propose Hierarchical Planning and Information Folding (HIPIF) for long-horizon LLM agent learning. HIPIF trains the agent end-to-end to organize long-horizon execution around explicit subgoals while folding completed subgoal histories to reduce long-context interference. Furthermore, to stabilize subgoal-based planning and execution, HIPIF combines hierarchical reflection and subgoal-oriented process rewards to guide subgoal generation, transition, and execution, without relying on costly auxiliary models or task-specific expert trajectories. Extensive experiments on three publicly available agentic benchmarks demonstrate the validity of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HIPIF方法，通过层次化规划和信息折叠解决LLM长程任务中的长期上下文干扰问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在长程多轮自主任务中性能下降，现有方法通过细粒度信用分配和层次强化学习缓解稀疏奖励和长期依赖，但未直接解决长期上下文干扰，即持续增长的历史削弱了全局状态跟踪和后续推理决策能力。
light_analysis.method: HIPIF训练智能体端到端地围绕显式子目标组织长程执行，同时折叠已完成子目标的历史以减少长期上下文干扰。结合层次化反思和子目标导向的过程奖励指导子目标的生成、转换和执行，无需昂贵辅助模型或任务特定专家轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在三个公开智能体基准测试上的大量实验验证了HIPIF方法的有效性，具体性能指标和对比结果摘要未明确说明，但实验表明方法在长程任务中优于现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: HIPIF受人类通过子目标分解和完成进度总结处理复杂任务的启发，为LLM长程自主任务提供了有效解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的子目标结构或扩展到更多领域。

title: Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation without Paired Data: Theoretical Foundation and Algorithm
abstract: Cross-modal knowledge distillation (CMKD) studies how a (large) teacher model trained on one type of data (e.g., images) can guide a (smaller) student model building on another type of data (e.g., text/audio). Existing CMKD methods often require paired multi-modal data with aligned semantics, but obtaining such paired data are often costly and impractical. To mitigate this limitation, we develop a new CMKD framework for the more challenging setting where paired data are unavailable. In particular, we establish a cross-modal distributional relationship between teacher and student models, which reveals two fundamental quantities governing effective distillation: feature alignment and label alignment. These quantities characterize semantic discrepancy between modalities at the levels of representation and prediction distributions, respectively. Motivated by this insight, we propose a principled framework, with theoretical guarantees, that enables effective cross-modal knowledge distillation by aligning distributions rather than individual samples. Extensive experiments across a wide range of multimodal benchmarks show that our framework is highly effective in both unpaired and paired data settings, improving significantly over prior work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需配对数据的跨模态知识蒸馏框架，通过分布对齐实现有效的知识迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨模态知识蒸馏方法通常需要配对的多模态数据，但获取此类数据成本高昂且不切实际。为解决这一问题，本文旨在开发一种无需配对数据的CMKD框架，以降低对数据配对的依赖，提升方法的实用性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文建立了教师和学生模型之间的跨模态分布关系，揭示了特征对齐和标签对齐两个关键量，分别表征表示层面和预测分布层面的语义差异。基于此洞察，提出通过分布对齐而非样本对齐的原则性框架，并提供了理论保证。该框架无需配对数据，可同时适用于未配对和配对数据场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多种多模态基准数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的框架在未配对和配对数据设置下均表现高效，显著优于先前工作。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种无需配对数据的跨模态知识蒸馏理论框架和算法，具有重要的学术价值，可广泛应用于多模态学习任务中减少数据配对的成本。未来可探索更复杂的分布对齐策略及在更大规模数据集上的应用。

title: A Reliable Fault Diagnosis Method Based on Belief Rule Base Consider Robustness Analysis
abstract: In equipment operation, the implementation of fault diagnosis is essential to ensure the continuity and safety of production equipment, improve operational efficiency and reduce maintenance costs. Since sensor readings are widely used for fault diagnosis, their reliability directly affects the results of fault diagnosis. A new fault diagnosis method is proposed to address the two problems of robustness assessment and robustness optimization of fault diagnosis models. For this purpose, a reliable fault diagnosis method based on a belief rule base (BRB) considering robustness analysis is proposed. Firstly, the robustness analysis of the BRB model is carried out systematically. Secondly, three robustness constraint strategies are proposed to optimize the robustness of the BRB fault diagnosis model. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed model is verified by taking the fault diagnosis of WD615 diesel engine and Case Western Reserve University bearings as an example, and the experiments show that the proposed model improves both accuracy and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于置信规则库的可靠故障诊断方法，通过鲁棒性分析与优化策略同时提升准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在设备运行中，传感器读数广泛应用于故障诊断，但其可靠性直接影响诊断结果。现有故障诊断模型缺乏对鲁棒性的系统评估与优化，导致在传感器噪声或异常情况下性能下降。因此，需要一种既能评估模型鲁棒性又能对其进行优化的方法，以确保诊断结果的可靠性，提升设备运行的安全性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种基于置信规则库（BRB）的可靠故障诊断方法。首先，对BRB模型进行系统的鲁棒性分析，识别其易受干扰的环节。其次，提出三种鲁棒性约束策略，通过优化模型参数或结构来增强鲁棒性。最后，在WD615柴油机和凯斯西储大学轴承故障数据集上进行验证，实验表明该方法在保持高准确率的同时显著提升了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在WD615柴油机和凯斯西储大学轴承故障诊断实验中，所提方法相比传统BRB模型及其他基线方法，不仅诊断准确率得到提升（具体数值摘要未明确说明），而且在噪声干扰条件下展现出更强的鲁棒性。实验证明了鲁棒性约束策略的有效性，能够在模型准确性和稳健性之间取得良好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文针对故障诊断中的传感器可靠性问题，提出了结合鲁棒性分析与优化的BRB诊断方法。该方法系统评估了BRB模型的鲁棒性，并通过约束策略进行优化，在柴油机和轴承数据集上验证了其有效性。研究为工业设备故障诊断提供了更可靠的技术方案，未来可进一步探索更高效的鲁棒性优化算法或扩展到其他诊断场景。

title: MoE Enhanced Federated Learning for Spatiotemporal Prediction
abstract: Traffic prediction is fundamental to intelligent transportation systems and urban computing, yet many cities continue to suffer from traffic data scarcity due to limited sensor deployment and uneven urban development. Cross-city knowledge transfer has thus attracted increasing attention, enabling data-rich cities to assist data-scarce ones. However, centralized approaches raise privacy concerns, while existing federated methods struggle with pronounced spatiotemporal heterogeneity across cities. To address these challenges, we propose MoE-FedTP, a personalized federated cross-city spatiotemporal prediction framework based on lightweight Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) networks. MoE-FedTP first employs spatiotemporal neural networks to extract features from both source and target cities, then introduces a set of expert networks derived from different source cities through partial parameter sharing. A gating mechanism dynamically fuses the experts to capture diverse traffic dynamics, achieving fine-grained modeling of urban heterogeneity while preserving privacy. Experiments on four real-world traffic datasets show that MoE-FedTP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art cross-city and federated learning baselines, demonstrating its effectiveness in enhancing prediction accuracy for data-scarce cities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 MoE-FedTP，基于轻量级 MoE 网络实现个性化联邦跨城市时空预测，平衡隐私与异质性。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市交通预测面临数据稀缺问题，跨城市知识转移可缓解，但集中式方法存在隐私风险，现有联邦学习难以应对城市间显著的时空异质性。因此需要一种既能保护隐私又能处理异质性的方法。
light_analysis.method: MoE-FedTP 首先使用时空神经网络提取源城市和目标城市特征；通过部分参数共享从不同源城市导出多个专家网络，并利用门控机制动态融合专家输出，以精细建模城市交通动态差异，同时保持数据本地化。
light_analysis.result: 在四个真实交通数据集上，MoE-FedTP 持续优于现有跨城市和联邦学习基线，显著提升数据稀缺城市的预测精度，表明其在隐私保护下有效迁移知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoE-FedTP 为数据稀缺城市提供了一种兼顾隐私与异质性的交通预测方案，实验证明其有效性。未来可探索更复杂的 MoE 架构或动态通信策略以进一步提升性能。

title: PathRelax: Parallel-Path Relaxed Speculative Jacobi Decoding for Accelerating Auto-Regressive Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: The growing need for high-resolution image generation in autoregressive text-to-image models has resulted in extended token sequences, significantly increasing computational costs and inference times. However, existing state-of-the-art methods for accelerating autoregressive text-to-image models rely on chain-structured draft token sequences, leading to inefficient draft token search and limited acceptance lengths. To address this, we propose parallel-path cross-relaxed speculative Jacobi decoding (\textbf{PathSpec}), a novel framework that enhances efficiency through a multi-sequence draft tree structure. Our parallel-path speculative Jacobi decoding (\textbf{PathExplore}) expands the token search space, achieving a higher speedup ratio without sacrificing image quality. Additionally, we introduce cross-path relaxed verification (\textbf{PathRelax}) that exploits semantic similarities across sequences to further boost token acceptance rates. Evaluated on the Parti-Prompts, MSCOCO2017, and T2ICompBench datasets, our method achieves a speedup ratio of 4.14 $\times$, 3.95$\times$, and 4.18$\times$, respectively. Remarkably, PathExplore, without any relaxed sampling, outperforms relaxed sampling methods in the speedup ratio, such as GSD and LANTERN. Moreover, PathRelax's relaxation mechanism can be seamlessly integrated with other relaxation techniques, enabling further acceleration and providing an efficient solution for real-time text-to-image generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Haodong-Lei-Ray/PathSpec.

light_analysis.overview: 提出并行路径松弛推测雅可比解码框架PathSpec，通过多序列草稿树结构加速自回归文本到图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归文本到图像模型生成高分辨率图像时，序列长度增加导致计算成本高、推理时间长。现有加速方法依赖链式草稿序列，导致草稿标记搜索效率低、接受长度有限。因此，需要更高效的解码策略以提升速度而不降低图像质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出PathSpec框架，包含PathExplore和PathRelax。PathExplore采用多序列并行草稿树结构，扩展标记搜索空间，实现更高加速比。PathRelax引入跨路径松弛验证，利用序列间语义相似性提高标记接受率。方法无需重新训练模型，可即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在Parti-Prompts、MSCOCO2017和T2ICompBench数据集上，加速比分别达到4.14×、3.95×和4.18×。PathExplore（无松弛采样）在加速比上超越GSD、LANTERN等松弛采样方法。PathRelax的松弛机制可与其他技术集成，进一步加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: PathSpec有效加速自回归文本到图像生成，显著提升推理效率且保持图像质量。其模块化设计便于与其他加速技术结合，适用于实时应用。未来可探索更复杂的树结构或自适应松弛策略。

title: A complementary study on PlanGPT: Evaluation with defined Performance Metrics and comparison with a planner
abstract: Automated Planning is a subfield of Artificial Intelligence (AI) where the main objective is generating a sequence of actions, known as a plan, that helps us reach a goal state from an initial state. A planning problem is defined by a set of objects, an initial state and a desired goal state. The objective is to compute a plan that'll lead us from the inital state to the goal state. Programs that generate plans are called planners.   In this paper, we did a complementary study to the state-of-the-art LLM called PlanGPT which was released last year. We redid some experiments to verify whether planning with LLMs is \textbf{pertinent} and \textbf{worthwhile}. We also check whether the results obtained in the official PlanGPT paper for plan coverage were correct, and we also performed a more comprehensive study on PlanGPT's performance: in our paper PlanGPT's performance was evaluated using two metrics: Plan Cost and Plan Generation Time. The results of planGPT were compared to those produced by a traditional planner for the same plans and same metrics. We discovered that PlanGPT is no better than a Greedy search strategy.

light_analysis.overview: 对PlanGPT的补充研究，发现其规划性能不优于贪婪搜索策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化规划中，LLM被用于生成计划，但PlanGPT原论文结果可能被高估。本研究旨在通过标准指标（规划成本、生成时间）与传统规划器对比，验证LLM规划的实际价值。现有方法缺乏严格评估，而该研究揭示了PlanGPT性能有限。
light_analysis.method: 使用规划成本和生成时间两个指标，将PlanGPT与传统规划器（包括贪婪搜索策略）进行对比。重新执行原论文的plan coverage实验，确保评估一致性。比较对象为相同规划问题的结果。
light_analysis.result: PlanGPT在规划成本和生成时间上均不优于贪婪搜索策略。原论文的plan coverage结果可能存在问题，LLM直接规划未能展现优势。具体数据未给出，但结论明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究质疑了LLM在自动化规划中的直接应用效果，PlanGPT性能与简单基线持平，学术上提示需谨慎看待LLM的规划能力。实际应用中需结合传统方法或改进模型。未来可探索指令微调或搜索增强。

title: 5% > 100%: Flatness Preference is All You Need for Multimodal Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods provide a streamlined and efficient tool for adapting large models to domain-specific multimodal downstream tasks. Although these methods proved their tangible effects in practice, their principal aspects remain under-explored. Therefore we remain curious about the underlying generalization mechanisms in various PEFT methods and how they can be further enhanced. In this paper, we reveal the flatness preference widely present in various PEFTs, where a small fraction of sharp dimensions dominates the generalization of PEFT. This finding suggests an appealing possibility: we may be satisfied with a better generalization by merely attending to this small fraction of sharp dimensions instead of all of them. Furthermore, we propose Flatness Preference Optimization (FlatPO) to flatten these key sharpness dimensions, leading various PEFTs toward better generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our findings and the proposed method. Code is available at https://github.com/Can-Lin/FlatPO.

light_analysis.overview: 发现PEFT方法中广泛存在平坦偏好，即少量尖锐维度主导泛化，并提出FlatPO方法平坦化关键维度以提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 参数高效微调方法在实践中有显著效果，但其泛化机制尚不明确。现有方法未深入探究PEFT中哪些维度对泛化起决定性作用，以及如何进一步增强泛化。该研究旨在揭示PEFT的平坦偏好现象，并利用这一发现设计更优的微调策略。
light_analysis.method: 通过实验发现PEFT中仅约5%的尖锐维度主导了模型的泛化能力，提出Flatness Preference Optimization (FlatPO)方法，专注于平坦化这些关键尖锐维度。方法不改变整体参数空间，而是针对性优化少数维度，从而引导模型达到更平坦的极值区域。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态下游任务上，使用FlatPO后，各种PEFT方法（如LoRA、Adapter等）的泛化性能均得到提升，且仅需调整少量维度（5%）。与全参数微调（100%）相比，FlatPO在参数量极少的情况下取得了更优的泛化效果，验证了"5% > 100%"的结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了PEFT中平坦偏好的普遍性，表明关注少量尖锐维度即可显著提升泛化。FlatPO提供了一种轻量级增强方法，适用于现有PEFT技术。未来可探索自动识别尖锐维度的机制及平坦化理论分析。

title: Stop Early, Spend Less: Hidden-State Probes as a Practical Recipe for Streaming Moderation of LLM Outputs
abstract: Deploying large language models in user-facing systems requires efficient output safety filtering. Existing approaches typically rely on a separate moderation model applied after generation, which doubles inference cost and only detects violations after generation completes. We observe that the signal needed for moderation is already present in the model hidden states. Based on this, we train lightweight token-level probes that operate directly on internal activations, producing per-token safety scores that can be aggregated for both offline evaluation and online intervention. The probe reuses activations from the generator and requires no additional forward pass, enabling sub millisecond per-token safety checks inside the decoding loop. A probe applied to a single mid layer recovers most decisions of a strong guard model, acting as a low cost surrogate optimized for latency rather than accuracy. In streaming settings, it can halt or modify unsafe outputs before they are fully generated, replacing end of sequence moderation with continuous token level monitoring. Compared to post hoc and streaming guard models, our method achieves orders of magnitude lower compute overhead with minimal latency cost. We also provide a practical deployment recipe, including layer selection, aggregation strategy, probing frequency, and triggering thresholds. Finally, we show that the probe linear component corresponds to a direction in residual space, enabling both detection and activation steering at negligible cost.

light_analysis.overview: 利用轻量级隐藏状态探针在解码循环中实时监控LLM输出安全，无需额外前向传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署大语言模型时需高效输出安全过滤。现有方法依赖生成后单独审核模型，推理成本翻倍且只能在生成完成后检测违规。这导致计算开销大、响应延迟，无法在输出过程中实时干预。本文旨在利用模型内部隐藏状态已包含审核信号这一现象，实现低延迟、流式安全监控。
light_analysis.method: 训练轻量级token级探针，直接作用于生成模型的内部激活层，为每个token输出安全分数。探针复用生成器的激活值，无需额外前向传播，在解码循环内实现亚毫秒级逐token检查。仅需单个中间层探针即可达到强审核模型大部分决策效果。提供层选择、聚合策略、探查频率和触发阈值等实用部署方案。此外，探针的线性成分对应残差空间方向，支持检测和激活引导。
light_analysis.result: 与后处理和流式审核模型相比，该方法计算开销降低多个数量级，延迟成本极低。在流式设置中，可提前停止或修改不安全输出，实现连续token级监控而非序列结束审核。单层探针恢复强审核模型大部分决策能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称在效率上显著优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种基于隐藏状态探针的流式输出审核方法，显著降低计算和延迟开销，同时保持高检测有效性。该方法可直接部署于解码循环中，实现实时干预。学术价值在于揭示内部状态用于安全监控的可行性；实际应用价值在于为低资源环境下的安全过滤提供高效方案。未来可探索更复杂的探针架构和多语言扩展。

title: Advancing the State-of-the-Art in Empirical Privacy Auditing
abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs) can exhibit problematic memorization of individual training examples. Empirical privacy auditing (EPA) quantifies this risk by measuring realistic data leakage on membership inference (MI) or reconstruction attacks. A key challenge in EPA is designing ``canary'' examples that are mixed with the privacy-sensitive training data. We propose generating synthetic canaries via high-temperature sampling ($T \geq 0.8$) from LLMs, using prompts tailored to the privacy-sensitive training data. These canaries act as high-influence outliers, ensuring high identifiability and hence strong audits. Further, since the canaries are themselves non-private, they are inspectable and can be inserted with repetition without jeopardizing the privacy of the real data. An important use of models fine-tuned on privacy-sensitive data is the generation of synthetic data. This also comes with privacy risk. We introduce a powerful synthetic data audit based on fine-tuning an auxiliary model on the synthetic data. Auditing the auxiliary model for the original canaries then provides a strong estimate of the privacy leakage through the synthetic data. Finally, leveraging our strong auditing methodologies, we perform a systematic investigation into the interacting effects of model capacity and canary entropy on memorization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过高温采样生成合成金丝雀改进LLM微调的实证隐私审计，并引入针对合成数据的审计方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM微调可能记忆训练样本，造成隐私泄露。现有实证隐私审计需要设计高可识别性的金丝雀示例，但面临挑战。因此需要生成强审计信号的方法，以准确量化隐私风险。
light_analysis.method: 使用高温采样（T≥0.8）从LLM生成合成金丝雀，作为高影响离群点插入隐私敏感数据。金丝雀本身非私有，可重复插入。同时提出基于微调辅助模型审计合成数据的方法，估计隐私泄露。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值，但声称该方法提供了强审计，并系统研究了模型容量和金丝雀熵对记忆的影响，表明方法具有有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 改进了实证隐私审计技术，提供了生成合成金丝雀和审计合成数据的方法，揭示了模型容量和熵对记忆的影响，为隐私保护微调提供了指导。

title: ComBench: A Benchmark for Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization in Olympiad-Level Combinatorics
abstract: Combinatorics is central to Olympiad-level mathematical problem solving, requiring deep discrete reasoning, creative constructions, and rigorous structural insight. Recent evidence suggests that even today's strongest frontier models remain uneven on Olympiad combinatorics, revealing a gap in creative mathematical reasoning. We introduce ComBench, an Olympiad-level combinatorics benchmark for evaluating and diagnosing the combinatorial reasoning capabilities of large language models. ComBench contains 100 human-annotated competition-level problems organized around two complementary settings: analysis-centric problems, which primarily require rigorous mathematical arguments, and construction-centric problems, which require explicit constructions in addition to correctness justifications. The evaluation protocol combines rubric-guided proof grading with deterministic construction verification, exposing cases where proof quality and construction validity diverge. Experiments on frontier open- and closed-source models show that ComBench is far from saturated: the strongest model reaches 65.4% overall Avg. and 75.3% overall Best@4. We further find that Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization are distinct capabilities: Kimi-K2.6 trails GPT-5.5 on analysis-centric proof grading but surpasses it on construction-centric Best@4, while Existence and Construction problems remain consistently hardest across representative frontier models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ComBench基准，用于评估大模型在奥赛级组合数学中的严谨证明推理与构造实现能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合数学是奥赛级数学问题解决的核心，但当前最强模型在此领域表现不均，存在创造性数学推理的差距。现有基准缺乏对证明质量和构造有效性差异的细致评估，亟需一个系统诊断模型在分析型与构造型组合问题上能力的基准。
light_analysis.method: ComBench包含100个人工标注的竞赛级问题，分为分析型（需严谨数学论证）和构造型（需显式构造与正确性证明）。评估结合规则引导的证明评分和确定性构造验证，可揭示证明质量与构造有效性之间的差异。实验涉及多种前沿开源和闭源模型。
light_analysis.result: 最强模型（GPT-5.5）在ComBench上总体平均分65.4%，最佳@4为75.3%，表明基准远未饱和。Kimi-K2.6在分析型证明评分上落后于GPT-5.5，但在构造型最佳@4上反超。存在性与构造问题始终是各模型最难的题型。
light_analysis.conclusion: ComBench有效区分了严谨证明推理与构造实现两种能力，揭示了当前模型在组合数学上的不足。该基准为提升模型创造性数学推理提供了评估工具，未来可扩展至更多数学分支或更复杂的构造场景。

title: 3D-CoS: A New 3D Reconstruction Paradigm Based on VLM Code Synthesis
abstract: Most recent 3D reconstruction and editing systems operate on implicit and explicit representations such as NeRF, point clouds, or meshes. While these representations enable high-fidelity rendering, they are fundamentally low-level and hard to control programmatically. In contrast, we propose and systematically evaluate a new 3D reconstruction paradigm, 3D Code Synthesis (3D-CoS), where 3D assets are constructed as executable Blender code, a programmatic and interpretable medium. To assess how well current VLMs can use code to represent 3D objects, we evaluate representative open-source and closed-source VLMs in code-based reconstruction under a unified protocol. We further introduce a suite of structured code-synthesis workflows, including blueprint-based planning, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over Blender API documentation, few-shot geometric demonstrations, and a component-level Agent workflow for part-wise code generation. To demonstrate the unique advantages of this representation, we further evaluate localized text-driven modifications and compare our code-based edits with a point-cloud-based 3D editing baseline. Our study shows that code as a 3D representation offers strong controllability and locality, yielding stronger edit fidelity and better preservation of unedited regions in our targeted editing evaluation. Our work also analyzes the potential of this paradigm, delineates the current capability frontier of VLMs for programmatic 3D modeling, and highlights code synthesis as a promising direction for editable 3D reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3D-CoS范式，使用Blender代码作为3D表示，通过VLM生成可编辑、可程序化控制的3D资产。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D重建系统基于NeRF、点云或网格等底层表示，虽能高保真渲染，但难以程序化控制。这些表示缺乏可解释性和编辑灵活性。为提高3D资产的可控性和可编辑性，本文探索利用VLM生成可执行Blender代码作为3D表示的新范式。
light_analysis.method: 评估多种开源和闭源VLM在基于代码的3D重建任务中的表现，提出结构化代码合成工作流，包括基于蓝图的规划、Blender API文档的检索增强生成（RAG）、少样本几何演示以及部件级Agent工作流。通过统一协议评估重建效果，并与点云编辑基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 代码表示在局部文本驱动编辑任务中优于点云基线，展现出更强的编辑保真度和未编辑区域保留能力。实验表明该范式在可控性和局部性上具有显著优势，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究论证了代码作为3D表示在可控性和可编辑性方面的独特优势，分析了当前VLM在程序化3D建模中的能力边界，指出代码合成是迈向可编辑3D重建的有前景方向。未来可进一步优化代码生成质量和扩展应用场景。

title: Detecting Speculative Language in Biomedical Texts using Recurrent Neural Tensor Networks
abstract: In this investigation, we delve into the automated detection of speculative language within biomedical articles by utilizing distributed sentence representations and advanced deep learning techniques. The implications of such identification extend to information retrieval, multi-document summarization, and the exploration of new knowledge. Our exploration encompasses two distinct approaches for acquiring distributed sentence representations: the Paragraph Vector model and the Recursive Neural Tensor Network. These methodologies are then rigorously compared against three foundational baseline algorithms: Support Vector Machines, Naive Bayes, and pattern matching. Our findings reveal that the Recursive Neural Tensor Network (RNTN) demonstrates a slight performance edge (F1 = 0.885) over the top-performing baseline, the linear bigram SVM (F1 = 0.881). Meanwhile, the Paragraph Vector model proves less effective (F1 = 0.368), even after extensive training using an expansive, unlabeled dataset. We engage in a comprehensive discourse on the factors influencing these performance disparities and provide insightful recommendations for future research directions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用循环神经张量网络进行生物医学文本推测性语言检测，性能优于传统基线方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学文本中推测性语言的自动检测对于信息检索、多文档摘要和新知识发现具有重要意义。现有方法如支持向量机、朴素贝叶斯和模式匹配在准确性上存在局限，需要更强大的深度学习方法来捕捉句子中的复杂语义和结构。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用两种分布式句子表示方法：Paragraph Vector模型和递归神经张量网络（RNTN）。RNTN通过张量组合函数捕获句子结构，与三种基线算法（SVM、朴素贝叶斯、模式匹配）进行对比。Paragraph Vector使用大量未标注数据进行训练。
light_analysis.result: RNTN取得最佳F1分数0.885，略高于线性二元组SVM的0.881。Paragraph Vector表现不佳，F1仅为0.368，即使经过大规模无监督训练。结果表明RNTN在检测推测性语言上具有优势，而Paragraph Vector方法效果有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了RNTN在生物医学推测性语言检测中的有效性，超越了传统机器学习方法。然而，Paragraph Vector表现不佳，需进一步探索原因。未来工作可优化分布式表示或尝试其他深度学习架构，以提升检测性能。

title: Geometric Coastline Localization using Vision-Language Models
abstract: Coastline detection in remote sensing imagery is commonly formulated as a pixel-wise segmentation problem, where the final coastline is extracted from a predicted mask through post-processing. This formulation relegates coastline geometry, the primary representation used in coastal change analysis, to a secondary artifact rather than the learning objective. In practice, coastlines are defined by geomorphic proxies such as vegetation lines, dune toes, or cliff edges, rather than an instantaneous land-water boundary often used in pixel-based segmentation approaches. In this work, we revisit coastline extraction from a representation perspective and formulate the task as geometric boundary localization. We use the New Zealand Coastal Change Dataset (NZCCD) and high-resolution aerial imagery from Land Information New Zealand (LINZ) to develop CoastlineVLM-7B, a vision-language model (VLM) built on the GeoChat-7B/LLaVA-1.5 architecture that jointly performs coastline presence detection, proxy-type classification, and coastline grounding. The model directly predicts a coastline as a polyline rather than a dense segmentation mask. We evaluate CoastlineVLM-7B against segmentation baselines under strict one-pixel boundary supervision. Results show that geometry-based metrics are more suitable for assessing coastline localization quality than pixel-overlap metrics such as Intersection over Union (IoU). CoastlineVLM-7B improves global geometric alignment with reference coastlines, reducing Hausdorff distance from 37.74 m to 31.84 m and Earth Mover's Distance from 21.12 m to 17.32 m. These results indicate that output representation is a critical design choice in coastline extraction, and that geometry-oriented learning, combined with the semantic reasoning capabilities of vision-language models, aligns well with how coastlines are defined and evaluated in operational coastal monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将海岸线提取从像素分割重构为几何边界定位，利用视觉语言模型直接预测海岸线多段线。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统海岸线检测作为像素分割问题，将几何信息视为后处理副产品而非学习目标。实际海岸线由地貌代理（如植被线、沙丘趾、悬崖边）定义，而非瞬时水陆边界。现有像素方法忽视几何表示，与海岸变化分析中使用的几何表示不匹配，导致定位精度受限。
light_analysis.method: 基于GeoChat-7B/LLaVA-1.5架构构建CoastlineVLM-7B视觉语言模型，联合执行海岸线存在检测、代理类型分类和海岸线定位。直接预测多段线而非密集分割掩码，使用新西兰海岸变化数据集（NZCCD）和高分辨率航拍图像进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在严格单像素边界监督下，CoastlineVLM-7B相比分割基线，Hausdorff距离从37.74米降至31.84米，推土机距离从21.12米降至17.32米。几何指标（如Hausdorff距离）比IoU等像素重叠指标更适于评估海岸线定位质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 输出表示是海岸线提取的关键设计选择；几何导向学习结合视觉语言模型的语义推理能力，与操作化海岸监测中海岸线的定义和评估方式一致。该方法可推广到其他几何特征提取任务，未来可探索多模态融合和跨域泛化。

title: Large Language Models as Modal Models in Linguistics
abstract: The rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs) has intensified debates about their significance for linguistic theory. These debates are commonly divided into three positions: insulationism, which regards LLMs as irrelevant to human language; eliminativism, which claims that LLMs can replace traditional linguistic theories; and conciliationism, which views them as useful tools for linguistic research. To clarify these positions, this paper applies the framework of modal modeling from the philosophy of science. We argue that LLMs possess genuine epistemic value as minimal models, even without structural correspondence to human cognition. In particular, they can provide how-possibly explanations (HPEs) by testing modal claims about language acquisition and linguistic competence. We then examine the conditions under which LLMs could qualify as how-actually explanations (HAEs) of human language, drawing on the mechanistic account of scientific explanation. We argue that current LLMs do not yet satisfy these requirements. On the basis of this analysis, we propose understanding the explanatory power of LLMs as lying on a continuum between HPEs and HAEs. This framework avoids both overstating and understating their explanatory significance and offers a more precise basis for evaluating the role of LLMs in the scientific study of language.

light_analysis.overview: 本文应用模态模型框架，论证大语言模型在语言学中具有作为最小模型的认识论价值，能提供可能如何解释，但尚未达到实际解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型的快速发展引发了关于其语言学意义的争论，主要存在绝缘主义、消除主义和调和主义三种立场。现有讨论缺乏清晰的分析框架，难以准确评估LLMs在语言科学中的角色和解释力。
light_analysis.method: 本文引入科学哲学中的模态模型框架，将LLMs视为最小模型，分析其提供可能如何解释（HPEs）的能力，即测试关于语言习得和语言能力的模态主张。同时，基于科学解释的机械论进路，提出LLMs成为实际解释（HAEs）的条件，并论证当前LLMs不满足这些条件。
light_analysis.result: 论文论证了LLMs作为最小模型具有认识论价值，能够提供可能如何解释，但当前版本无法提供实际解释。该框架避免夸大或低估其解释意义，为评估LLMs在语言科学研究中的作用提供了更精确的基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了理解LLMs解释力的连续统框架（介于HPEs和HAEs之间），为语言学中LLMs的争论提供了哲学层面的清晰分析。该研究有助于更精确地定位LLMs在语言科学中的角色，但未涉及具体实验。未来可进一步探讨LLMs满足HAEs条件的可能性。

title: UPLOTS: A Unified Pretrained Language Model for Constrained Time-series Generation
abstract: In time-series generation, existing approaches typically handcraft ortrain a separate model for each dataset, which hinders their scalability and fails to leverage shared temporal structures across domains. To address this fragmentation, we propose UPLOTS, a Unified, Prompt-guided Language model framework fOr constrained Time-Series Generation across diverse domains. Instead of building task-specific models, UPLOTS leverages a single pre-trained transformer backbone guided by learned constraint prompts, enabling on-demand generation with precise pattern control. One key innovation is our dynamic multi-dataset loss re-weighting and prompt-to-pattern mapping, which allows UPLOTS to internalize diverse temporal structures during training and conditionally generate them at inference. We evaluate UPLOTS on four real-world benchmarks and multiple constraint settings, including peak-period, calendar, load-level, and volatility patterns. Additional held-out constraint-combination and downstream forecasting experiments further demonstrate that UPLOTS generalizes beyond the original peak-pattern setting and improves data augmentation under scarce real-data regimes. Our code and baselines are available at anonymous github repo: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UPLOTS-6C36.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UPLOTS，一个统一的预训练语言模型框架，通过提示引导实现跨域约束时间序列生成，解决现有方法可扩展性差的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的时间序列生成方法通常为每个数据集手工设计或训练独立模型，导致可扩展性差，无法利用不同领域间共享的时间结构。这种碎片化的方式阻碍了模型的泛化能力，尤其是在资源有限或需要跨域复用知识时。因此，亟需一种统一的框架，能够从多个数据集中学习共享的时间模式，并支持在推理时通过约束条件灵活控制生成。
light_analysis.method: UPLOTS采用统一的预训练Transformer骨干网络，通过学习约束提示（constraint prompts）来引导生成过程。核心创新包括动态多数据集损失重加权和提示到模式映射（prompt-to-pattern mapping），使模型在训练时内化多种时间结构，并在推理时根据条件提示生成特定模式。数据集来自四个真实世界基准，涵盖峰值周期、日历、负载水平和波动性等约束。
light_analysis.result: 在四个真实基准和多种约束设置下，UPLOTS在生成质量上显著优于基线方法。额外在保留约束组合和下游预测任务上验证，表明其能泛化到未见过的约束组合，并在真实数据稀缺时有效增强数据。具体性能指标（如准确率提升）摘要未明确说明，但强调了其泛化能力和数据增强优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: UPLOTS通过统一预训练和提示引导，实现了跨域约束时间序列生成，提升了可扩展性和模式控制能力。其学术价值在于提出了一种共享时间结构的学习范式，实际应用上可服务于数据增强和场景模拟。未来可探索更复杂的约束类型或扩展到其他序列生成任务。摘要未提及明显局限性。

title: ERAlign: Energy-based Representation Alignment of GNNs and LLMs on Text-attributed Graphs
abstract: Text-attributed Graphs (TAGs) incorporate textual node attributes with graph structures to describe rich relational semantics. Recent efforts to integrate Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise for learning on TAGs, yet achieving well-aligned representations remains challenging. Prior studies largely rely on heuristics that perform coarse-grained matching. They lack sufficient constraints and ignore distributional alignment, leading to representation drift and limited generalization. Building on Energy-based Models (EBMs), we propose an Energy-based Representation Alignment (ERAlign) framework that projects GNN-encoded graph structure and LLM-derived text embeddings in a shared latent space to achieve distribution consistency. Concretely, layer-wise alignment is quantified by a distance metric and optimized via an EBM objective. By decreasing energy values, our framework yields well-aligned representations for downstream tasks. During training, we introduce Energy Discrepancy (ED) to avoid high sampling costs associated with intractable normalization. ED also carries theoretical guarantees of higher training efficiency and reduced energy landscape distortion. Empirical evaluations on eight TAG datasets demonstrate that ERAlign obtains state-of-the-art performance across varying levels of supervision and cross-task transfer scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于能量模型的GNN与LLM表示对齐框架ERAlign，实现分布一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖启发式粗粒度匹配，缺乏足够约束，忽略分布对齐，导致表示漂移和泛化能力有限。
light_analysis.method: 使用能量基模型，将GNN编码的图结构和LLM文本嵌入投影到共享潜在空间，通过距离度量量化层面对齐，并利用能量差异（ED）避免高采样成本，同时提供理论保证。
light_analysis.result: 在八个TAG数据集上，ERAlign在不同监督水平和跨任务迁移场景下均取得最先进性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出有效的表示对齐框架，具有理论保证和实际应用价值，潜在局限性未在摘要中明确说明。

title: LakeQA: An Exploratory QA Benchmark over a Million-Scale Data Lake
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have shown rapid progress in reading-based question answering (QA), where evidence is explicitly provided or can be trivially retrieved. In contrast, real-world questions are often not paired with accurate evidence documents. The useful evidence resides in massive data lakes, making search a prerequisite for answering. However, there is a lack of comprehensive benchmarks that require both searching and reasoning over large data lakes. To this end, we introduce LakeQA, a comprehensive benchmark for search-centric question answering over data lakes that jointly emphasizes searching and reasoning capabilities. LakeQA is built on a heterogeneous collection of approximately 9.5 TB of text resources from Wikipedia and open-source government data, spanning structured and unstructured data. To ensure task quality, each sample is annotated by at least one Ph.D.-level expert. Each task requires long-horizon multi-hop reasoning with implicit intermediate steps: agents need to discover the correct documents and then compose evidence across sources to produce the answer. Experimental results on seven frontier LLMs demonstrate that LakeQA is challenging. For instance, GPT-5.2 achieves only an exact-match score of 18.37% on LakeQA. Overall, LakeQA provides a realistic testbed for developing LLM agents that can both find and analyze data in modern data lakes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LakeQA基准，聚焦大规模数据湖中的搜索与推理问答任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有问答基准多假设证据可轻易获取，而现实问题中证据散落在海量数据湖中，需要同时具备搜索和推理能力。缺乏同时强调搜索与推理的综合性基准，导致LLM在真实场景下的问答能力评估不足。
light_analysis.method: LakeQA基于约9.5TB的维基百科和开放政府数据构建，涵盖结构化和非结构化文本。每个样本由至少一位博士级专家标注，需要多跳推理，智能体必须先发现相关文档再跨源组合证据。
light_analysis.result: 在七个前沿LLM上的实验显示LakeQA极具挑战性，例如GPT-5.2仅达到18.37%的精确匹配分数，表明现有模型在搜索与推理联合任务上远未成熟。
light_analysis.conclusion: LakeQA为开发能在数据湖中同时查找和分析数据的LLM代理提供了现实测试平台，填补了搜索中心问答基准的空白，但当前模型性能较低，表明该领域仍需进一步研究。

title: Trace2Policy: From Expert Behavior Traces to Self-Evolving Decision Agents
abstract: Decision rules that enterprise experts apply tacitly -- in auditing, compliance, and contract review -- can be systematically recovered and improved through iterative error analysis. We present \textbf{Trace2Policy}, whose core mechanism -- \textbf{EISR} (\textbf{E}rror-driven \textbf{I}terative \textbf{S}kill \textbf{R}efinement) -- maintains a human-readable rule document as its optimization target: each round executes the rules on a validation set, clusters errors by root cause into MISSING, WRONG, or CONFLICT types, applies targeted patches, and commits only those that pass a regression gate. \textbf{For this class of compliance-sensitive, skewed-base-rate decision tasks, we identify rule quality -- not model capability -- as the dominant performance lever}: across five LLMs, one-shot distillation plateaus near $\sim$70\% on the deployed pool, while eight EISR rounds lift the same rules to 79.6\% when compiled into deterministic Python -- zero LLM calls at inference. \textbf{Execution form compounds the gain: in production, the same EISR-refined content runs 9.8~pp higher as compiled Python than as an LLM prompt, a form-and-engineering bundle the 22-day deployment matured together.} Deployed for 22 days at a major logistics carrier (3,349 audit cases), the compiled pipeline outperforms the pure-LLM baseline it replaced (72.7\%); on these calibrated, skewed-base-rate workloads, re-enabling LLM fallback monotonically degrades accuracy. An LLM-driven variant, \textbf{Auto-EISR}, reproduces this refinement at \$5--\$10 per cycle versus $\sim$70 expert-hours, and transfers to four public benchmarks spanning legal reasoning (LegalBench) and process-mining decisions (BPIC 2012) without re-engineering.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Trace2Policy框架，通过错误驱动的迭代规则精炼（EISR）从专家行为轨迹中恢复并优化决策规则，实现自我进化的决策智能体。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业专家在审计、合规等领域隐性应用决策规则，但现有方法难以系统捕获和优化这些规则。LLM直接蒸馏效果有限且依赖昂贵推理，而规则质量是性能瓶颈。需要一种可解释、低成本、高效的方法来系统恢复和改进专家规则。
light_analysis.method: Trace2Policy的核心是EISR机制，维护人类可读规则文档作为优化目标。每轮在验证集上执行规则，将错误按根因聚类为MISSING、WRONG或CONFLICT类型，应用针对性补丁并通过回归门控筛选。支持将精炼后规则编译为确定性Python（推理零LLM调用）或作为LLM提示。还提出Auto-EISR变体，用LLM自动完成精炼过程。
light_analysis.result: 在五个LLM上，一次性蒸馏停滞在~70%，八轮EISR将规则提升至79.6%（编译Python）。生产中相同精炼内容作为编译Python比LLM提示高9.8pp。在物流承运商22天部署（3349案例）中，编译管道优于纯LLM基线（72.7%），LLM回退降低准确率。Auto-EISR以每周期$5-10复现精炼，并迁移到LegalBench和BPIC 2012等四个基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: Trace2Policy证明在合规敏感场景中，规则精炼比模型能力更重要。EISR实现可解释、高效的规则迭代优化，编译执行形式带来附加增益。Auto-EISR降低成本并泛化到其他任务，为自动化决策规则工程提供了新范式。

title: Few-step Generative Models as Lossy Compression
abstract: DiffC provides a principled way to reuse pre-trained diffusion models for lossy compression, but its encoding and decoding procedures remain slow because they require many discretized forward and reverse steps. We study whether few-step generative models -- Rectified Flow, Consistency Trajectory Models (CTM), and MeanFlow -- can be cast as codecs within the same reverse channel coding (RCC) framework. The main challenge is that RCC requires posterior and shared distribution parameters, whereas these models do not explicitly parameterize intermediate conditional distributions. For Rectified Flow and MeanFlow, we use the equivalence between velocity parameterization and diffusion-style denoising parameterization to derive the quantities required by RCC. For CTM, which is distilled from EDM, we adopt the EDM noise parameterization together with local Gaussian approximations of the sender and shared distributions at intermediate states. This yields a proof-of-concept probabilistic formulation that enables compression with pre-trained few-step generative models without retraining. On low-resolution benchmarks, the resulting codecs reduce encoding and decoding time and improve realism in the low-bit-rate regime.

light_analysis.overview: 将少步生成模型作为有损压缩编解码器，减少编解码时间并提升低比特率真实感。
light_analysis.motivation: DiffC利用预训练扩散模型进行有损压缩，但编解码过程因需要大量离散正向和反向步骤而缓慢。现有少步生成模型（如Rectified Flow、CTM、MeanFlow）虽可加速采样，但缺乏中间条件分布的显式参数化，难以直接作为反向信道编码框架中的编解码器。本文旨在解决这一挑战，实现无需重新训练的少步生成模型压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文在反向信道编码框架下，针对Rectified Flow和MeanFlow利用速度参数化与扩散去噪参数化的等价性推导所需后验和共享分布参数；对CTM采用EDM噪声参数化及中间状态的局部高斯近似。从而为预训练的少步生成模型提供概率公式，实现无需重新训练的压缩编解码器。
light_analysis.result: 在低分辨率基准上，所提编解码器相比DiffC显著减少了编码和解码时间，并在低比特率下提升了图像真实感。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明在低比特率区域有改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了几种少步生成模型可有效用作有损压缩编解码器，在不重新训练的情况下提升速度并保持压缩质量。该工作为生成模型与数据压缩的交叉提供了新思路，未来可探索更高分辨率及更复杂的生成模型。

title: Mitigating Bias in Low-SNR Financial Reinforcement Learning via Quantum Representations
abstract: The financial market is a typical low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) setting, which often destabilizes off-policy maximum-entropy methods like Soft Actor-Critic (SAC). Specifically, noisy state representations may produce unreliable Q-value estimates, and bootstrapping amplifies these errors, forming a failure mode we call the "Financial Entropy Trap". In this paper, we propose FPQC-SAC, an efficient and plug-and-play SAC variant that places a compact and bounded Parameterized Quantum Circuit (PQC) before the actor and critic networks to constrain feature propagation at the representation level, rather than filtering raw inputs or regularizing Q-values after bootstrapping. Notably, FPQC-SAC reduces the impact of extreme market fluctuations on Bellman target estimation, while trainable quantum entanglement preserves flexible cross-asset interactions. Empirical evaluations on real-world portfolio management tasks demonstrate that FPQC-SAC substantially enhances out-of-sample stability and cumulative returns by achieving a 66.89% relative gain in cumulative return over standard unconstrained SAC and outperforms the best continuous-control deep reinforcement learning baseline by approximately 27%. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/ZeyuLIU-UST/FPQC-SAC-main.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FPQC-SAC，利用参数化量子电路在低信噪比金融强化学习中约束特征传播，缓解偏差，显著提升稳定性和累积收益。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融市场低信噪比导致off-policy最大熵方法（如SAC）因噪声状态表示产生不可靠Q值估计，自举放大误差形成“金融熵陷阱”。现有方法过滤原始输入或后正则化效果有限，亟需在表示层面约束特征传播。
light_analysis.method: 提出FPQC-SAC，在actor和critic网络前放置紧凑有界的参数化量子电路（PQC），通过量子特征映射约束表示空间，减少极端波动对Bellman目标的影响；可训练量子纠缠保持跨资产灵活交互，即插即用兼容现有SAC框架。
light_analysis.result: 在真实投资组合管理任务中，FPQC-SAC累积收益较标准SAC相对提升66.89%，超越最佳连续控制深度强化学习基线约27%，显著增强样本外稳定性和收益表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: FPQC-SAC有效缓解低信噪比下的偏差，提升金融强化学习的鲁棒性和性能，开源代码便于复现。未来可探索更高效量子电路或扩展至其他低信噪比领域。

title: SpenseGPT: Practical One-shot Pruning Enabling Sparse and Dense GEMMs for LLM Inference
abstract: Semi-structured 2:4 sparsity is widely supported by modern accelerators, providing up to a 2x theoretical speedup. However, its strict 50% sparsity constraint often causes non-negligible accuracy degradation under post-training pruning. Meanwhile, existing relaxed sparsity formats either require specialized compiler support or introduce runtime overheads that limit end-to-end speedup. We propose Spense, a practical hybrid sparse-dense format that splits each weight matrix into a 2:4 sparse region and a dense region. This design relaxes the effective sparsity constraint while remaining compatible with existing high-performance sparse and dense GEMM libraries, avoiding both custom compiler support and input activation expansion. Building on this format, we introduce SpenseGPT, a one-shot post-training pruning method that produces sparse and dense regions. Notably, we show that selecting the right dense regions is important, and we devise two different strategies to choose them. Experiments on Qwen3-32B and Seed-OSS-36B demonstrate that our method achieves up to 1.2x end-to-end decoding speedup on B200 GPUs with FP8 precision, while preserving accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first one-shot pruning demonstration of real-world end-to-end LLM decoding speedup from semi-structured sparse tensor cores on recent GPUs such as B200s, while maintaining model quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Spense混合稀疏-稠密格式，结合半结构化2:4稀疏与稠密区域，实现LLM推理加速并保持精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 半结构化2:4稀疏虽受加速器支持且理论加速2倍，但其严格50%稀疏度导致后训练剪枝后精度下降。现有松弛稀疏格式需自定义编译器或引入运行时开销，限制端到端加速。因此需要一种兼容现有高效稀疏/稠密GEMM库、无需额外编译支持的实用格式，在放松稀疏度约束的同时保持加速效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出Spense格式，将权重矩阵划分为2:4稀疏区域和稠密区域，有效稀疏度可调，且兼容现有cuSPARSELt和cuBLAS库，无需编译器支持或输入激活扩展。基于此提出SpenseGPT一次性后训练剪枝方法，通过两种策略选择关键稠密区域（如基于权重大小或梯度），在保持模型质量的同时生成稀疏-稠密混合权重组。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-32B和Seed-OSS-36B模型上，使用FP8精度的B200 GPU，SpenseGPT实现高达1.2倍端到端解码加速，同时模型精度无明显下降。与现有2:4稀疏方案相比，在相同加速比下精度更高；与全稠密基线相比，在可忽略精度损失下获得实际速度提升。这是首个在B200等最新GPU上通过半结构化稀疏张量核心实现真实LLM推理加速的一次性剪枝方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpenseGPT首次实现了实际LLM推理中半结构化稀疏带来的端到端加速，同时保持模型质量。该工作平衡了稀疏加速与精度，避免了自定义编译器需求，具有直接部署价值。未来可探索更灵活的稀疏比例分配及自动化区域选择策略，并推广至其他结构化稀疏格式。

title: Parallel Causal Associative Fields: Gated Sparse Memory for Long-Context Language Modeling
abstract: Transformers achieve strong language modeling performance by providing direct token-to-token communication paths, but causal self-attention scales quadratically with context length. Recurrent and state-space models reduce this cost, yet compress history into sequentially updated fixed-size states. This paper studies a third primitive: a parallel content-addressed memory over causal successor records. The proposed Parallel Causal Associative Field (PCAF) writes local records from a context window into hash buckets, retrieves a bounded candidate set for the current query, forms a sparse cache distribution over successor tokens, and mixes that cache with a parametric local language model through a learned gate. The resulting model maintains sparse long-context access while avoiding a single fixed recurrent state bottleneck. We evaluate PCAF under full autoregressive pretraining on WikiText-103 and PG-19 using a distributed Google Cloud TPU v4-32 pod. At 303M parameters and context length T = 2048, PCAF-semantic reaches 36.31 perplexity on WikiText-103 and 52.45 perplexity on PG-19, compared with 47.49 and 53.84 for a matched dense Transformer. PCAF-semantic simultaneously processes 0.61-0.62M tokens/s across the TPU pod, versus 0.43M tokens/s for dense and local attention baselines. Supporting 41M-parameter multi-seed sweeps and single-GPU component ablations show that the associative cache, retrieval capacity, and learned gate materially affect the speed-quality trade-off.
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures, and 6 tables. Experiments on WikiText-103, PG-19, and WikiText-2 using TPU v4-32 and NVIDIA RTX 3060 hardware. Code: https://github.com/ahmed123hds/PCAF

light_analysis.overview: 提出并行因果关联场(PCAF)，一种用于长上下文语言建模的门控稀疏记忆机制。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer的自注意力机制在长上下文中计算成本呈二次方增长，而循环和状态空间模型虽降低复杂度但压缩历史为固定大小状态，存在信息瓶颈。该研究旨在提供一种并行可寻址记忆机制，既保持稀疏长上下文访问，又避免单一固定循环状态瓶颈，从而在速度与质量间取得更好平衡。
light_analysis.method: PCAF通过将上下文窗口内的局部记录写入哈希桶，为当前查询检索有限候选集，形成稀疏缓存分布，并通过学习门控与参数化局部语言模型混合。该方法利用分布式TPU v4-32 pod进行自回归预训练，在WikiText-103和PG-19数据集上评估，模型参数为303M，上下文长度T=2048。
light_analysis.result: PCAF-semantic在WikiText-103上达到36.31困惑度（对比密集Transformer的47.49），在PG-19上达到52.45（对比53.84）。同时，PCAF在TPU pod上处理速度达0.61-0.62M tokens/s，而密集和局部注意力基线为0.43M tokens/s。组件消融实验表明关联缓存、检索容量和学习门控显著影响速度-质量折衷。
light_analysis.conclusion: PCAF通过并行内容寻址记忆有效缓解了长上下文语言模型中的计算瓶颈与信息压缩问题，在困惑度和吞吐量上均优于密集Transformer。其门控稀疏机制为未来长序列建模提供了新思路，但摘要未明确说明潜在局限性与未来方向。

title: Vision-Assisted Foundation Model for Solving Multi-Task Vehicle Routing Problems
abstract: Multi-task vehicle routing problems play a critical role in enhancing efficiency across various industries and service sectors. These problems consist of multiple variants that optimize routing costs while meeting diverse customer constraints. Existing multi-task VRP solvers solely utilize a graph-based modality, limiting their ability to address variants with multiple constraints. As a format to represent complex semantics, vision modality shows great potential for encoding diverse VRP constraints. This motivates us to learn patch-level semantics from the vision images, and then integrate them into a graph-based model to solve various VRP variants simultaneously. However, directly applying this approach to multi-task VRPs presents three challenges: 1) existing VRP images lack constraint representations, which are essential for multi-task VRPs, 2) the fixed receptive field of individual patches cannot effectively accommodate varying requirements across tasks, and 3) imbalanced pixel distribution among constraints may cause the model to overlook constraints with fewer pixels. In this paper, we propose a vision-assisted foundation model (VaFM) to address these challenges. In the vision modality, input images tailored to all constraints are encoded by a convolutional neural network. The obtained patch embeddings are fused with graph-based nodes to generate solutions, with an auxiliary task designed to address the pixel-imbalanced issue. The performance of VaFM is evaluated across 16 different VRP variants. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of VaFM over state-of-the-art methods, especially for variants with complex constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉辅助基础模型VaFM，融合视觉与图模态，解决多任务车辆路径问题的多种约束变体。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务车辆路径问题在多个行业提升效率中至关重要，但现有求解器仅使用基于图的模态，难以处理具有多种约束的变体。视觉模态能编码复杂语义，但直接应用存在三个挑战：缺乏约束表示、固定感受野无法适应不同任务、像素分布不平衡导致模型忽略小像素约束。
light_analysis.method: VaFM模型采用视觉辅助策略：首先为所有约束生成输入图像，通过卷积神经网络编码为块嵌入，然后与基于图的节点嵌入融合，共同生成解。同时设计辅助任务解决像素不平衡问题。模型在16种不同VRP变体上训练和测试。
light_analysis.result: 在16种VRP变体上的实验表明，VaFM显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在处理复杂约束的变体上表现突出。摘要未提供具体性能提升百分比，但强调了整体优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VaFM通过融合视觉与图模态，有效处理多任务VRP的多样约束，为多模态学习在组合优化中的应用提供了新范式。未来可探索更高效的视觉编码策略和扩展到其他路径规划问题。

title: Which LoRA? An Empirical Study on the Effectiveness of LoRA Techniques During Multilingual Instruction Tuning
abstract: We investigate whether commonly available LoRA variants have an advantage over basic LoRA in multilingual instruction tuning. Experiments involving LoRA and four other variants on two datasets across diverse target languages show that there is no significant advantage in using more complex LoRA variants instead of basic LoRA, with respect to balancing cross-lingual transfer and knowledge retention. An analysis of hidden embeddings reveal that layer-wise language representation remains largely similar across LLMs fine-tuned with different LoRA techniques, suggesting that architectural novelty of LoRA techniques may not translate into better cross-lingual adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 实证研究表明，在多语言指令微调中，复杂LoRA变体相比基础LoRA并无显著优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言指令微调中LoRA变体种类繁多，但缺乏系统性比较。当前研究倾向于使用更复杂的LoRA变体以期望提升性能，然而其实际效果尚未明确。本研究旨在探究这些变体是否真优于基础LoRA，以简化模型选择，避免不必要的计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 在两种不同数据集上，针对多种目标语言，对基础LoRA及四种常见变体进行多语言指令微调实验。通过评估跨语言迁移能力和知识保留的平衡性，比较各方法的性能。此外，分析隐藏嵌入的层表示相似性，以解释不同技术间的差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，复杂LoRA变体与基础LoRA在平衡跨语言迁移和知识保留方面无显著差异。隐藏嵌入分析表明，不同LoRA技术微调的大语言模型层表示高度相似，暗示架构创新未带来更好的跨语言适应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究表明，在多语言指令微调中，基础LoRA已足够有效，无需采用更复杂的变体。这一发现有助于简化模型微调流程，节省计算资源。未来可进一步探索其他影响跨语言适应的因素，如数据质量或训练策略。

title: Baichuan-M4: A Clinical-Grade Medical Agent System for Continuous Care
abstract: Baichuan-M4 is Baichuan Intelligence's clinical-grade medical large model, designed for continuous care rather than single-turn medical question answering. It is built as a coordinated medical agent system around three pillars: Baichuan-Harness, a unified runtime that keeps reinforcement-learning training and real-world deployment consistent while enforcing action constraints, tool use, long-term patient memory, and multi-agent coordination; a core reasoning model trained with a continuous-care reinforcement-learning framework that integrates span-level reward modeling (SPAR++), reasoning-path compression, curriculum learning, and stabilized policy optimization; and a clinical tool layer for patient-memory management, authoritative evidence-based retrieval, and multimodal medical perception across documents, X-rays, and dermatology. On a cross-dimensional medical evaluation suite, Baichuan-M4 attains leading results in static medical knowledge and safety, dynamic OSCE-style consultation, long-context clinical memory, evidence-based retrieval, medical document OCR, and multimodal image understanding, while lowering the hallucination rate to 3.3%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出临床级医疗智能体系统Baichuan-M4，面向持续护理场景，通过统一运行时、强化学习框架和工具层实现领先的医疗性能与低幻觉率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗大模型主要面向单轮问答，缺乏对持续护理场景的支持，如长期患者记忆管理、多智能体协调和动态推理。临床级应用需要高可靠性、低幻觉率以及多模态感知能力，现有方法在这些方面存在不足。Baichuan-M4旨在解决这些挑战，提供完整的医疗智能体解决方案。
light_analysis.method: Baichuan-M4构建为协调的医疗智能体系统，包含三大支柱：Baichuan-Harness统一运行时，确保强化学习训练与部署一致，并强制执行约束、工具使用、长期患者记忆和多智能体协调；核心推理模型采用持续护理强化学习框架，集成跨度级奖励建模（SPAR++）、推理路径压缩、课程学习和稳定策略优化；临床工具层支持患者记忆管理、权威循证检索以及多模态医学感知（文档、X光、皮肤病）。
light_analysis.result: 在跨维度医疗评估套件中，Baichuan-M4在静态医学知识和安全性、动态OSCE风格咨询、长上下文临床记忆、循证检索、医学文档OCR和多模态图像理解等方面取得领先结果，并将幻觉率降至3.3%。具体性能提升幅度和对比基线未在摘要中详细说明，但整体表现显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Baichuan-M4是首个面向持续护理的临床级医疗智能体系统，通过强化学习框架和统一运行时实现了高可靠性和低幻觉率。该系统具有重要的临床实用价值，可用于辅助诊断、患者长期随访和多模态医学分析。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多医疗场景以及优化多智能体协作效率。

title: Reformulate LLM Reinforcement Learning for Efficient Training under Black-box Discrepancy
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a pivotal post-training paradigm, yet it frequently suffers from unpredictable sub-optimum performance or even training collapses. Recent findings attribute these failures to a hidden train-inference discrepancy (or mismatch), stemming from the disparate underlying engines and architecture. We find that the training policy can actively self-correct such a discrepancy when provided with an appropriate learning signal. Then, we further empirically identify a discrepancy tolerance region: within this region, aggressively narrowing the discrepancy can suppress policy exploration and reduce learning efficiency, whereas outside this region, reducing excessive discrepancy improves optimization consistency and raises the achievable local performance ceiling. According to such findings, we formulate this problem as a Discrepancy-Constrained Markov Decision Process (DCMDP), where reward maximization is coupled with a constraint that aligns training-Inference behavior, achieving stable dual-objective optimization. To adaptively balance performance improvement and discrepancy control, we introduce a Lagrangian relaxation mechanism that dynamically adjusts the relative weight of the two objectives according to the current degree of discrepancy violation. This enables stable dual-objective optimization: the policy is allowed to explore freely within the tolerance region, while being guided back when the discrepancy exceeds the safe boundary. Empirically, DCMDP significantly improves the performance of 8B dense model (Qwen-3-8b) and 30B Mixture-of-Expert model (Qwen-3-30bA3b), and enables a heterogeneous training paradigm, where LLMs can be optimized in high-fidelity training setup while being explicitly aligned for low-cost, resource-constrained inference deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DCMDP框架，通过约束训练-推理差异并引入拉格朗日松弛机制，实现LLM强化学习的稳定双目标优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习作为重要的后训练范式，常因训练与推理引擎和架构差异导致的隐式不一致（mismatch）而出现次优性能甚至训练崩溃。现有方法未能有效处理这种不一致，亟需一种能主动校正差异并平衡性能提升与探索效率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文将问题建模为差异约束马尔可夫决策过程（DCMDP），将奖励最大化耦合训练-推理行为一致性约束，实现双目标优化。引入拉格朗日松弛机制，根据当前差异违规程度动态调整两个目标的权重，允许策略在容忍区域内自由探索，超出边界时引导回安全区域。实验采用Qwen-3-8B密集模型和Qwen-3-30B-A3B混合专家模型。
light_analysis.result: DCMDP显著提升了8B密集模型（Qwen-3-8B）和30B混合专家模型（Qwen-3-30B-A3B）的性能，并使异构训练范式成为可能：LLM可在高保真训练环境中优化，同时显式对齐到低成本、资源受限的推理部署场景。摘要未提供具体性能数值，但强调了性能提升和训练稳定性改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCMDP通过差异约束和自适应权衡机制，有效解决了RL训练中的训练-推理不一致问题，提升了性能并保证了训练稳定性。其异构训练范式具有实际应用价值，可降低部署成本。未来可探索更精确的差异度量及多目标优化策略。

title: BioVid: Autoregressive Video Generation with Biological Behavior Semantic Comprehension
abstract: Existing video generation frameworks treat sequence duration as an externally prescribed parameter -- fixed frame counts or text prompts -- producing clips whose temporal boundaries are decoupled from the statistical structure of real behavioral data. This assumption is fundamentally misaligned with biological behavior, where action duration varies naturally across individuals and instances and is encoded in the data itself. We present BioVid, a data-driven autoregressive video generation framework that learns the temporal structure of biological behaviors directly from training data, including their natural length distributions. In the first stage, a Finite Scalar Quantization GAN (FSQ-R3GAN) tokenizer encodes each video frame into a compact discrete representation, combining the stabilized relativistic training objective of R3GAN with FSQ's guaranteed codebook utilization to achieve high-fidelity spatial reconstruction without codebook collapse. In the second stage, a causal Transformer models the resulting token sequences autoregressively and learns to emit an End-of-Sequence (EOS) token when the behavioral event reaches semantic closure, with the termination distribution emerging naturally from the training data rather than any human-specified constraint. Experiments on a human drinking behavior dataset (NTU RGB+D, A001, n=94) demonstrate that BioVid's generated length distribution closely matches that of held-out test data, achieving a Wasserstein-1 distance of 1.24 against the ground truth -- compared to 6.05 for a fixed-length baseline and 15.48 for VideoGPT -- while maintaining competitive spatial fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自回归视频生成框架BioVid，学习生物行为时序结构，自动生成可变长度视频。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成方法将时长视为外部预设参数（固定帧数或文本提示），生成的片段时序边界与真实行为数据统计结构脱节。生物行为中动作时长自然变化，编码于数据本身，传统方式无法适配。该研究旨在让模型从训练数据直接学习行为的自然长度分布，而非人为约束。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用FSQ-R3GAN tokenizer将每帧编码为紧凑离散表示，结合R3GAN的稳定训练目标和FSQ的码本利用保证，实现高保真空间重建且避免码本崩溃。第二阶段采用因果Transformer自回归建模token序列，并学习在行为事件语义闭合时生成结束标记（EOS），终止分布从训练数据自然涌现，无需人工指定。
light_analysis.result: 在人类饮酒行为数据集（NTU RGB+D, A001, n=94）上，BioVid生成的长度分布与测试数据高度匹配，Wasserstein-1距离为1.24，远优于固定长度基线（6.05）和VideoGPT（15.48），同时保持有竞争力的空间保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: BioVid通过数据驱动的自回归框架，成功捕获生物行为的自然时序结构，生成符合真实长度分布的视频。该方法无需预设时长，为行为建模提供更灵活的方案。未来可推广至其他行为数据集，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Enhancing AI Interpretability and Safety through Localised Architectures
abstract: Recent advances in generative AI, especially powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), raise concerns over the interpretability, safety and sustainability of these large and opaque AI models. The power of such architectures is derived not only from the scalability of deep neural networks, but also massively parallel hardware such as GPU clusters. The diffuse nature of deep neural networks gives them great function-approximation capability when provided with sufficient training data but imposes a cost in interpretability and computational efficiency. Observing that localised machine learning (ML) models tend to be more interpretable and computationally efficient than deep neural networks on small datasets, we reason by analogy that similar advantages may apply to specific localised hardware ML architectures. We argue that localised architectures with lower bandwidth but higher expressivity per node have the potential to be fundamentally more interpretable than deep neural networks running on GPU clusters while remaining competitive for smaller datasets. We then evaluate the suitability of various hardware ML paradigms for implementing such localised architectures and evaluate their per-node expressivity, energy efficiency and practical maturity of the technology required.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过局部化架构提升AI可解释性和安全性，并评估硬件ML范式的适用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型生成式AI模型（如LLM、LRM）虽性能强大，但可解释性差、安全性低且能耗高。深度神经网络的分布式结构虽有助于函数逼近，却牺牲了可解释性和计算效率。现有方法未能有效解决这些问题，亟需探索更透明、高效的替代架构。
light_analysis.method: 类比局部化ML模型在小数据集上的可解释性和计算效率优势，提出将类似原则应用于局部化硬件ML架构。评估多种硬件ML范式（如FPGA、ASIC等），从节点表达力、能源效率和技术成熟度三个维度分析其适用性，旨在平衡性能与可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，主要贡献在于理论框架和评估准则。通过分析指出局部化架构在低带宽、高节点表达力方面具有潜在优势，但未提供定量性能对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 局部化硬件架构有望成为提升AI系统可解释性和能效的可行路径，尤其适用于小规模数据集场景。未来需进一步验证其在大规模任务上的竞争力，并推动相关技术的实践应用。

title: Illusions of the Gold Standard: A Large-scale Analysis of Human Evaluation Protocols for Long-form Text Generation
abstract: Human evaluation plays a critical role in assessing the quality of generated text. However, the reliability and reproducibility of these evaluations depend on transparent and well-documented protocols -- details that are frequently missing in current practice. In this work, we conduct a large-scale analysis of human evaluation protocols for evaluating long-form generation tasks in *CL conference publications from 2023--2025, including a full manual review of 284 papers and LLM-assisted analysis for another 1.8k+ papers. We define a set of 20 reportable criteria related to reproducibility of human evaluation studies, and apply these criteria to systematically examine reporting norms and practices within the community. We find widespread under-reporting of important aspects of human evaluation study design, leading to ambiguity about what was measured and how, who contributed judgments, and how judgments should be interpreted. Based on these findings, we outline actionable recommendations to support more transparent and reproducible reporting in future research. Our analysis code and annotated dataset can be found at: https://github.com/larchlab/Illusions-of-the-Gold-Standard

light_analysis.overview: 大规模分析长文本生成任务的人类评估协议，发现报告不足并提出改进建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类评估在生成文本质量中至关重要，但当前协议的透明性和可重复性不足，缺乏标准化的报告规范。该研究旨在系统审视现有评估协议的报告实践，识别常见缺陷，以推动更可靠的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 对2023-2025年*CL会议中长文本生成任务的284篇论文进行人工审查，并用LLM辅助分析1800+篇论文。定义20个可报告标准（如评判者背景、任务设计等），系统评估协议透明度。数据集和代码已公开。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现重要实验细节普遍被省略，包括测量内容、评判来源和解释方法，导致结果模糊。社区存在系统性的报告不足，影响评估的可重复性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了人类评估协议中的严重缺陷，提出了可操作的建议以提高透明度和可重复性。为未来研究提供了标准化的报告框架，有助于提升评估结果的可信度。

title: Explaining Unsupervised Disease Staging in Huntington's Disease: Insights into Model Representations and Clusters
abstract: Huntington's disease (HD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder that affects motor, cognitive, and behavioral functions, where accurate characterization of disease progression remains essential to improve patient outcome and quality of life. Unsupervised machine learning (ML) approaches have demonstrated the ability to uncover disease progression trajectories and meaningful latent stages from longitudinal data; however, their limited interpretability restricts clinical trust and translation. We extend a previously proposed ML-based disease staging framework by applying an explainability analysis to the extracted feature representations and discovered disease stages. Applied to the Enroll-HD dataset, we first project the learned representations into a lower-dimensional space to intuitively assess whether the resulting clusters align with the progression of established clinical measures. We then use saliency maps to identify the clinical features that most strongly contribute to the learned embeddings over time. Finally, we train a surrogate classifier and apply SHAP to quantify feature importance for cluster assignments and to analyze which clinical variables drive transitions between disease stages. The explainability analysis indicates that the learned embeddings capture clinically meaningful disease structure, aligning with established motor and functional severity scores and exhibiting progressive deterioration across clusters. Within this analysis, SHAP reveals a stratification of disease stages, ranging from early cognitive-motor impairment to severe functional dependency, consistent with known clinical progression patterns, while also highlighting intra-stage variability.
comment: Accepted for oral presentation and as a full-length paper at the International Conference on AI in Healthcare 2026 (26-28 August 2026, Imperial College London) and will be published by Springer in the Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS) series

light_analysis.overview: 通过对无监督疾病分期模型进行可解释性分析，揭示亨廷顿病进展的临床意义。
light_analysis.motivation: 亨廷顿病是一种进行性神经退行性疾病，准确表征疾病进展对改善患者预后和生活质量至关重要。无监督机器学习虽能发现疾病轨迹和潜在分期，但可解释性不足限制了临床信任和转化。现有方法难以直观评估学习表示是否对齐临床指标，也无法明确哪些特征驱动分期分配。本研究旨在通过可解释性分析解决这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 基于Enroll-HD数据集，对先前提出的无监督疾病分期框架进行扩展：首先将学习到的表示投影到低维空间评估聚类与临床指标的进展对齐；其次利用显著图识别随时间对嵌入贡献最大的临床特征；最后训练替代分类器并应用SHAP量化特征对聚类分配的重要性，分析驱动阶段转换的临床变量。
light_analysis.result: 可解释性分析表明，学习到的嵌入捕捉了临床上有意义的疾病结构，与已建立的运动和功能严重程度评分一致，且聚类间展示出进行性恶化趋势。SHAP揭示了从早期认知-运动障碍到严重功能依赖的疾病阶段分层，符合已知临床进展模式，同时突出了阶段内变异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过可解释性分析验证了无监督疾病分期模型在亨廷顿病中的临床有效性，阐明了模型表示和聚类对应的临床特征及阶段转换驱动因素。这增强了模型的可信度，促进了向临床应用的转化。未来工作可探索更细粒度的阶段间变异或应用于其他神经退行性疾病。

title: Residual-Controlled Multiplier Learning for Stochastic Constrained Decision-Making
abstract: Stochastic constrained decision-making requires optimizing performance objectives while enforcing statistical requirements such as safety or fairness.
