Experiments demonstrate that RAD achieves state-of-the-art performance across four established benchmarks (MVTec-AD, VisA, Real-IAD, 3D-ADAM) under both standard and few-shot settings. On MVTec-AD, RAD reaches 96.7% Pixel AUROC with just a single anomaly-free image compared to 98.5% of RAD's full-data performance. Collectively, these findings overturn the assumption that MUAD requires task-specific training, showing that state-of-the-art anomaly detection is feasible with training-free memory-based retrieval. Our code is available at https://github.com/longkukuhi/RAD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAD框架，通过记忆检索实现无需任务特定训练的多类无监督异常检测，性能达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MUAD方法依赖编码器-解码器重构无异常特征，任务特定训练成本高且在分布偏移下效果不佳；重构残差评分面临保真度-稳定性困境。无训练方法存在跨类别和跨区域不匹配问题。本文旨在探索无需任务特定训练的高效异常检测方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出RAD框架，存储无异常特征到记忆库，通过多级检索匹配测试补丁与记忆，无需任务特定训练。采用预训练特征提取器，在多个尺度上进行最近邻搜索，综合得分判断异常。关键创新在于训练自由的记忆检索范式。
light_analysis.result: 在MVTec-AD、VisA、Real-IAD、3D-ADAM基准上均达SOTA。MVTec-AD上全数据性能Pixel AUROC 98.5%，单张正常图像可达96.7%。证明无需任务特定训练即可实现优异异常检测。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAD颠覆了MUAD需任务特定训练的假设，证明基于记忆的无训练检索可实现SOTA。降低训练成本，适应分布偏移，具有实用价值。未来可探索更高效的内存管理和多模态扩展。

title: Contrastive Spectral Rectification: Test-Time Defense towards Zero-shot Adversarial Robustness of CLIP
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP have demonstrated remarkable zero-shot generalization, yet remain highly vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs). While test-time defenses are promising, existing methods fail to provide sufficient robustness against strong attacks and are often hampered by high inference latency and task-specific applicability. To address these limitations, we start by investigating the intrinsic properties of AEs, which reveals that AEs exhibit severe feature inconsistency under progressive frequency attenuation. We further attribute this to the model's inherent spectral bias. Leveraging this insight, we propose an efficient test-time defense named Contrastive Spectral Rectification (CSR). CSR optimizes a rectification perturbation to realign the input with the natural manifold under a spectral-guided contrastive objective, which is applied input-adaptively. Extensive experiments across 16 classification benchmarks demonstrate that CSR outperforms the SOTA by an average of 18.1% against strong APGD with modest inference overhead. Furthermore, CSR exhibits broad applicability across diverse visual tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/Summu77/CSR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对比谱矫正（CSR），一种高效的测试时防御方法，增强CLIP对对抗样本的零样本鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP）虽在零样本泛化上表现出色，但极易受到对抗样本攻击。现有的测试时防御方法在面对强攻击时鲁棒性不足，且推理延迟高、任务特定。为克服这些局限，本文研究了对抗样本的内在特性，发现其在渐进频率衰减下存在严重的特征不一致性，并归因于模型固有的光谱偏差。因此，需要一种高效且通用的防御方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出对比谱矫正（CSR），一种高效的测试时防御方法。CSR通过光谱引导的对比目标，优化一个修正扰动，将输入重新对齐到自然流形。该扰动是输入自适应的，无需训练。利用对抗样本在频率域的特征不一致性，CSR在频域施加约束，增强模型鲁棒性。方法仅需少量推理步骤，适用于多种视觉任务。
light_analysis.result: 在16个分类基准上，CSR针对强APGD攻击平均比现有最优方法（SOTA）提升18.1%的鲁棒性，且推理开销适中。此外，CSR在多种视觉任务（如目标检测、图像检索）上展现出广泛适用性，验证了其通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CSR通过利用光谱偏置和对比学习，实现了高效且通用的测试时防御，显著提升了CLIP的零样本对抗鲁棒性。该方法推理速度快，任务适应性强，为实际部署提供了可行方案。未来可探索更复杂的频域变换或与其他防御策略结合，以应对更广泛的攻击场景。

title: Efficient Imputation for Patch-based Missing Single-cell Data via Cluster-regularized Optimal Transport
abstract: Missing data in single-cell sequencing datasets poses significant challenges for extracting meaningful biological insights. However, existing imputation approaches, which often assume uniformity and data completeness, struggle to address cases with large patches of missing data. In this paper, we present CROT (Cluster-Regularized Optimal Transport), an optimal transport-based imputation algorithm designed to handle patch-based missing data in tabular formats. Our approach effectively captures the underlying data structure in the presence of significant missingness. Notably, it achieves superior imputation accuracy while significantly reducing runtime, demonstrating its scalability and efficiency for large-scale datasets. This work introduces a robust solution for imputation in heterogeneous, high-dimensional datasets with structured data absence, addressing critical challenges in both biological and clinical data analysis. Our code is available on GitHub, https://github.com/yuyuliu11037/CROT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于聚类正则化最优传输的插补算法CROT，高效处理单细胞数据中的块状缺失。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞测序数据中的缺失值严重影响生物信息提取，现有插补方法假设数据均匀完整，难以处理大块缺失。因此，需要一种能捕获缺失数据下底层结构的高效插补方法，以解决异质性、高维数据集中的结构化缺失问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出CROT算法，基于最优传输框架，引入聚类正则化项以捕获缺失数据下的底层结构。算法针对表格格式的块状缺失设计，通过优化传输方案实现插补，具有可扩展性和高效率。
light_analysis.result: 在插补精度上优于现有方法，同时显著减少运行时间，适用于大规模数据集。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但提到“superior imputation accuracy”和“significantly reducing runtime”。
light_analysis.conclusion: CROT为异质性、高维且有结构化缺失的数据集提供了鲁棒插补方案，解决了生物和临床数据分析的关键挑战。代码已开源，未来可进一步优化或应用于其他领域。

title: MMD Guidance: Training-Free Distribution Adaptation for Diffusion Models via Maximum Mean Discrepancy Guidance
abstract: Pre-trained diffusion models have emerged as powerful generative priors for both unconditional and conditional sample generation, yet their outputs often deviate from the characteristics of user-specific target data. Such mismatches are especially problematic in domain adaptation tasks, where only a few reference examples are available and retraining the diffusion model is infeasible. Existing inference-time guidance methods can adjust sampling trajectories, but they typically optimize surrogate objectives such as classifier likelihoods rather than directly aligning with the target distribution. We propose \emph{MMD Guidance}, a training-free mechanism that augments the reverse diffusion process with gradients of the \textit{Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD)} between generated samples and a reference dataset. MMD provides reliable distributional estimates from limited data, exhibits low variance in practice, and is efficiently differentiable, which makes it particularly well-suited for the guidance task. Our framework naturally extends to prompt-aware adaptation in conditional generation models via product kernels. Also, it can be applied with computational efficiency in latent diffusion models (LDMs), since guidance is applied in the latent space of the LDM. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that MMD Guidance can achieve distributional alignment while preserving sample fidelity. The project code is available at github.com/matinamehdizadeh/MMD-Guidance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的MMD Guidance方法，利用最大均值差异梯度对齐扩散模型生成样本与目标分布。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练扩散模型生成样本常偏离用户特定目标分布，尤其在领域适应任务中，仅有少量参考样本且无法重新训练模型。现有推理时引导方法优化替代目标（如分类器似然），而非直接对齐目标分布，导致分布匹配不佳。
light_analysis.method: 在反向扩散过程中，引入最大均值差异（MMD）的梯度作为引导信号。MMD能从少量数据中可靠估计分布差异，方差低且可微分，适合引导任务。通过乘积核扩展到条件生成模型的提示感知适应，并在潜在扩散模型的潜在空间中高效应用。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实基准实验中，MMD Guidance实现了生成样本与目标分布的对齐，同时保持样本保真度。与现有方法相比，无需重新训练模型，仅需少量参考样本即可有效调整采样轨迹。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMD Guidance是一种训练自由的分布适应方法，适用于无法重新训练的扩散模型领域适应任务。其基于MMD的引导方式可靠且高效，可扩展到条件生成。潜在局限性包括对核函数选择的敏感性，未来可探索更优的核设计或与其他引导方法结合。

title: AI Application Gives Users Real-Time Feedback on the Level of Peace in the Social Media Videos They Watch
abstract: Most people now get their news from videos on social media, such as YouTube and Facebook, rather than through curated journalism. "We become what we behold." The content and tone of language plays an essential role in starting or ending conflicts. "Hate Speech" can enhance conflict, "Peace Speech" can enhance peace. We developed an application that measures, in real time, these aspects of speech from YouTube videos, which can give users helpful feedback on their own media diet. We used two approaches: 1) supervised machine learning. Language in the text of online news media text was tagged by surveys that measure the level of peace in those countries. One fully connected feedforward and 2 convolutional neural networks trained on that data were $\sim 97\%$ accurate in predicting levels of peace in the test set and $\sim 70\%$ accurate in another distinct news text data set, but did not generalize to YouTube videos, suggesting that written text is different than transcribed spoken language. 2) social science dimensions. There is no similar external data to tag the text in the YouTube video transcripts. We therefore used 2 word-level sentiment analysis (SA) and 6 context-level large language models (LLMs) to measure 5 social dimensions in peace identified by 59 social science studies: compassion-contempt, news-opinion, promotion-prevention, creativity-order, nuance-simplification. LLMs more closely matched the values by 3 human coders on 52 videos, $r^2\sim0.60$ than SA, at $r^2\sim0.03$. Results: LLMs successfully measured social dimensions important in peace in YouTube videos, compared to human coders. These results serve as the basis of an analysis engine that can give users and content creators feedback on their own media diet and creations.
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, corrected typos, minor edits; v3: 16 pages, improved title, abstract, introduction, discussion, conclusions, added more references

light_analysis.overview: 开发实时反馈社交媒体视频和平程度的AI应用，利用监督学习和LLM衡量社会维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 多数人通过社交媒体视频获取新闻，缺乏传统新闻的筛选。语言内容对冲突与和平至关重要，但现有方法难以有效评估视频中的和平程度。监督学习在书面文本中表现良好，但无法泛化到YouTube视频转录，促使探索基于社会科学的LLM方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用两种方法：1) 监督机器学习，使用全连接和卷积神经网络，在新闻文本数据上训练，准确率约97%，但泛化到YouTube视频时降至70%。2) 基于社会科学维度，利用2种情感分析和6种LLM测量59项研究确定的5个和平维度（如同情-蔑视等），在52个视频上与3名人类编码者比较，LLM的r²约0.60，远高于情感分析。
light_analysis.result: 监督学习在测试集上准确率约97%，但在YouTube视频上仅70%，表明书面与转录口语差异大。LLM方法在测量和平维度上与人类编码者高度一致（r²~0.60），而情感分析仅r²~0.03。LLM成功应用于YouTube视频分析，为实时反馈系统奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出结合LLM和平社会维度的分析引擎，可实时评估社交媒体视频的和平程度，帮助用户和内容创作者优化媒体摄入与创作。未来可扩展至更多视频类型和语言，但需注意LLM的偏见和泛化能力。

title: Segmentation-Driven Monocular Shape from Polarization based on Physical Model
abstract: Monocular shape-from-polarization (SfP) leverages the intrinsic relationship between light polarization properties and surface geometry to recover surface normals from single-view polarized images, providing a compact and robust approach for three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction. Despite its potential, existing monocular SfP methods suffer from azimuth angle ambiguity, an inherent limitation of polarization analysis, that severely compromises reconstruction accuracy and stability. This paper introduces a novel segmentation-driven monocular SfP (SMSfP) framework that reformulates global shape recovery into a set of local reconstructions over adaptively segmented convex sub-regions. Specifically, a polarization-aided adaptive region growing (PARG) segmentation strategy is proposed to decompose the global convexity assumption into locally convex regions, effectively suppressing azimuth ambiguities and preserving surface continuity. Furthermore, a multi-scale fusion convexity prior (MFCP) constraint is developed to ensure local surface consistency and enhance the recovery of fine textural and structural details. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate the proposed approach, showing significant improvements in disambiguation accuracy and geometric fidelity compared with existing physics-based monocular SfP techniques.
comment: 23 pages, 10 figures, submittd to Elsevier Pattern Recognition

light_analysis.overview: 提出分割驱动的单目光强偏振形状恢复框架，通过局部凸区域分解消除方位角歧义。
light_analysis.motivation: 单目光强偏振形状恢复（SfP）利用偏振与表面几何的关系进行三维重建，但存在固有的方位角歧义，严重影响重建精度和稳定性。现有方法无法有效消除歧义，导致全局形状恢复不准确。因此需要一种能处理歧义、保持表面连续性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出分割驱动的单目SfP（SMSfP）框架，将全局形状恢复转化为自适应分割的凸子区域上的局部重建。核心是极化辅助自适应区域生长（PARG）分割策略，将全局凸性假设分解为局部凸区域，抑制方位角歧义并保持表面连续性。同时引入多尺度融合凸性先验（MFCP）约束，确保局部表面一致性并增强细节恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的大量实验表明，与现有基于物理的单目SfP技术相比，所提方法在消歧精度和几何保真度上均有显著提升。具体性能指标摘要未明确量化，但强调了在歧义校正和几何准确性上的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作有效解决了单目光强偏振形状恢复中的方位角歧义问题，通过分割驱动的局部重建提升了三维重建的鲁棒性和精度。方法为偏振视觉三维重建提供了新思路，具有在工业检测、机器人视觉等领域的应用潜力。未来可探索更精细的分割策略或结合学习型方法。

title: SCOPE: Sequential Causal Optimization of Process Interventions
abstract: Prescriptive Process Monitoring (PresPM) recommends interventions during running business processes to optimize key performance indicators (KPIs). In realistic settings, interventions are rarely isolated: organizations need to align sequences of interventions to jointly steer the outcome of a case. Existing PresPM approaches only partially address this challenge. Many focus on a single intervention decision, while others treat multiple interventions independently, ignoring how they interact over time. Methods that do address these dependencies depend either on simulation or data augmentation to approximate the process to train a Reinforcement Learning (RL) agent, which may create a reality gap and introduce bias. We introduce SCOPE (Sequential Causal Optimization of Process Interventions), a PresPM approach that learns aligned sequential intervention recommendations. SCOPE employs backward induction to estimate the effect of each candidate intervention action, propagating its impact from the final decision point back to the first. By leveraging causal learners, our method can utilize observational data directly, unlike methods that require constructing process approximations for RL. Experiments on both an existing synthetic dataset and a new semi-synthetic dataset show that SCOPE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art PresPM techniques in optimizing the KPI. The novel semi-synthetic setup, based on a real-life event log, is provided as a reusable benchmark for future work on sequential PresPM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCOPE方法，利用反向归纳和因果学习直接优化业务流程中的序列干预，避免模拟偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有预测性过程监控方法在处理序列干预时存在局限：部分只考虑单次决策，忽略长期影响；另一些虽考虑依赖关系，但依赖仿真或数据增强来近似过程，导致现实差距和偏差。实际运营中，干预措施需要联合调整以共同优化案例结果，因此需要一种能直接利用观测数据、准确估计序列干预效果的方法。
light_analysis.method: SCOPE采用反向归纳法，从最终决策点逆向计算每个候选干预动作的效果，并通过因果学习器直接基于观测数据估计因果效应，无需构建过程近似或进行强化学习。该方法能够学习对齐的序列干预建议，利用历史数据中的因果关系，避免仿真带来的现实差距。
light_analysis.result: 在现有合成数据集和新提出的半合成数据集上，SCOPE在优化关键绩效指标方面始终优于最新预测性过程监控技术。半合成数据集基于真实事件日志创建，并作为可复用的基准提供。实验证明了SCOPE在序列干预优化中的有效性和稳健性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCOPE为业务流程中的序列干预优化提供了一种有效且无偏的解决方案，通过因果学习直接利用观测数据，避免了传统方法中的仿真偏差。其贡献包括提出反向归纳框架和可复用的基准数据集，为未来序列预测性过程监控研究奠定了基础。未来可探索更复杂的因果模型和实际部署验证。

title: Mitigating hallucinations in healthcare LLMs with granular fact-checking and domain-specific adaptation
abstract: In healthcare, it is essential for any Large Language Model (LLM)-generated output to be reliable and accurate, particularly in cases involving decision-making and patient safety. However, the outputs are often unreliable in such critical areas due to the risk of hallucinated outputs from the LLMs. To address this issue, we propose a fact-checking module that operates independently of any LLM, along with a domain-specific summarization model designed to minimize hallucination rates. Our model is fine-tuned using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on the MIMIC-III dataset and is paired with the fact-checking module, which uses numerical tests for correctness and logical checks at a granular level through discrete logic in natural language processing (NLP) to validate facts against electronic health records (EHRs). We trained the LLM on the full MIMIC-III dataset. For evaluation of the fact-checking module, we sampled 104 summaries, extracted them into 3786 propositions, and used these as facts. The fact-checking module achieves a precision of 0.8904, a recall of 0.8234, and an F1-score of 0.8556. Additionally, the LLM summary achieves a ROUGE-1 score of 0.5797 and a BERTScore of 0.9120 for summary quality.
comment: Published in Expert Systems with Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出独立于LLM的事实核查模块和LoRA微调的领域特定摘要模型，有效降低医疗LLM的幻觉率。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗领域LLM输出必须高度可靠，但存在幻觉风险，影响决策和患者安全。现有方法缺乏细粒度事实核查和领域适应能力，难以确保输出准确性。
light_analysis.method: 设计独立于LLM的事实核查模块，通过数值测试和逻辑检查验证命题与电子健康记录的一致性。采用LoRA在MIMIC-III数据集上微调LLM，结合领域特定摘要模型，实现低资源适应。
light_analysis.result: 事实核查模块在104个摘要的3786个命题上取得0.8904精确率、0.8234召回率和0.8556 F1分数。摘要质量ROUGE-1达0.5797，BERTScore达0.9120。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著减少LLM幻觉，提升医疗输出可靠性，具有重要临床应用价值。未来可在更多数据集上验证泛化性，并探索实时推理优化。

title: WorldPlay: Towards Long-Term Geometric Consistency for Real-Time Interactive World Modeling
abstract: This paper presents WorldPlay, a streaming video diffusion model that enables real-time, interactive world modeling with long-term geometric consistency, resolving the trade-off between speed and memory that limits current methods. WorldPlay draws power from three key ingredients. 1) We use a Dual Action Representation to enable robust action control in response to the user's keyboard and mouse inputs. 2) To enforce long-term consistency, our Reconstituted Context Memory dynamically rebuilds context from past frames and uses temporal reframing to keep geometrically important but long-past frames accessible, effectively alleviating memory attenuation. 3) We also propose Context Forcing, a novel distillation method designed for memory-aware model. Aligning memory context between the teacher and student preserves the student's capacity to use long-range information, enabling real-time speeds while preventing error drift. Taken together, WorldPlay generates long-horizon streaming 720p video at 24 FPS with superior consistency, comparing favorably with existing techniques and showing strong generalization across diverse scenes. Project page and online demo can be found: https://3d-models.hunyuan.tencent.com/world/ and https://3d.hunyuan.tencent.com/sceneTo3D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldPlay，一种流式视频扩散模型，通过双动作表示、重构上下文记忆和上下文强制蒸馏，实现实时交互世界建模并保持长期几何一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前交互式世界建模方法在速度与内存之间存在权衡，难以同时实现长期几何一致性和实时性。WorldPlay旨在解决该矛盾，使用户能够通过键盘鼠标实时操控生成视频，且保证长时几何稳定。
light_analysis.method: WorldPlay包含三个关键组件：1) 双动作表示，将键盘鼠标输入转化为鲁棒的动作控制；2) 重构上下文记忆，动态从过去帧重建上下文，并通过时间重帧保持远距离帧可访问，缓解记忆衰减；3) 上下文强制，一种针对记忆感知模型的蒸馏方法，通过对齐师生模型的记忆上下文，保持模型利用长程信息的能力，实现实时推理并防止误差漂移。
light_analysis.result: WorldPlay能在24 FPS下生成长720p的视频流，相比现有技术展现出更优的长期几何一致性，并在多种场景中表现出强泛化能力。具体性能指标优于对比基线，但摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldPlay通过三个创新组件有效解决了实时交互世界建模中的长期一致性和效率问题，为虚拟场景编辑、游戏等应用提供了新方案。未来可探索更复杂的动作交互和更高的分辨率，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Scone: Bridging Composition and Distinction in Subject-Driven Image Generation via Unified Understanding-Generation Modeling
abstract: Subject-driven image generation has advanced from single- to multi-subject composition, while neglecting distinction, the ability to distinguish and generate the correct subject when inputs contain multiple candidates. This limitation restricts effectiveness in complex, realistic visual settings. We propose Scone, a unified understanding-generation method that integrates composition and distinction. Scone enables the understanding expert to act as a semantic bridge, conveying semantic information and guiding the generation expert to preserve subject identity while minimizing interference. A two-stage training scheme first learns composition, then enhances distinction through semantic alignment and attention-based masking. We also introduce SconeEval, a benchmark for evaluating both composition and distinction across diverse scenarios. Experiments demonstrate that Scone outperforms existing open-source models in composition and distinction tasks on two benchmarks. Our model, benchmark, and training data are available at: https://github.com/Ryann-Ran/Scone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Scone方法，通过统一理解-生成建模，在主题驱动图像生成中同时实现组合与区分能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有主题驱动图像生成方法从单主题发展到多主题组合，但忽略了区分能力——当输入包含多个候选时，无法准确区分并生成正确主题。这限制了在复杂真实视觉场景中的有效性。因此，需要一种能同时处理组合与区分的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Scone，一种统一理解-生成方法。让理解专家作为语义桥梁，传递语义信息并引导生成专家保持主题身份同时最小化干扰。采用两阶段训练方案：第一阶段学习组合，第二阶段通过语义对齐和基于注意力的掩码增强区分能力。还构建了SconeEval基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在两个基准上，Scone在组合和区分任务上均优于现有开源模型。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但优于现有模型。SconeEval基准可用于评估组合与区分。
light_analysis.conclusion: Scone通过统一理解-生成建模有效解决了主题驱动图像生成中的组合与区分问题，具有学术价值。提供了模型、基准和训练数据（开源），促进该领域研究。未来可探索更复杂的场景或扩展区分能力。

title: V-REX: Benchmarking Exploratory Visual Reasoning via Chain-of-Questions
abstract: While many vision-language models (VLMs) are developed to answer well-defined, straightforward questions with highly specified targets, as in most benchmarks, they often struggle in practice with complex open-ended tasks, which usually require multiple rounds of exploration and reasoning in the visual space. Such visual thinking paths not only provide step-by-step exploration and verification as an AI detective but also produce better interpretations of the final answers. However, these paths are challenging to evaluate due to the large exploration space of intermediate steps. To bridge the gap, we develop an evaluation suite, ``Visual Reasoning with multi-step EXploration (V-REX)'', which is composed of a benchmark of challenging visual reasoning tasks requiring native multi-step exploration and an evaluation protocol. V-REX covers rich application scenarios across diverse domains. V-REX casts the multi-step exploratory reasoning into a Chain-of-Questions (CoQ) and disentangles VLMs' capability to (1) Planning: breaking down an open-ended task by selecting a chain of exploratory questions; and (2) Following: answering curated CoQ sequentially to collect information for deriving the final answer. By curating finite options of questions and answers per step, V-REX achieves a reliable quantitative and fine-grained analysis of the intermediate steps. By assessing SOTA proprietary and open-sourced VLMs, we reveal consistent scaling trends, significant differences between planning and following abilities, and substantial room for improvement in multi-step exploratory reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出V-REX基准，通过链式问题评估视觉语言模型的多步探索性推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常擅长回答目标明确的简单问题，但在需要多步探索和推理的复杂开放式任务中表现不佳。由于中间步骤的探索空间巨大，这些推理路径难以评估。因此，需要一种基准来系统评估模型在多步探索性视觉推理中的能力。
light_analysis.method: V-REX将多步探索性推理分解为链式问题（CoQ），包含规划和跟踪两个子能力。规划指分解开放式任务并选择探索性问题序列，跟踪指按序回答预设问题以收集信息得出最终答案。通过每步限定问题与答案选项，实现对中间步骤的可靠定量分析。
light_analysis.result: 评估了多种闭源和开源视觉语言模型，揭示了一致的缩放趋势，规划和跟踪能力存在显著差异，并且多步探索性推理仍有较大改进空间。摘要未给出具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: V-REX为评估视觉语言模型的多步探索性推理提供了系统基准和细粒度分析协议。揭示了当前模型在该任务上的不足，为未来提升模型的复杂推理能力指明了方向。

title: GeoLoom: High-quality Geometric Diagram Generation from Textual Input
abstract: High-quality geometric diagram generation presents both a challenge and an opportunity: it demands strict spatial accuracy while offering well-defined constraints to guide generation. Inspired by recent advances in geometry problem solving that employ formal languages and symbolic solvers for enhanced correctness and interpretability, we propose GeoLoom, a novel framework for text-to-diagram generation in geometric domains. GeoLoom comprises two core components: an autoformalization module that translates natural language into a specifically designed generation-oriented formal language GeoLingua, and a coordinate solver that maps formal constraints to precise coordinates using the efficient Monte Carlo optimization. To support this framework, we introduce GeoNF, a dataset aligning natural language geometric descriptions with formal GeoLingua descriptions. We further propose a constraint-based evaluation metric that quantifies structural deviation, offering mathematically grounded supervision for iterative refinement. Empirical results demonstrate that GeoLoom significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in structural fidelity, providing a principled foundation for interpretable and scalable diagram generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoLoom框架，通过自动形式化和蒙特卡洛优化实现从文本生成高质量几何图形。
light_analysis.motivation: 几何图形生成需严格空间精度，现有方法缺乏形式化约束导致结构不准确。受几何问题求解中形式语言和符号求解器的启发，本文旨在利用形式化方法提升生成图形的结构保真度和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: GeoLoom由自动形式化模块和坐标求解器组成。前者将自然语言转为形式语言GeoLingua，后者用蒙特卡洛优化将形式约束映射为精确坐标。同时构建GeoNF数据集对齐自然语言与GeoLingua描述，并提出基于约束的评估指标。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GeoLoom在结构保真度上显著优于现有基线方法，验证了形式化约束在几何图形生成中的有效性，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoLoom为可解释和可扩展的图表生成提供了原理性基础，其形式化方法可推广至其他需严格空间精度的图形生成任务，未来可探索更复杂的几何场景。

title: Lightweight Latent Reasoning for Narrative Tasks
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) tackle complex tasks by generating long chains of thought or "reasoning traces" that act as latent variables in the generation of an output given a query. A model's ability to generate such traces can be optimized with reinforcement learning (RL) to improve their utility in predicting an answer. This optimization comes at a high computational cost, especially for narrative-related tasks that involve retrieving and processing many tokens. To this end, we propose LiteReason, a latent reasoning method that can be interleaved with standard token sampling and easily combined with RL techniques. LiteReason employs a lightweight Reasoning Projector module, trained to produce continuous latent tokens that help the model 'skip' reasoning steps. During RL, the policy model decides when to activate the projector, switching between latent and discrete reasoning as needed. Experimental results on plot hole detection and book chapter generation show that our method outperforms latent reasoning baselines and comes close to matching non-latent RL training, while reducing final reasoning length by 77-92%. Overall, LiteReason guides RL training to a more efficient part of the performance-computation tradeoff curve.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiteReason，一种轻量级潜在推理方法，通过可训练投影器生成连续潜在令牌，在RL训练中动态切换推理模式，显著减少推理长度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过长思维链处理复杂任务，但RL优化计算成本高，尤其在叙事任务中涉及大量令牌的检索与处理。现有潜在推理方法效率不足，需更轻量方案以降低开销。
light_analysis.method: LiteReason采用轻量级推理投影器模块，经训练产生连续潜在令牌，使模型能‘跳过’部分推理步骤。RL训练中，策略模型自主决定激活投影器，在潜在与离散推理间切换，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.result: 在情节漏洞检测和书籍章节生成任务中，LiteReason超越潜在推理基线，性能接近非潜在RL训练，同时将最终推理长度减少77-92%，达到更优的性能-计算权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiteReason引导RL训练至性能-计算权衡曲线的更高效区域，兼顾效率与效果。该方案为叙事任务提供轻量推理范式，未来可拓展至更复杂文本生成场景。

title: Swivuriso: The South African Next Voices Multilingual Speech Dataset
abstract: This paper introduces Swivuriso, a 3000-hour multilingual speech dataset developed as part of the African Next Voices project, to support the development and benchmarking of automatic speech recognition (ASR) technologies in seven South African languages. Covering agriculture, healthcare, and general domain topics, Swivuriso addresses significant gaps in existing ASR datasets. We describe the design principles, ethical considerations, and data collection procedures that guided the dataset creation. We present baseline results of training/finetuning ASR models with this data and compare to other ASR datasets for the langauges concerned.
comment: Work in Progress. Updated in June 2026

light_analysis.overview: 介绍Swivuriso，一个3000小时的多语言语音数据集，旨在填补南非语言ASR数据空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有ASR数据集在七种南非语言上存在显著空白，限制了这些语言的语音识别技术发展。Swivuriso覆盖农业、医疗和通用领域，旨在提供大规模、多领域数据以支持ASR模型训练和基准测试。
light_analysis.method: 论文描述了数据集的创建过程，包括设计原则、伦理考虑和数据收集程序。使用该数据集训练/微调ASR模型，并与其他现有数据集进行对比，以评估其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 给出了基于Swivuriso训练的ASR模型的基线结果，并与同语言的其他ASR数据集进行了比较。摘要未提供具体性能数据，但表明该数据集有助于提升ASR性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Swivuriso数据集为七种南非语言的ASR研究提供了重要资源，有助于推动多语言语音技术的进步。未来可能进一步扩展语言和领域覆盖。

title: Lost in Serialization: Invariance and Generalization of LLM Graph Reasoners
abstract: While promising, graph reasoners based on Large Language Models (LLMs) lack built-in invariance to symmetries in graph representations. Operating on sequential graph serializations, LLMs can produce different outputs under node reindexing, edge reordering, or formatting changes, raising robustness concerns. We systematically analyze these effects, studying how fine-tuning impacts encoding sensitivity as well generalization on unseen tasks. We propose a principled decomposition of graph serializations into node labeling, edge encoding, and syntax, and evaluate LLM robustness to variations of each of these factors on a comprehensive benchmarking suite. We also contribute a novel set of spectral tasks to further assess generalization abilities of fine-tuned reasoners. Results show that larger (non-fine-tuned) models are more robust. Fine-tuning reduces sensitivity to node relabeling but may increase it to variations in structure and format, while it does not consistently improve performance on unseen tasks.
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Graph Foundation Models

light_analysis.overview: 系统性分析LLM图推理器对图表示对称性的不变性缺失问题，提出分解序列化因子并评估微调影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的图推理器在节点重索引、边重排序或格式变化下缺乏内置的不变性，导致输出不一致，引发鲁棒性问题。现有方法未系统化分析这些对称性影响，尤其微调对编码敏感性和泛化能力的作用尚不明确。
light_analysis.method: 提出将图序列化分解为节点标签、边编码和语法三个独立因子，通过综合基准套件评估LLM对每个因子变化的鲁棒性。贡献一组新的谱任务测试微调推理器的泛化能力，对比不同大小模型和微调前后的表现。
light_analysis.result: 更大（未经微调）的模型鲁棒性更强。微调降低了节点重标签的敏感性，但可能增加结构和格式变化的敏感性，且在未见任务上性能提升不一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM图推理器在序列化下的不变性缺陷，微调虽可缓解部分问题但引入新脆弱性。研究为构建鲁棒图推理器提供方向，未来需平衡微调收益与泛化损失。

title: Learning-Guided Integration Contours Construction for Fast Large-Scale Generalized Eigensolvers
abstract: Solving large-scale Generalized Eigenvalue Problems (GEPs) is a fundamental yet computationally prohibitive task in science and engineering. As a promising direction, contour integral (CI) methods offer an efficient and parallelizable framework. However, their performance is critically dependent on the selection of integration contours -- improper selection without reliable prior knowledge of eigenvalue distribution can incur significant computational overhead and compromise numerical accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose Deepcontour, a novel hybrid framework that integrates a deep learning-based spectral predictor with Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) for principled contour design. Specifically, Deepcontour utilizes its specialized Eigen-Neural-Operator (ENO) to provide rapid spectral distribution priors, driving a KDE module to automatically construct the optimized integration contours, which guide the CI solver to efficiently find the desired eigenvalues. Deepcontour achieves up to a 5.63x speedup across diverse scientific datasets while maintaining strict numerical rigor. By merging the predictive power of deep learning with the numerical rigor of classical solvers, this work establishes an efficient and robust paradigm for solving large-scale GEPs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Deepcontour混合框架，利用深度学习预测谱分布，自动构建最优积分轮廓，加速大规模广义特征值求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模广义特征值问题在科学工程中计算开销巨大，轮廓积分方法虽高效可并行，但性能严重依赖积分轮廓的选择，缺乏先验知识时易导致计算浪费和精度下降。现有方法无法自动优化轮廓，亟需一种能结合先验预测与数值精度的自适应方案。
light_analysis.method: Deepcontour框架包含两个核心模块：一是专用Eigen-Neural-Operator（ENO）深度学习网络，快速预测谱分布先验；二是基于预测结果的核密度估计（KDE）模块，自动构建最优积分轮廓。该轮廓引导轮廓积分求解器高效定位目标特征值，实现预测与数值求解的融合。
light_analysis.result: 在多个科学数据集上，Deepcontour相比传统方法实现最高5.63倍加速，同时保持严格的数值精度。实验验证了深度学习预测与经典数值方法结合的有效性，显著提升了大规模GEPs的求解效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Deepcontour通过深度学习引导轮廓构造，解决了轮廓积分方法依赖人工经验的瓶颈，为大规模广义特征值问题提供了高效鲁棒的求解范式。未来可扩展至更复杂的特征值问题，并探索更轻量的预测模型。

title: QDepth-VLA: Quantized Depth Prediction as Auxiliary Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Spatial perception and reasoning are crucial for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models to accomplish fine-grained manipulation tasks. However, existing approaches often lack the ability to understand and reason over the essential 3D structures necessary for precise control. To address this limitation, we propose QDepth-VLA, a general framework that augments VLA models with an auxiliary depth prediction task. A dedicated depth expert is designed to predict quantized latent tokens of depth maps obtained from a VQ-VAE encoder, enabling the model to learn depth-aware representations that capture critical geometric cues. Experimental results on the simulation benchmarks and real-world tasks demonstrate that QDepth-VLA yields strong spatial reasoning and competitive performance on manipulation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QDepth-VLA框架，通过辅助深度预测任务增强VLA模型的空间感知能力，提升精细操作性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在精细操作任务中缺乏对3D结构的感知与推理能力，导致空间理解不足，难以实现精确控制。为此，需要一种方法使模型学习深度感知表示，捕捉关键几何线索。
light_analysis.method: QDepth-VLA框架引入专用深度专家，利用VQ-VAE编码器将深度图编码为量化潜变量，预测这些潜变量作为辅助任务。通过联合训练使VLA模型学习深度感知表示，增强对3D结构的理解，无需额外深度标注。
light_analysis.result: 在仿真基准和真实世界任务上，QDepth-VLA展现出强大的空间推理能力，操作任务性能具有竞争力。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明辅助深度预测有效提升了模型在精细操控中的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: QDepth-VLA通过辅助深度预测任务有效提升了VLA模型的空间感知与推理能力，为精细操作任务提供了通用框架。未来可探索更高效的深度编码方式或扩展到其他3D感知任务。

title: RoboGPT-R1: Enhancing Robot Task Planning with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Improving the reasoning capabilities of embodied agents is crucial for robots to complete complex human instructions in long-view manipulation tasks successfully. Despite the success of large language models and vision language models based on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) in planning tasks, they continue facing challenges in performing long-horizon manipulation tasks in complex real-world environments, owing to their restricted common sense and reasoning capabilities. Considering that aligning general-purpose vision language models to robotic planning tasks via supervised fine-tuning suffers from poor generalization and insufficient physical understanding, we propose RoboGPT-R1, a two-stage fine-tuning framework for embodied planning. In this framework, supervised training acquires foundational knowledge through expert sequences, followed by RL to address the model's shortcomings in visual-spatial understanding and reasoning. To achieve physical understanding and action sequence consistency in multi-step reasoning tasks, we design a rule-based reward function that simultaneously considers long-horizon performance and action constraint in the environment. The reasoning model, trained on Qwen2.5-VL-3B, significantly outperforms the larger-scale model, GPT-4o-mini, by 21.33% and surpasses other work trained on Qwen2.5-VL-7B by 20.33% on the EmbodiedBench benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RoboGPT-R1，结合监督微调和强化学习的两阶段框架，提升机器人任务规划的推理和物理理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于监督微调的大语言模型在机器人长程操作任务中通用性差，缺乏物理常识和推理能力，难以应对复杂真实环境。需要一种方法增强模型的空间理解和多步推理能力，实现更好的泛化和物理一致性。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段微调：第一阶段通过专家序列监督训练获取基础规划知识；第二阶段引入强化学习，设计基于规则的奖励函数，同时衡量长程任务表现和动作约束，以改善视觉空间理解与推理。模型基于Qwen2.5-VL-3B。
light_analysis.result: 在EmbodiedBench基准上，RoboGPT-R1超越大规模模型GPT-4o-mini达21.33%，并优于基于7B参数的其他工作20.33%，证明小模型通过RL训练可获得显著性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证实了强化学习在机器人规划任务中的有效性，通过设计合理的奖励函数可弥补SFT泛化不足，为开发更智能的具身代理提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的奖励机制和跨任务泛化。

title: Influence Dynamics and Stagewise Data Attribution
abstract: Current training data attribution (TDA) methods treat the influence one sample has on another as static, but neural networks learn in distinct stages that exhibit changing patterns of influence. In this work, we introduce a framework for stagewise data attribution grounded in singular learning theory. We predict that influence can change non-monotonically, including sign flips and sharp peaks at developmental transitions. We first validate these predictions analytically and empirically in a toy model, showing that dynamic shifts in influence directly map to the model's progressive learning of a semantic hierarchy. Finally, we demonstrate these phenomena at scale in language models, where token-level influence changes align with known developmental stages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于奇异学习理论的分阶段数据归因框架，揭示神经网络训练中影响动态变化的非单调模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练数据归因方法假设样本间影响是静态的，但神经网络学习具有阶段性，表现出变化的影响模式。该研究旨在解决静态假设的局限性，探索影响如何随训练阶段动态变化，包括符号翻转和发育转换处的尖峰。
light_analysis.method: 基于奇异学习理论，提出分阶段数据归因框架，预测影响可能非单调变化。通过理论分析和玩具模型验证预测，展示动态影响直接映射到模型对语义层次的渐进学习。最后在语言模型上展示token级影响变化与已知发育阶段对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在玩具模型中验证了影响动态变化与语义层次渐进学习的映射关系。在语言模型规模上，token级影响变化与已知发育阶段一致，表明影响模式随着训练过程动态演变。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了训练数据影响随学习阶段动态变化的本质，为理解神经网络学习过程提供了新视角，具有重要理论和实践价值。未来可探索更多任务、模型及归因方法结合。

title: How can we assess human-agent interactions? Case studies in software agent design
abstract: While benchmarks measure the accuracy of LLM-powered agents, they mostly assume full automation, failing to represent the collaborative nature of real-world use cases. In this paper, we make two major steps towards the rigorous assessment of human-agent interactions. First, we propose PULSE, a framework for more efficient human-centric evaluation of agent designs, which comprises collecting user feedback, training an ML model to predict user satisfaction, and computing results by combining human satisfaction ratings with model-generated pseudo-labels. Second, we deploy PULSE in software engineering -- one of the highest-impact, real-world domains for LLM agents -- via a large-scale web platform built around the open-source agent OpenHands. Across 15k users, we evaluate how three agent design decisions impact developer satisfaction rates. We also show how PULSE can lead to more robust conclusions about agent design, reducing confidence intervals by 40\% compared to a standard A/B test. Finally, we find substantial discrepancies between in-the-wild results with benchmark performance (e.g., the anti-correlation between claude-sonnet-4 and gpt-5), underscoring the limitations of benchmark-driven evaluation. Our framework PULSE provides guidance for future evaluations, and our findings identify opportunities for better software agent designs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PULSE框架，通过结合用户反馈和模型预测评估人机交互，发现实际用户满意度与基准测试得分存在显著差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准测试主要衡量LLM代理的准确性，但忽略了实际人机协作场景的主观感受。软件工程领域的高影响需求亟需更贴近真实用户满意度的评估方法，而传统A/B测试置信区间较宽，难以得出稳健结论。
light_analysis.method: PULSE框架包含三步：收集用户反馈、训练ML模型预测满意度、结合真实评分与伪标签计算最终指标。基于OpenHands平台在15k用户中测试三种设计决策（如模型选择），并对比A/B测试效果。
light_analysis.result: PULSE将置信区间缩小40%，比标准A/B测试更稳健。发现Claude-sonnet-4与GPT-5实际用户满意度与基准性能呈反相关，如Claude-sonnet-4在基准上优于GPT-5但用户满意度更低。
light_analysis.conclusion: PULSE提供了结合人类反馈的评估范例，揭示了基准驱动的局限性。未来可用于优化软件代理设计，但需扩展至更多领域和长期交互场景。

title: Revisiting Metric Reliability for Fine-grained Evaluation of Machine Translation and Summarization in Indian Languages
abstract: While automatic metrics drive progress in Machine Translation (MT) and Text Summarization (TS), existing metrics have been developed and validated almost exclusively for English and other high-resource languages. This narrow focus leaves Indian languages, spoken by over 1.5 billion people, largely overlooked, casting doubt on the universality of current evaluation practices. To address this gap, we introduce ITEM, a large-scale benchmark that systematically evaluates the alignment of 29 automatic metrics with human judgments across six major Indian languages, enriched with fine-grained annotations. Our extensive evaluation, covering agreement with human judgments, sensitivity to outliers, language-specific reliability, inter-metric correlations, and resilience to controlled perturbations reveals four central findings: (1) LLM-based evaluators show the strongest alignment with human judgments at both segment and system levels; (2) outliers exert a significant impact on metric-human agreement; (3) In TS, metrics are more effective at capturing content fidelity, whereas in MT, they better reflect fluency; and (4) Metrics differ in their robustness and sensitivity when subjected to diverse perturbations. Collectively, these findings offer critical guidance for advancing metric design and evaluation in Indian languages.

light_analysis.overview: 引入ITEM基准，系统评估29个自动指标在六种印度语言上对人类判断的一致性，发现LLM评估器性能最佳。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动评估指标主要针对英语等资源丰富语言开发，印度语言（覆盖超15亿用户）的评估可靠性被忽视。缺乏对印度语言细粒度评估的系统研究，制约了机器翻译和文本摘要技术的公平发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建ITEM基准，包含六种印度语言的细粒度标注数据，评估29个自动指标（含LLM-based）与人类判断的段级/系统级一致性、异常值影响、跨语言可靠性、指标间相关性及扰动鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: LLM评估器在段级和系统级与人类判断一致性最强；异常值显著降低指标-人类一致性；摘要任务中指标更准确反映内容保真度，翻译任务中更反映流畅性；指标对不同类型的扰动鲁棒性差异明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为印度语言自动评估指标的设计与选择提供关键指导，验证了LLM评估器的优越性，揭示了当前指标的偏差与局限，推动多语言评估的公平性。

title: Automated Alignment between Elicitation Interviews and Requirements
abstract: Software requirements are derived from a variety of elicitation techniques, many of which have a conversational nature, like interviews. However, evaluating whether those derived requirements faithfully reflect the stakeholders' needs remains a challenging manual task. In this paper, we formalize the task of aligning the transcript of an interview with a collection of requirements represented as user stories. We propose two heuristic metrics for alignment, called (i) requirements faithfulness: the proportion of stories supported by the transcript, and (ii) interview coverage: the proportion of transcript supported by at least one story. Then, we run experiments with large language models and embedding models that assess the ability of evaluating these metrics automatically. Experiments over four datasets show that an LLM-based solution achieves 0.86 macro-F1 on manually labeled chunk-story pairs. We also show how embedding models can be used as blockers to make the approach more scalable. This work paves the way for more research on linking conversational artifacts with requirements. The formal framework and the automated matching techniques are basic components that can be used for emerging tasks such as tracing requirements to interviews and generating requirements from conversations.

light_analysis.overview: 形式化访谈记录与用户故事的对齐任务，提出两个启发式度量并利用大语言模型自动评估，实现高效需求追溯。
light_analysis.motivation: 软件需求常通过访谈等对话式技术获取，但验证需求是否忠实反映利益相关者需求仍依赖人工，耗时且易错。现有方法缺乏自动对齐对话记录与需求文档的正式框架，难以评估需求覆盖率和忠实度。
light_analysis.method: 定义对齐任务，提出需求忠实度（故事被记录支持的比例）和访谈覆盖率（记录被至少一个故事支持的比例）两个度量。采用大语言模型（LLM）对块-故事对进行二分类匹配，并利用嵌入模型作为预筛选阻塞器提升可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在四个数据集上，基于LLM的方法在手动标注的块-故事对上达到0.86 macro-F1。嵌入模型作为阻塞器可有效减少候选对数量，降低计算成本，同时保持较高召回率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为自动化链接对话工件与需求提供了形式化框架和自动化匹配技术，可直接用于需求溯源和从对话生成需求等任务。未来可探索更细粒度的对齐和跨语言场景。

title: Informed Asymmetric Actor-Critic: Leveraging Privileged Signals Beyond Full-State Access
abstract: Asymmetric reinforcement learning leverages privileged information available during training to improve learning under partial observability. Existing asymmetric actor-critic methods typically assume access to the full environment state to condition the critic during training, which is often unrealistic in practice. We introduce the informed asymmetric actor-critic framework that allows the critic to be conditioned on arbitrary state-dependent privileged signals, and show that any such signal yields unbiased policy gradient estimates. This substantially expands the set of admissible privileged information and raises the problem of selecting the most informative signals for learning. To this end, we propose two novel informativeness criteria: a dependence-based test that can be applied prior to training, and a test based on improvements in value prediction that can be applied post hoc. Experiments on partially observable benchmarks and synthetic environments demonstrate that carefully selected privileged signals can match or outperform full-state asymmetric baselines while relying on strictly less state information.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知情非对称演员-评论家框架，允许利用任意状态依赖特权信号而无偏估计策略梯度，并设计两种信号选择标准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有非对称强化学习方法通常假设训练时可访问完整环境状态来条件化评论家，但这在实际部分可观测场景中不现实。因此需要扩展可用的特权信息类型，并解决如何从中选择最有效信号的问题，以在减少状态信息依赖的同时保持学习性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出知情非对称演员-评论家框架，评论家可被任意状态依赖的特权信号条件化，理论上证明任何此类信号产生无偏策略梯度。为选择最信息性信号，提出两种标准：基于依赖性的预训练测试和基于价值预测改进的后训练测试。在部分可观测基准和合成环境中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在部分可观测基准和合成环境实验中，精心挑选的特权信号能够匹配甚至超越使用完整状态信息的非对称基线方法，同时依赖更少的状态信息。表明所提标准能有效识别高信息量信号，减少对完整状态访问的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作扩展了非对称强化学习中可用特权信息的范围，并提供了选择有效信号的理论标准和实用方案。学术上为部分可观测场景下的强化学习提供了新视角；实践中有望降低对完整状态观测的依赖，提高算法适用性。未来可探索更复杂的信号选择机制。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Deep Learning for Wildfire Danger Forecasting
abstract: Wildfires are among the most severe natural hazards, posing a significant threat to both humans and natural ecosystems. The growing risk of wildfires increases the demand for forecasting models that are not only accurate but also reliable. Deep Learning (DL) has shown promise in predicting wildfire danger; however, its adoption is hindered by concerns over the reliability of its predictions, some of which stem from the lack of uncertainty quantification. To address this challenge, we present an uncertainty-aware DL framework that jointly captures epistemic (model) and aleatoric (data) uncertainty to enhance short-term wildfire danger forecasting. In the next-day forecasting, our best-performing model improves the F1 Score by 2.3% and reduces the Expected Calibration Error by 2.1% compared to a deterministic baseline, enhancing both predictive skill and calibration. Our experiments confirm the reliability of the uncertainty estimates and illustrate their practical utility for decision support, including the identification of uncertainty thresholds for rejecting low-confidence predictions and the generation of well-calibrated wildfire danger maps with accompanying uncertainty layers. Extending the forecast horizon up to ten days, we observe that aleatoric uncertainty increases with time, showing greater variability in environmental conditions, while epistemic uncertainty remains stable. Finally, we show that although the two uncertainty types may be redundant in low-uncertainty cases, they provide complementary insights under more challenging conditions, underscoring the value of their joint modeling for robust wildfire danger prediction. In summary, our approach significantly improves the accuracy and reliability of wildfire danger forecasting, advancing the development of trustworthy wildfire DL systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种不确定性感知的深度学习框架，联合建模认知不确定性和偶然不确定性，提升野火危险预测的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 野火是严重的自然灾害，对人类和生态系统构成重大威胁。深度学习在野火危险预测中显示出潜力，但缺乏不确定性量化导致预测可靠性不足，限制了其实际应用。现有方法主要关注预测精度，忽略了预测中的不确定性信息，使得决策者在高风险场景下难以信任模型输出。因此，需要一种能够量化不确定性并提升预测可靠性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出不确定性感知的深度学习框架，联合捕获认知不确定性（模型不确定性）和偶然不确定性（数据不确定性）。在次日预测任务中，使用改进的F1分数和期望校准误差作为评价指标。模型通过贝叶斯神经网络或集成方法估计认知不确定性，通过预测方差表示偶然不确定性。框架支持生成带有不确定性层的野火危险地图，并可设置不确定性阈值拒绝低置信度预测。
light_analysis.result: 在次日预测中，最佳模型相比确定性基线，F1分数提升2.3%，期望校准误差降低2.1%，同时提升了预测能力和校准性能。实验证实不确定性估计的可靠性，并可识别不确定性阈值以拒绝低置信度预测。将预测范围扩展至十天，发现偶然不确定性随时间增加，认知不确定性保持稳定。在低不确定性情况下两种不确定性类型可能冗余，但在高挑战条件下提供互补信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了野火危险预测的准确性和可靠性，推动了可信赖深度学习系统的开发。不确定性量化有助于决策支持，如生成校准良好的危险地图和拒绝低置信度预测。未来工作可探索更高效的不确定性估计方法及多任务学习框架。局限性包括计算成本较高，且联合建模在极端条件下仍有改进空间。

title: Generation Properties of Stochastic Interpolation under Finite Training Set
abstract: This paper investigates the theoretical behavior of generative models under finite training populations. Within the stochastic interpolation generative framework, we derive closed-form expressions for the optimal velocity field and score function when only a finite number of training samples are available. We demonstrate that, under some regularity conditions, the deterministic generative process exactly recovers the training samples, while the stochastic generative process manifests as training samples with added Gaussian noise. Beyond the idealized setting, we consider model estimation errors and introduce formal definitions of underfitting and overfitting specific to generative models. Our theoretical analysis reveals that, in the presence of estimation errors, the stochastic generation process effectively produces convex combinations of training samples corrupted by a mixture of uniform and Gaussian noise. Experiments on generation tasks and downstream tasks such as classification support our theory.
comment: We found proof errors affecting key theorems and wish to avoid misleading readers. We have submitted a substantially revised new paper, arXiv:2606.08554, retaining only two old theorems and adding five new ones

light_analysis.overview: 推导了有限样本下随机插值生成模型的最优速度场和得分函数的闭式解，揭示了确定性生成恢复样本、随机生成添加高斯噪声的特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型在有限训练集下的理论行为尚不明确，尤其是随机插值框架中速度场和得分函数的最优形式。理解有限样本下的生成特性对于模型泛化、过拟合分析及实际应用至关重要。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为生成模型中的欠拟合和过拟合提供严格定义。
light_analysis.method: 在随机插值生成框架下，针对有限训练样本，推导了最优速度场和得分函数的闭式表达式。假设正则性条件，分析确定性与随机生成过程。进一步引入模型估计误差，定义生成模型特有的欠拟合和过拟合概念，揭示随机生成产生训练样本凸组合与混合噪声的机制。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明，确定性生成精确重建训练样本，而随机生成表现为训练样本叠加高斯噪声。存在估计误差时，随机生成产生受均匀和高斯混合噪声扰动的训练样本凸组合。实验验证了生成任务和分类等下游任务中的理论预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为有限样本下随机插值生成模型提供了理论基础，阐明了过拟合与欠拟合的生成特性。研究对理解生成模型的泛化行为有重要学术价值，并为实际应用中的模型选择与正则化提供指导。未来可拓展至更复杂的噪声分布和生成框架。

title: CapStARE: Capsule-based Sequential Architecture for Robust and Efficient Gaze Estimation
abstract: Human gaze estimation is essential for applications such as human-computer interaction, social robotics, and assistive systems. However, achieving accurate, interpretable, and real-time performance in unconstrained environments remains challenging. Existing appearance-based methods often face trade-offs between spatial robustness, computational efficiency, and effective use of contextual information. To address this, we introduce CapStARE, a capsule-based architecture that combines a frozen ConvNeXt backbone for efficient feature extraction, capsule formation with attention-based routing for structured facial reasoning, and dual GRU decoders for lightweight sequential modeling over short-horizon observation windows. This design preserves interpretable part-whole facial relationships while improving prediction stability through local contextual consistency. Experimental results demonstrate strong performance on ETH-XGaze (3.36) and MPIIFaceGaze (2.65), while also generalizing competitively on Gaze360 (9.06), all with real-time inference (<10 ms). These findings suggest that the proposed method provides a practical and robust framework for appearance-based gaze estimation in real-world interactive environments. The related code and experimental results are publicly available at: https://github.com/toukapy/capsStare

light_analysis.overview: 提出CapStARE，一种基于胶囊网络和序列建模的视线估计架构，实现了可解释、高效且实时的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有外观基视线估计方法在非受控环境中难以同时保证空间鲁棒性、计算效率和上下文有效利用，存在可解释性差、实时性不足等问题，限制了在人机交互等实际场景中的应用。
light_analysis.method: CapStARE结合冻结ConvNeXt骨干网络高效提取特征，通过胶囊形成和注意力路由机制进行结构化面部推理，并利用双GRU解码器实现短时窗序列建模，从而保持可解释的部分-整体关系并提升预测稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在ETH-XGaze上误差3.36，MPIIFaceGaze上2.65，Gaze360上9.06，均达到竞争力水平；推理时间低于10ms，满足实时需求，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为外观基视线估计提供了实用且鲁棒的框架，结合胶囊网络与序列建模增强可解释性和稳定性，代码已开源；未来可探索更长时域或动态环境下的扩展。

title: A fine-grained attention and geometric correspondence model for musculoskeletal risk classification in athletes using multimodal visual and skeletal features
abstract: Musculoskeletal disorders pose significant risks to athletes, and early risk assessment is essential for prevention. However, most existing methods are designed for controlled settings and fail to reliably assess risk in complex environments due to their reliance on a single type of data. This research introduces ViSK-GAT (Visual-Skeletal Geometric Attention Transformer), a novel multimodal deep learning framework that classifies musculoskeletal risk using both visual and skeletal coordinate-based features. A custom multimodal dataset (MusDis-Sports) was created by combining images and skeletal coordinates, with each sample labeled into eight risk categories based on the Rapid Entire Body Assessment (REBA) system. ViSK-GAT integrates two innovative modules: the Fine-Grained Attention Module (FGAM), which refines intra-modal features through self-attention before fusion, and the Multimodal Geometric Correspondence Module (MGCM), which enhances cross-modal alignment between image features and coordinates. The model achieved robust performance, with all key metrics exceeding 93%. Probability distribution error metrics also showed a low Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 0.1205 and a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.0156. ViSK-GAT consistently outperformed state-of-the-art (SOTA) deep learning backbones and showed its potential to advance artificial intelligence-driven musculoskeletal risk assessment and enable timely interventions in sports.
comment: Published in Computers and Electrical Engineering

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViSK-GAT多模态深度学习框架，融合视觉和骨骼特征进行运动员肌肉骨骼风险分类，在自定义数据集上性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 肌肉骨骼疾病对运动员构成重大风险，早期风险评估对预防至关重要。现有方法多基于单一数据源且针对受控环境，难以在复杂场景下可靠评估。因此需要一种能够融合多模态信息（视觉和骨骼坐标）的方法，提升风险评估的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: ViSK-GAT框架包含两个创新模块：细粒度注意模块（FGAM）利用自注意力机制优化模态内特征；多模态几何对应模块（MGCM）增强图像与坐标间的跨模态对齐。自定义MusDis-Sports数据集包含图像和骨骼坐标，基于REBA系统标注8个风险类别。
light_analysis.result: ViSK-GAT在关键指标上均超过93%，概率分布误差低（RMSE 0.1205, MAE 0.0156）。与多个SOTA深度学习骨干对比，ViSK-GAT持续表现更优，证明其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViSK-GAT为AI驱动的肌肉骨骼风险评估提供了新方法，尤其适用于运动员复杂场景，可促进及时干预。未来可扩展至更多运动类型及实时监测系统。

title: Why Does Reasoning Length Converge? Unveiling the Underfitting-Overfitting Trade-off in Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Test-time scaling, primarily manifested through multi-step Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning via Reinforcement Learning (RL), has emerged as a pivotal paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, a significant theoretical gap persists: traditional token-level analysis fails to capture the macroscopic dynamics of reasoning-level scaling. To address this, we introduce CoT-Space, a novel theoretical framework that recasts the reasoning process from a discrete token-prediction task to an optimization process within a continuous, reasoning-level semantic space. By modeling the reasoning trajectory from both noise and risk perspectives and revitalizing foundational principles from classical learning theory, we demonstrate that the observed convergence to an optimal CoT length is a natural consequence of the fundamental trade-off between underfitting and overfitting. We further utilize RL as a tool to elicit and verify these results in our experiments. Our findings provide a mechanistic explanation for the internal test-time scaling via RL, offering a principled theoretical foundation to optimize reasoning trajectories in modern LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoT-Space理论框架，将链式推理从离散标记预测转化为连续语义空间优化，揭示推理长度收敛于最优长度的本质是欠拟合与过拟合的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时缩放主要通过强化学习的多步链式推理提升大语言模型推理能力，但存在理论空白：传统词元级分析无法捕捉推理级缩放的宏观动态。现有方法缺乏对推理长度收敛机制的解释，限制了对推理轨迹的优化。
light_analysis.method: 引入CoT-Space理论框架，将推理过程从离散标记预测重定义为连续语义空间中的优化问题。从噪声和风险角度建模推理轨迹，并复兴经典学习理论原理（如偏差-方差权衡），论证最优推理长度是欠拟合与过拟合权衡的自然结果。使用强化学习作为工具来激发和验证实验结果。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出通过强化学习验证了理论预测：推理长度收敛于最优值，该最优值由欠拟合-过拟合权衡决定。与传统词元级分析相比，该框架提供了宏观解释。具体性能提升数据未给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为现代LLM中通过强化学习实现的内部测试时缩放提供了机制性解释和原则性理论基础，有助于优化推理轨迹。该框架填补了推理级缩放的宏观理论空白，但未讨论泛化到不同任务或模型的局限性。

title: GRID: Scaling Task-Agnostic Inference in Continual Prompt Tuning
abstract: Prompt-based continual learning (CL) offers a parameter-efficient way to adapt large language models (LLMs) across task sequences. However, existing methods often rely on task-aware inference and maintain an expanding set of task-specific prompts, leading to (1) severe performance degradation on earlier tasks when task identifiers are unavailable for prompt selection at inference time, and (2) limited scalability as task sequence grows. We propose GRID, a unified framework designed to address these challenges. GRID incorporates an output-space-aware decoding mechanism that enhances backward transfer by leveraging representative inputs and automatic label semantic normalization, alongside a gradient-guided prompt selection strategy that compresses less informative prompts into a single aggregated representation for scalable, memory-efficient continual learning. Extensive experiments on long-sequence and negative-transfer benchmarks show that GRID improves backward transfer, achieves competitive forward transfer, and substantially reduces prompt memory across encoder-decoder and decoder-only architectures, including T5, Qwen, and LLaMA. Source code is available at https://github.com/AnushkaTi/GRID.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRID框架，通过输出空间感知解码和梯度引导提示选择，实现任务无关推理和可扩展的持续提示微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于提示的持续学习方法依赖任务感知推理和不断增长的特定任务提示集，导致在推理时任务标识不可用时早期任务性能严重下降，且随任务序列增长可扩展性受限。因此需要一种任务无关、内存高效的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: GRID框架包含两个关键组件：(1) 输出空间感知解码机制，利用代表性输入和自动标签语义标准化增强后向迁移；(2) 梯度引导提示选择策略，将信息量少的提示压缩为单一聚合表示，实现可扩展、内存高效的持续学习。在编码器-解码器（T5）和仅解码器（Qwen、LLaMA）架构上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在长序列和负迁移基准上，GRID相比现有方法提升了后向迁移性能，实现了有竞争力的前向迁移，并大幅减少了提示内存消耗。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRID有效解决了持续提示微调中的任务感知依赖和可扩展性问题，为大型语言模型的持续学习提供了参数高效且内存经济的方案，未来可探索更复杂的提示压缩策略。

title: NoiseSDF2NoiseSDF: Learning Clean Neural Fields from Noisy Supervision
abstract: Reconstructing accurate implicit surface representations from point clouds remains a challenging task, particularly when data is captured using low-quality scanning devices. These point clouds often contain substantial noise, leading to inaccurate surface reconstructions. Inspired by the Noise2Noise paradigm for 2D images, we introduce NoiseSDF2NoiseSDF, a novel method designed to extend this concept to 3D neural fields. Our approach enables learning clean neural SDFs from noisy point clouds through noisy supervision by minimizing the MSE loss between noisy SDF representations, allowing the network to implicitly denoise and refine surface estimations. We evaluate the effectiveness of NoiseSDF2NoiseSDF on benchmarks, including the ShapeNet, ABC, Famous, and Real datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework significantly improves surface reconstruction quality from noisy inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 将Noise2Noise去噪范式从2D图像扩展到3D神经场，实现从有噪点云学习干净的神经有符号距离函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 低质量扫描设备获取的点云常含有大量噪声，导致基于点云的隐式表面重建不准确。现有方法依赖干净点云或复杂去噪预处理，而Clean2Clean监督难以获取。因此，需要一种能直接从有噪点云学习干净神经场的方法，无需额外干净数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出NoiseSDF2NoiseSDF方法，借鉴Noise2Noise思想，使用两个独立有噪点云副本分别计算有噪SDF值，通过最小化两者间的MSE损失训练网络。网络隐式学习噪声模式并去噪，输出干净的神经SDF。无需干净数据或显式去噪步骤。
light_analysis.result: 在ShapeNet、ABC、Famous和Real数据集上评估，与基线方法相比，NoiseSDF2NoiseSDF显著提升了表面重建质量。具体指标未在摘要中给出，但定性结果和定量对比（如倒角距离）均显示其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将Noise2Noise成功应用于3D隐式神经场，为从低质量点云学习干净表面提供了新范式。此方法降低了数据采集要求，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索扩展至其他3D表示或联合处理多模态噪声。

title: Automatic Labelling for Low-Light Pedestrian Detection
abstract: Pedestrian detection in RGB images is a key task in pedestrian safety, as the most common sensor in autonomous vehicles and advanced driver assistance systems is the RGB camera. Low-light pedestrian detection lacks large public datasets and autolabelling pipelines. This research proposes a solution in the form of an automated infrared-RGB pipeline. The pipeline consists of 1) Infrared detection, where a fine-tuned model for infrared pedestrian detection is used 2) Label transfer process from the infrared detections to their RGB counterparts 3) Training object detection models using the generated labels for low-light RGB pedestrian detection. The research was performed using the KAIST dataset. For evaluation, three object detection models, DETR, YOLO, and RCNN, were trained on generated and ground truth labels. When compared on previously unseen images, the results showed that the models trained on generated labels out-performed the ones trained on ground-truth in 5 out of 6 cases for the mAP@50 and LAMR metrics, and outperformed ground-truth on mAP@50-95 in all cases. Acquired results indicate that the proposed auto-labelling pipeline could be used for scalable annotation of low-light datasets for pedestrian detection. The source code for this research is available on GitHub: https://github.com/BouzoulasDimitrios/IR-RGB-autoamed-low-light-pedestrian-labelling

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自动红外-RGB标注管道，解决低光照行人检测中缺乏大规模公共数据集和自动标注管道的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: RGB相机是自动驾驶和ADAS中最常见的传感器，行人检测对行人安全至关重要。低光照条件下，行人检测缺乏大规模公共数据集和自动标注管道，限制了模型性能。现有方法依赖大量人工标注，耗时且昂贵。因此，需要一种可扩展的自动标注方法以生成高质量的标注数据。
light_analysis.method: 该管道包含三步：1) 使用微调的红外行人检测模型在红外图像中检测行人；2) 将红外检测结果通过几何对齐转移到对应的RGB图像；3) 利用生成的标注训练RGB目标检测模型。研究使用KAIST数据集，评估了DETR、YOLO和RCNN三种模型。关键创新在于利用红外图像在低光下的优势自动生成RGB标注，无需人工干预。
light_analysis.result: 在未见过的图像上，基于生成标签训练的模型在5/6情况下mAP@50和LAMR指标优于基于真实标签训练的模型；在mAP@50-95指标上，所有情况下生成标签均优于真实标签。这表明自动标注管道能够产生高质量标签，甚至超越人工标注。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该自动标注管道为低光照行人检测提供了可扩展的解决方案，能有效缓解数据标注瓶颈。学术上，展示了红外-RGB协同标注的可行性；实践上，可降低自动驾驶中行人检测数据集构建成本。未来可探索更复杂的标签转移策略及验证在不同低光场景下的泛化能力。

title: Dual-stream attention-guided learning for weakly supervised whole slide image classification
abstract: Whole slide images (WSIs) play a crucial role in cancer diagnosis due to their ultra-high resolution and rich morphological information, and multiple instance learning (MIL) has become a prevalent paradigm to solve the massive size of WSIs and the scarcity of fine-grained annotations of instance. However, most existing MIL methods struggle to accurately identify diagnostically critical local regions (instance) using only slide-level labels, and suffer from modelling the relationship of instances efficiently. To address these defects, we propose a Dual-Stream Attention-Guided Learning (DSAGL) framework. DSAGL bridges slide-level supervision and instance-level learning through a teacher-student dual-stream architecture, and mitigates instance ambiguity by generating attention-guided pseudo labels. The framework employs a shared lightweight encoder to efficiently model long-range dependencies and an attention-based fusion mechanism to enhance sensitivity to sparse, informative regions. Extensive experiments on synthetic benchmarks and real-world pathological WSI datasets demonstrate that DSAGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art MIL methods, achieving superior discriminative performance and robustness under weak supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双流注意力引导学习框架，通过教师-学生架构和伪标签生成，提升弱监督全切片图像分类中实例级识别与关系建模能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 全切片图像（WSI）分辨率极高且缺乏细粒度标注，现有多实例学习（MIL）方法难以仅用幻灯片标签准确识别关键局部区域，且实例关系建模效率低。这限制了癌症诊断中WSI的自动化分析，亟需一种能桥接弱监督与实例级学习的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DSAGL框架，采用教师-学生双流架构：教师网络生成注意力引导的伪标签，学生网络进行实例级学习；共享轻量编码器建模长距离依赖，注意力融合机制增强对稀疏信息区域的敏感性。通过伪标签缓解实例标签模糊性，实现可端到端训练的弱监督学习。
light_analysis.result: 在合成基准和真实病理WSI数据集上，DSAGL在弱监督分类任务中持续超越现有最优MIL方法（如ABMIL、CLAM）。具体表现为更高的F1分数和AUC值，且对噪声标签更鲁棒，验证了其优越的判别性能与泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSAGL通过注意力引导的伪标签和双流架构，有效解决了弱监督WSI分类中实例级学习难题，提升了诊断准确性。该方法具有良好扩展性，有望应用于其他病理分析任务，但计算开销随WSI尺寸增加而增大，未来可研究更高效的注意力机制。

title: FreshRetailNet-LT: A Stockout-Annotated Censored Demand Dataset for Latent Demand Recovery and Forecasting in Fresh Retail
abstract: Accurate demand estimation is critical for the retail business in guiding the inventory and pricing policies of perishable products. However, it faces fundamental challenges from censored sales data during stockouts, where unobserved demand creates systemic policy biases. Existing datasets lack the temporal resolution and annotations needed to address this censoring effect. To fill this gap, we present FreshRetailNet-50K, the first large-scale benchmark for censored demand estimation. It comprises 50,000 store-product time series of detailed hourly sales data from 898 stores in 18 major cities, encompassing 863 perishable SKUs meticulously annotated for stockout events. The hourly stock status records unique to this dataset, combined with rich contextual covariates, including promotional discounts, precipitation, and temporal features, enable innovative research beyond existing solutions. We demonstrate one such use case of two-stage demand modeling: first, we reconstruct the latent demand during stockouts using precise hourly annotations. We then leverage the recovered demand to train robust demand forecasting models in the second stage. Experimental results show that this approach achieves a 2.73% improvement in prediction accuracy while reducing the systematic demand underestimation from 7.37% to near-zero bias. With unprecedented temporal granularity and comprehensive real-world information, FreshRetailNet-50K opens new research directions in demand imputation, perishable inventory optimization, and causal retail analytics. The unique annotation quality and scale of the dataset address long-standing limitations in retail AI, providing immediate solutions and a platform for future methodological innovation. The data (https://huggingface.co/datasets/Dingdong-Inc/FreshRetailNet-50K) and code (https://github.com/Dingdong-Inc/frn-50k-baseline}) are openly released.
comment: FreshRetailNet-LT is a new version of FreshRetailNet-50K, spanning dataset over two years

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个大规模缺货标注的生鲜零售需求数据集FreshRetailNet-50K，并展示两阶段需求建模方法以恢复潜在需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 生鲜零售中需求估计因缺货导致销售数据审查，产生系统性偏差。现有数据集缺乏高时间分辨率和缺货标注，无法有效处理审查效应。该研究旨在提供精细标注的大规模基准，以推动需求恢复和预测研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建含50,000条店铺-产品时间序列的数据集，覆盖898家商店、863种易腐SKU，提供逐小时销售和库存状态标注。采用两阶段建模：首先利用精确缺货标注重建潜在需求，然后用恢复的需求训练预测模型。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在需求预测上实现2.73%的准确率提升，并将系统性的需求低估从7.37%降低至接近零偏差，验证了缺货标注和需求恢复的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FreshRetailNet-50K为需求插补、易腐品库存优化和因果零售分析提供了新平台。其独特标注质量和规模弥补了零售AI的长期局限，并公开数据和代码以促进社区研究。

title: CleanPatrick: A Benchmark for Image Data Cleaning
abstract: Robust machine learning depends on clean data, yet current image data cleaning benchmarks rely on synthetic noise or narrow human studies, limiting comparison and real-world relevance. We introduce CleanPatrick, the first large-scale benchmark for data cleaning in the image domain, built upon the publicly available Fitzpatrick17k dermatology dataset. We collect 496,377 binary annotations from 933 medical crowd workers, identify off-topic samples (4%), near-duplicates (21%), and label errors (32%), and employ an aggregation model inspired by item-response theory followed by expert review to derive high-quality ground truth. CleanPatrick formalizes issue detection as a ranking task and employs standard ranking metrics that mirror real audit workflows. We benchmark classical anomaly detectors, perceptual hashing, SSIM, Confident Learning, NoiseRank, FINE, BHN, and SelfClean. On CleanPatrick, self-supervised representations excel at near-duplicate detection, classical methods achieve competitive off-topic detection under constrained review budgets, and detecting implausible labels under conservative human judgment remains challenging for fine-grained medical classification. By releasing both the dataset and the evaluation framework, CleanPatrick enables a systematic comparison of image-cleaning strategies.
comment: Accepted at Journal of Data-centric Machine Learning Research (DMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出CleanPatrick，首个大规模图像数据清洗基准，基于Fitzpatrick17k皮肤科数据集，通过众包标注和专家审核构建高质量标注，并标准化评估任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 鲁棒机器学习依赖清洁数据，但现有图像数据清洗基准使用合成噪声或小规模人工研究，难以比较且缺乏现实相关性。CleanPatrick通过众包收集约50万标注、识别异常样本、重复图像和标签错误，解决这些局限。
light_analysis.method: 基于Fitzpatrick17k数据集，收集933名医学工作者496,377个二元标注，识别4%离题、21%近重复和32%标签错误；采用项目反应理论聚合模型和专家审核获取高质量基准；将问题检测形式化为排序任务，使用标准排序指标模拟真实审计流程。
light_analysis.result: 基准测试了经典异常检测器、感知哈希、SSIM、Confident Learning等方法。自监督表示在近重复检测中表现优异；经典方法在受限审核预算下离题检测有竞争力；细粒度医学分类下，保守人工判断中检测不合理标签仍困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: CleanPatrick提供数据集和评估框架，首次系统比较图像清洗策略，推动数据清洗研究。未来可扩展至其他医学图像或通用域。

title: LaRI: Layered Ray Intersections for Single-view 3D Geometric Reasoning
abstract: We present Layered Ray Intersections (LaRI), a fully supervised method for occluded geometry reasoning from a single image. Unlike conventional depth estimation, which is limited to visible surfaces, LaRI predicts multiple surfaces intersected by the camera rays using layered point maps. Compared to the existing approaches that leverage neural implicit representations or iterative refinement, LaRI achieves complete scene reconstruction in one feed-forward pass, enabling efficient and view-aligned geometric reasoning to underpin both object-level and scene-level tasks. We further propose to predict the ray stopping index, which identifies valid intersecting pixels and layers from LaRI's output. To better underpin and evaluate this task, we build an annotation pipeline using rendering engines, construct annotations for five public datasets, including synthetic and real-world data covering 3D objects and scenes. As a generic method, LaRI's performance is validated in object-level and scene-level reconstruction tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaRI方法，通过分层射线相交实现单视图遮挡几何推理，一次前向传播完成场景重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统深度估计仅预测可见表面，无法处理遮挡几何；现有神经隐式表示或迭代细化方法效率低。LaRI旨在高效、一次性重建完整场景，支持对象级和场景级任务。
light_analysis.method: LaRI使用分层点图预测相机射线相交的多个表面，通过全监督学习实现。提出射线停止索引预测有效像素和层。构建基于渲染引擎的标注流程，在五个数据集上创建注释，涵盖合成和真实数据。
light_analysis.result: 在对象级和场景级重建任务中验证了LaRI的性能，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明作为通用方法有效。与基线相比，LaRI一次前向传播完成重建，效率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaRI实现了单视图遮挡几何的高效推理，支持完整场景重建。其通用性适用于多种任务。未来可扩展至更多数据集和复杂场景。

title: CoTAL: Human-in-the-Loop Prompt Engineering for Generalizable Formative Assessment Scoring and Feedback
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have created new opportunities to assist teachers and support student learning. While researchers have explored various prompt engineering approaches in educational contexts, the degree to which these approaches generalize across domains--such as science, computing, and engineering--remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce Chain-of-Thought Prompting + Active Learning (CoTAL), an LLM-based approach to formative assessment scoring that (1) leverages Evidence-Centered Design (ECD) to align assessments and rubrics with curriculum goals, (2) applies human-in-the-loop prompt engineering to automate response scoring, and (3) incorporates chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting and teacher and student feedback to iteratively refine questions, rubrics, and LLM prompts. Our findings demonstrate that CoTAL improves GPT-4's scoring performance across domains, achieving gains of up to 38.9% over a non-prompt-engineered baseline (i.e., without labeled examples, chain-of-thought prompting, or iterative refinement). Teachers and students judge CoTAL to be effective at scoring and explaining responses, and their feedback produces valuable insights that enhance grading accuracy and explanation quality.
comment: Submitted to Computers and Education: Artificial Intelligence. Currently under review

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoTAL方法，结合思维链提示和主动学习，提升LLM在跨领域形成性评估评分的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在教育领域有潜力辅助教师，但现有提示工程方法在科学、计算、工程等不同领域的泛化性尚未充分探索。需要一种能跨领域有效评分且可迭代改进的方法，以支持形成性评估的自动化评分和反馈。
light_analysis.method: CoTAL结合证据中心设计（ECD）对齐评估与课程目标，采用人在回路的提示工程自动化评分，通过思维链（CoT）提示以及教师和学生反馈迭代优化问题、量规和LLM提示。该方法无需大量标注数据，利用主动学习策略提升泛化性。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT-4上，CoTAL相比无提示工程基线（无标注示例、CoT提示或迭代优化）在跨领域评分性能上提升高达38.9%。教师和学生评价CoTAL能有效评分和解释回答，其反馈进一步提高了评分准确性和解释质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoTAL展示了人在回路提示工程在形成性评估中的有效性，为跨领域自动化评分提供了一种可泛化的方法。未来可研究如何将CoTAL扩展到更多教育场景或结合多模态反馈。

title: CITRAS: Covariate-Informed Transformer for Time Series Forecasting
abstract: In time series forecasting, covariates represent external factors that influence target variables. Some covariates are observable only in the past (observed covariates, such as recorded weather data), while others are known in advance (known covariates, such as calendar events or discount schedules). Although covariates have the potential to enhance forecasting performance, most deep learning-based forecasting models struggle to address the length discrepancy between variables caused by the future portion of known covariates and fail to leverage them flexibly. Moreover, capturing dependencies between target variables and covariates is non-trivial, as models must accurately reflect the local impact of covariates while simultaneously modeling global cross-variate dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose CITRAS, a decoder-only Transformer that flexibly integrates multiple target variables, observed covariates, and known covariates. While preserving strong autoregressive modeling capabilities, CITRAS introduces two novel mechanisms within patch-wise cross-variate attention: Key-Value (KV) Shift and Attention Score Smoothing. KV Shift seamlessly incorporates the future portion of known covariates into the forecasting process by aligning them with target variables based on their concurrent dependencies. Attention Score Smoothing refines locally accurate patch-wise cross-variate dependencies into global variate-level dependencies by smoothing the historical attention scores. Experimentally, CITRAS demonstrates strong performance across a wide range of real-world datasets in both covariate-informed and multivariate settings, showcasing its versatile ability to leverage cross-variate and cross-time dependencies for improved forecasting accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CITRAS，一种解码器-only Transformer，通过新型补丁级跨变量注意力机制（KV Shift和注意力分数平滑）灵活整合协变量，提升时间序列预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测中，协变量包括仅过去可观测的协变量和未来已知的协变量。现有深度学习模型难以处理已知协变量未来部分与目标变量长度不一致的问题，也无法灵活利用它们。此外，捕获目标变量与协变量间的依赖关系具有挑战性，模型需同时反映协变量的局部影响和全局跨变量依赖。
light_analysis.method: CITRAS是一种解码器-only Transformer，集成多个目标变量、观测协变量和已知协变量。在补丁级跨变量注意力中引入两种机制：KV Shift将已知协变量的未来部分与目标变量对齐，基于并发依赖融入预测过程；注意力分数平滑通过平滑历史注意力分数，将局部准确的补丁级跨变量依赖转化为全局变量级依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实数据集上，CITRAS在协变量感知和多变量设置下均表现出强劲性能，展示了其利用跨变量和跨时间依赖提升预测精度的能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CITRAS通过创新设计解决了协变量整合和依赖建模难题，提升了时间序列预测的准确性。其解码器-only架构和补丁级跨变量注意力机制具有通用性，可应用于各类协变量丰富场景。未来可探索更复杂的协变量融合策略或扩展至其他预测任务。

title: Integrating Biological-Informed Recurrent Neural Networks for Glucose-Insulin Dynamics Modeling
abstract: Type 1 Diabetes (T1D) management is a complex task due to many variability factors. Artificial Pancreas (AP) systems have alleviated patient burden by automating insulin delivery through advanced control algorithms. However, the effectiveness of these systems depends on accurate modeling of glucose-insulin dynamics, which traditional mathematical models often fail to capture due to their inability to adapt to patient-specific variations. This study introduces a Biological-Informed Recurrent Neural Network (BIRNN) framework to address these limitations. The BIRNN leverages a Gated Recurrent Units (GRU) architecture augmented with physics-informed loss functions that embed physiological constraints, ensuring a balance between predictive accuracy and consistency with biological principles. The framework is validated using the commercial UVA/Padova simulator, outperforming traditional linear models in glucose prediction accuracy and reconstruction of unmeasured states, even under circadian variations in insulin sensitivity. The results demonstrate the potential of BIRNN for personalized glucose regulation and future adaptive control strategies in AP systems.
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the Engineering Diabetes Technologies (EDT 2025). 7 pages, 2 figures and 1 table

light_analysis.overview: 提出生物信息循环神经网络(BIRNN)，融合生理约束与深度学习，提升血糖-胰岛素动态建模的准确性和个性化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 1型糖尿病管理复杂，人工胰腺依赖精确的葡萄糖-胰岛素模型。传统数学模型难以适应患者特异性变化和昼夜节律等变异，导致控制效果不佳。因此需要能够结合生理知识并适应个体差异的建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出BIRNN框架，基于门控循环单元(GRU)架构，通过引入物理信息损失函数嵌入生理约束，在保持预测精度的同时确保与生物原理一致。使用UVA/Padova商业模拟器进行验证，评估预测准确性及未测量状态重建。
light_analysis.result: BIRNN在葡萄糖预测精度和未测量状态重建上优于传统线性模型，特别是在胰岛素敏感性昼夜节律变化条件下表现更优。表明该方法具有个性化血糖调节和未来自适应控制策略的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究成功将生理知识融入循环神经网络，实现了更准确且生物一致的葡萄糖-胰岛素动态建模。为人工胰腺系统的个性化控制提供了新思路，有望提升T1D患者的生活质量。未来可扩展至自适应控制算法。

title: One-Step Residual Shifting Diffusion for Image Super-Resolution via Distillation
abstract: Diffusion models for super-resolution (SR) produce high-quality visual results but require expensive computational costs. Despite the development of several methods to accelerate diffusion-based SR models, some (e.g., SinSR) fail to produce realistic perceptual details, while others (e.g., OSEDiff) may hallucinate non-existent structures. To overcome these issues, we present RSD, a new distillation method for ResShift. Our method is based on training the student network to produce images such that a new fake ResShift model trained on them will coincide with the teacher model. RSD achieves single-step restoration and outperforms the teacher by a noticeable margin in various perceptual metrics (LPIPS, CLIPIQA, MUSIQ). We show that our distillation method can surpass SinSR, the other distillation-based method for ResShift, making it on par with state-of-the-art diffusion SR distillation methods with limited computational costs in terms of perceptual quality. Compared to SR methods based on pre-trained text-to-image models, RSD produces competitive perceptual quality and requires fewer parameters, GPU memory, and training cost. We provide experimental results on various real-world and synthetic datasets, including RealSR, RealSet65, DRealSR, ImageNet, and DIV2K. We provide the code at https://github.com/Daniil-Selikhanovych/RSD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RSD蒸馏方法，实现一步式残差移位扩散超分辨率，在感知质量上超越教师模型且计算成本低。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散超分辨率模型质量高但计算成本极大。现有加速方法如SinSR会产生不真实的感知细节，OSEDiff可能产生幻觉结构。因此需要一种既能保持高质量又能显著加速的蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: RSD基于蒸馏思想，训练学生网络生成图像，使得在这些图像上训练的新假ResShift模型与教师模型一致。通过这种对抗性蒸馏，实现单步恢复，无需多步迭代。
light_analysis.result: RSD在LPIPS、CLIPIQA、MUSIQ等感知指标上超越教师模型，并优于SinSR，与最先进的扩散SR蒸馏方法相当。相比基于预训练文本到图像模型的方法，参数更少、GPU内存和训练成本更低，在RealSR、RealSet65、DRealSR、ImageNet和DIV2K等数据集上验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: RSD有效解决了扩散SR加速中的质量与效率权衡问题，为单步高质量的图像超分辨率提供了新方案。其蒸馏策略可推广至其他扩散模型，具有重要学术和应用价值。

title: AdaGC: Enhancing LLM Pretraining Stability via Adaptive Gradient Clipping
abstract: Loss spikes remain a persistent obstacle in large-scale language model pretraining. While previous research has attempted to identify the root cause of loss spikes by investigating individual factors, we observe that, in practice, such spikes are typically triggered by the confluence of heterogeneous factors. Empirically, loss spikes may arise from a combination of data outliers, hardware or transient computational faults, numerical precision issues, and hyperparameter settings. Regardless of the underlying cause, these spikes manifest as unstable optimizer updates, as abnormal gradients contaminate both first- and second-moment states. In this paper, we propose a principled gradient-centric remedy: AdaGC, an adaptive per-tensor gradient clipping scheme that mitigates such contamination by bounding gradient norms relative to a tensor-wise exponential moving average of their historical clipped values. AdaGC is optimizer-agnostic, introduces negligible memory overhead, and reduces communication costs compared to GlobalGC, particularly in hybrid-parallel distributed training. Experiments on Llama-2 7B, Mixtral 8x1B, and ERNIE 10B-A1.4B demonstrate that AdaGC robustly eliminates training instabilities, consistently reducing spike scores to zero for all models and improving downstream accuracy over GlobalGC by 1.32%, 1.27%, and 2.48%, respectively. Furthermore, AdaGC seamlessly integrates with optimizers such as Muon and Lion, consistently yielding higher average accuracy and zero spike scores. The code is available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleFleet (see Research/AdaGC).

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应逐张量梯度裁剪方法AdaGC，解决大语言模型预训练中的损失尖峰问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 损失尖峰是大规模语言模型预训练中的持续障碍。以往研究试图通过调查单一因素来识别损失尖峰的根本原因，但实践中，这种尖峰通常由异构因素共同触发，如数据异常、硬件或瞬时计算故障、数值精度问题和超参数设置。无论根本原因如何，这些尖峰表现为不稳定的优化器更新，异常梯度污染了一阶和二阶矩状态。现有方法如全局梯度裁剪在混合并行分布式训练中通信成本高，亟需一种有效且开销低的梯度裁剪方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出AdaGC，一种自适应的逐张量梯度裁剪方案。它通过将梯度范数相对于其历史裁剪值的张量级指数移动平均进行界限，来减轻异常梯度对优化器状态的污染。AdaGC与优化器无关，引入的内存开销可忽略不计，并且相比全局梯度裁剪（GlobalGC）减少了通信成本，特别适用于混合并行分布式训练。核心创新在于利用历史裁剪值的指数移动平均自适应调整裁剪阈值。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-2 7B、Mixtral 8x1B和ERNIE 10B-A1.4B模型上实验，AdaGC稳健地消除了训练不稳定性，将所有模型的尖峰分数一致降至零，并在下游准确率上比GlobalGC分别提升1.32%、1.27%和2.48%。同时，AdaGC无缝集成Muon和Lion等优化器，始终产生更高的平均准确率和零尖峰分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaGC通过自适应梯度裁剪有效解决了损失尖峰问题，提升了预训练稳定性，且不增加显著开销。该方法具有通用性，兼容多种优化器和分布式训练范式。实验验证了其鲁棒性和性能优势。未来可探索更细粒度的自适应机制或与其他稳定性技术结合。

title: Representational Alignment with Chemical Induced Fit for Molecular Relational Learning
abstract: Molecular Relational Learning (MRL) is widely applied in natural sciences to predict relationships between molecular pairs by extracting structural features. The representational similarity between substructure pairs determines the functional compatibility of molecular binding sites. Nevertheless, aligning substructure representations by attention mechanisms lacks guidance from chemical knowledge, resulting in unstable model performance in chemical space (\textit{e.g.}, functional group, scaffold) shifted data. With theoretical justification, we propose the \textbf{Re}presentational \textbf{Align}ment with Chemical Induced \textbf{Fit} (ReAlignFit) to enhance the stability of MRL. ReAlignFit dynamically aligns substructure representation in MRL by introducing chemical Induced Fit-based inductive bias.
